programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Is a Matchmaker
programme.desc: Lucy decides to play matchmaker after a meeting a friend of the Mertz's.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Wants New Furniture
programme.desc: Lucy tries to hide some new furniture she bought without Ricky's permission in the kitchen. Discovering his wife's extravagant purchase, Ricky insists that Lucy pays for it from her allowance.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Camping Trip
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel invite themselves on a rugged camping trip with their spouses.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Ricky and Fred Are TV Fans
programme.desc: Ricky and Fred never want to do anything but watch the fights on TV.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Triangle
programme.desc: A doctor Dorothy dates also gets Blanche's pulse racing, until he makes a pass at her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: On Golden Girls
programme.desc: Blanche's undisciplined 14-year-old grandson's visit gives new meaning to generation gap.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Competition
programme.desc: Sophia and Rose compete against Dorothy and Blanche in a bowling tournament.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Break-In
programme.desc: Terrified by a burglary, the girls explore means to protect themselves, including a dog.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blanche and the Younger Man
programme.desc: Blanche dates her young aerobics instructor; Rose is overprotective of her mother.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Heart Attack
programme.desc: Sophia suffers an apparent heart attack and the girls nervously await the paramedics.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Television host Mel Robbins visits. Registered dietitian Annessa Chumbley prepares a hearty tomato soup. Food and lifestyle expert Chadwick Boyd visits.

programme.title: Movie: Autumn Dreams
programme.desc: A young couple's spur of the moment marriage is immediately annulled by the bride's parents. Years later, they discover that a glitch in the paperwork means they are still husband and wife.

programme.title: Movie: Hearts of Spring
programme.desc: A mommy blogger finds herself being attacked by a reader that has conflicting advice. While she deals with him online she finally meets a great single dad and sparks start to fly.

programme.title: Movie: Forever in My Heart

programme.title: South Park: Osama Bin Laden Has Farty Pants
programme.desc: The kids of South Park have raised money to send to children of Afghanistan, but the Government believes the Afghani children's thank you gift is contaminated with Anthrax and the boys are forced to take it back to Afghanistan.

programme.title: South Park: Free Willzyx
programme.desc: The boys try to rescue their new friend Willzyx, a talking space whale, from the Denver Sea Park and with the help of MASA (Mexican Aeronautica y Spacia Administracion) get him home to the moon for $200.

programme.title: South Park: The Death of Eric Cartman
programme.desc: Cartman is sure he's dead and Butters is sure that Eric Cartman's ghost is haunting him. Together they attempt to make amends to all the people Cartman has wronged over the years.

programme.title: South Park: Freak Strike
programme.desc: When the boys learn that talk shows offer prizes to people who are grossly disfigured they can't sign Butters up fast enough.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman Sucks
programme.desc: Cartman invites Butters over for the night and plans to do disgusting things to him in his sleep. However, when he photographs Butters' penis in his mouth, there are drastic consequences for both boys.

programme.title: South Park: AWESOM-O
programme.desc: Cartman plans to learn all of Butters' innermost secrets and then use them against him, by pretending to be Butters' new best friend, a robot named AWESOM-O.

programme.title: South Park: Casa Bonita
programme.desc: Kyle chooses Stan, Kenny and Butters to celebrate his birthday at Casa Bonita. When Cartman finds out he's not invited, he arranges for Butters to conveniently go 'missing.'

programme.title: South Park: How to Eat With Your Butt
programme.desc: Cartman gets Kenny's school picture on every 'missing child' milk carton in the country. Cartman then sees the funniest thing ever and breaks his funny bone, losing his sense of humour.

programme.title: South Park: Ginger Kids
programme.desc: Cartman catches the mysterious Gingervitus, a disease that turns his hair red, lightens his skin and gives him freckles. Sick of being ripped-on because of his new looks, Cartman rallies all ginger kids everywhere to fight against discrimination.

programme.title: South Park: Le Petit Tourette
programme.desc: Cartman discovers the joys of having Tourette's syndrome. Drunk with the power of saying whatever he wants without getting in trouble for it, he lines up National TV Coverage to take advantage of his new life with no filters.

programme.title: South Park: Scott Tenorman Must Die
programme.desc: Cartman is excited that he has finally entered puberty when he gets pubes of his very own. After the other boys explain that pubes don't count unless you grow them, Cartman realizes he been tricked and sets in motion a dastardly plot for revenge.

programme.title: Crank Yankers: Jimmy Kimmel, Sarah Silverman and Nikki Glaser
programme.desc: Bobby seeks some highly-specific bumper stickers, Nikki Glaser's relationship is plagued by technical difficulties, and Niles inquiries about laundry service.

programme.title: South Park: Smug Alert!

programme.title: South Park: Season Finale

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Knowledge
programme.desc: A police investigation reveals details about a missing woman's past that no one suspected: She was a student by day and a $100-an-hour call-girl by night. Her many clients were all suspects in her disappearance, as was her boyfriend.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Promises

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Secrets of Shangri-La
programme.desc: Josh Gates treks high into the Sky Caves of Nepal in search of the origins of the Shangri-La myth.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Africa's Cursed Lake of Gold
programme.desc: Josh journeys to the wilds of Namibia to embark on a treacherously deep dive in Lake Otjikoto for a long lost World War I treasure.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Butch Cassidy's Lost Loot
programme.desc: Josh immerses himself in Wild West lore on a quest to find Butch Cassidy's missing money. He traces the iconic outlaw's footsteps through Colorado, Utah and Nevada, eventually learning that he may need to find the man himself to locate the lost loot.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: Mysteries of the Dead Sea Scrolls
programme.desc: Josh Gates travels to the Holy Land to dig in with an archaeologist who has recently discovered new Dead Sea Scrolls. Josh also sees cutting-edge technology restore scroll fragments in a way that could change how we read the Bible.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: Treasure of the Copper Scroll
programme.desc: Josh Gates investigates a unique Dead Sea Scroll etched with riddles that could lead to an ancient treasure. Following new leads, Josh treks into the punishing Jordanian desert in search of the potential fortune.

programme.title: Legends of the Wild: South American Slasher
programme.desc: Brazilian ranchers are turning up dead, gored by some unknown creature. There's a wild range of animal suspects from jaguars to caimans, but could the killer be something no one suspected?

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Josh Gates Tonight: Safer at Home
programme.desc: During this unprecedented time, Josh explores the world while staying Safer at Home. Josh welcomes us into his house to interview an adventurer to give insight into Legends of the Wild. Then, Josh dives deeper into the mysteries of the Dead Sea Scrolls.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Nazis in Argentina
programme.desc: Josh ventures to Argentina, where many Nazi SS officers escaped to after World War II.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Nazis in Argentina

programme.title: Moonshiners: Rum Conundrum
programme.desc: Mark, Digger and Tim judge as legal and outlaw distillers compete to make the best rum. Constructing stills of their own design and mashing in their own raw ingredients, only one will survive elimination to earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: American Whiskey
programme.desc: Heritage grains meet charred oak as three amateur distillers compete to make the best American Whiskey. Judged by Mark, Digger, and Tim, they'll go head to head in a series of challenges to determine who has what it takes to be Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Moonshine of Mexico
programme.desc: Mark, Digger and Tim judge as top amateur distillers from both sides of the law compete to make mezcal, the moonshine of Mexico. Using agave mash, regional recipes and even meat, only one competitor will earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Mountain Brandy
programme.desc: Legal and outlaw distillers compete head-to-head to see who makes a classic Appalachian tradition called Mountain Brandy. Judged by moonshine legends Mark, Digger and Tim, only the best will have what it takes to be named Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Mark vs. Digger vs. Tim
programme.desc: Tickle hosts as Appalachia's most notorious moonshiners go head-to-head in a moonshine distilling competition. Mark, Digger and Tim run their own secret recipes to be judged by the public to determine once and for all who makes the best shine.

programme.title: Pandemic: COVID-19
programme.desc: The war against the COVID-19 pandemic has come to America, and using the latest information from the frontlines, experts reveal why this novel form of coronavirus is so deadly and how we're fighting back.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Wind Farm Technician
programme.desc: Mike Rowe heads to an Oklahoma wind farm and learns that going green sometimes means you've got to get brown first.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Greenland Shark Quest
programme.desc: Mike Rowe heads to Greenland to learn about one of the more obscure sharks.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Tar Rigger
programme.desc: Mike heads to San Diego to get dirty with the tar rigging crew of the Star of India, the oldest active merchant ship in the world. Then, Mike takes a look back at some of the dirty tools he's used that make civilized life possible for the rest of us.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Dirty Chip Maker
programme.desc: Mike heads to the Dirty Potato Chips factory and learns how potato chips are made and what it takes to keep the machines used to make them clean and in working order. Then it's off to Rifle, CO where Mike attempts to clean a "monster" hidden underground.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Goose Down Plucker
programme.desc: Mike heads to Meridian, California to find out what it takes to harvest walnuts. Then he spends some time in Tulelake where he learns how to make goose down pillows and comforters.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Rocky Reach Dam
programme.desc: Mike heads out to Wenatchee, Washington to help maintain a hydroelectric dam. He then explores a fish bypass system where he must tag fish and winds up wading through poop.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Floating Fish Factory
programme.desc: Mike travels to Alaska and explores how fish are prepared aboard a processing ship.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Mercedes' Story
programme.desc: With severe lymphedema, Mercedes can barely stand and only cares for her two small children with the help of her extended family. Dr. Now can give her the tools to lose weight, but to succeed she must face the trauma inflicted by her late abusive father.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Dominic's Story

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Guilty as Charged

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Rules for Dating My Teenage Daughter
programme.desc: When Julie announces she's going back to work, Todd must transform into Mr. Mom and take over the household duties. Meanwhile, Savannah feels like she's ready to start dating and pleads her case to go out with a 19-year-old American Idol.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Misadventures in Babysitting
programme.desc: Todd and Julie head out of town, and leave Chase and Savannah at home to watch Grayson overnight for the first time. They hope they will follow the rules, but Chase and Savannah have plans of their own.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Father's Day
programme.desc: It's Father's Day and the kids try and plan a day for dad, but their bright idea of going to an amusement park backfires, as Todd's competitive side turns their planned day of fun into an all-out competition.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Confessions of a Beauty Queen
programme.desc: With Savannah and Chase leaving the nest in the next few years, Todd and Julie decide it's time to downsize.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Chase Turns 18
programme.desc: After 18 years of counting down the days, Chase is finally 18! When he tells Todd that he will no longer follow the house rules such as a curfew, Todd decides it’s time to give his son a dose of reality and show him what it’s really like to be an adult.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Anger Management
programme.desc: Todd blames his family for his stress when his doctor tells him that he has high blood pressure. Savannah gives Todd more bad news. Nothing works until Todd finds his own way to relieve his stress, leaving the kids running for cover.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: California Chrisleys
programme.desc: The Chrisleys venture to LA for their regular Beverly Hills haircuts, and for what Todd hopes will be a relaxing family vacation. His plans and sanity are threatened by new levels of Chrisley family craziness when Savannah does something drastic.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Workin' for a Livin'
programme.desc: After Todd unknowingly foots the bill for an extravagant lunch, he wants Chase and Savannah to learn that money doesn't grow on trees. Forced to get summer jobs, the kids struggle to face the reality of a hard day's work for the first time.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Great Outdoors
programme.desc: Todd and Chase are forced to experience the great outdoors when Grayson insists on going camping. While the guys 'rough it' in a luxury RV and terrify Grayson with stories of a haunted lake, Savannah and Julie must go back to driving school.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Marriage Redux
programme.desc: Todd and Julie want to avoid a marriage rut when the kids go to college, so they look for new ways to reconnect and put the spark back in their relationship.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Houseguest From Hell
programme.desc: Todd's home life is turned upside down when Julie’s pregnant and very demanding friend comes over to stay a few days. Also, Todd tries to bridge the gap between himself and his oldest daughter Lindsie.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Still Chrisley After All These Years
programme.desc: Julie and Todd decide to celebrate their wedding anniversary by throwing a charity event to raise money for breast cancer. When someone mixes up the dates, however, it’s a mad scramble to try to pull off the biggest party of the year.

programme.title: The Funny Dance Show: Pump Up The Ham
programme.desc: Comedians, Jade Catta-Preta and Marcella Arguello face off against Daniel Franzese and Irene Choi in a comedy dance battle to win $10,000 for charity. A boy band rips at each other's hearts while some fly old folks bust a move.

programme.title: Dating: No Filter: Tased and Confused
programme.desc: Military veteran Callahan, who is obsessed with the color blue, may find love with Melissa, an accident-prone hedgehog owner with a big heart. Model Shane, and Alaia, a taser-toting swimsuit fashion designer, spend a glamorous day on a yacht at sea.

programme.title: Dating: No Filter: Naked and in Love?
programme.desc: DJ Alex takes artivist Akemi on her very first date with a woman, keeping her on her toes (and on the ground) at the roller derby rink. Erica takes model Maliachi to a nude drawing class where things start off (and stay) awkward.

programme.title: Dating: No Filter: Love and Suds
programme.desc: Jamison and Gregorio, a self proclaimed 'adorakable bachelor', get wet and wild at the car wash before heading to a romantic picnic under the sunset.

programme.title: Dating: No Filter: Tats for Love
programme.desc: Country girl Alex is looking for a devout man in Elijah, but he may not love Jesus enough to suit her Southern ways. Special effects makeup artist Taylor and bud-tender Lam commemorate their first date by getting sentimental tattoos together.

programme.title: Dating: No Filter: Twerk in Progress
programme.desc: High-spirited cheer instructor Sakoiya is searching for the well-endowed man of her dreams with Mayowa, a musician who has never cheered before. Chris is eager to find a big bootie'd girl he can twerk with.

programme.title: Dating: No Filter: Extra Cheese, Please
programme.desc: Newly fit Joshua takes Govind for a wild romp in the park while they go zorbing. Personal trainer Nathan pays homage to his favorite 80's movie by taking photographer Haley on the perfect pizza making date.

programme.title: The Funny Dance Show: Pump Up The Ham
programme.desc: Comedians, Jade Catta-Preta and Marcella Arguello face off against Daniel Franzese and Irene Choi in a comedy dance battle to win $10,000 for charity. A boy band rips at each other's hearts while some fly old folks bust a move.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Heavy Meddle
programme.desc: Khole tries to mediate a fight between Kourtney and Kendall but only makes things worse. Meanwhile Kris makes herself at home in Kylie's new office space, so Kylie must show her mom who's boss.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Treachery
programme.desc: Khloe deals with some debilitating health issues, but her world is turned upside down when rumors surface of Tristan cheating with a close family friend, Jordyn Woods. Kim's husband brings his family and friends together.

programme.title: In the Room: Kourtney Kardashian
programme.desc: Kourtney Kardashian invites Jason Kennedy over to her house for a raw and real conversation. She talks life in the spotlight, finding a balance as a mom, love, breaking up as well as dishing on her famous siblings.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Aftershock
programme.desc: After Tristan’s shocking betrayal, Kim and Kourtney take Khloe on a getaway to help her cope with the news. Khloe’s anger reaches a boiling point when she learns that Jordyn is speaking publicly about what happened.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Birthdays and Bad News Part 1
programme.desc: Khloe invites her ex to True's first birthday party, but an uncomfortable confrontation in front of family and friends leaves her questioning her decision.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Birthdays and Bad News Part 2
programme.desc: After an uncomfortable confrontation with her ex at True's first birthday, Khloe must figure out how to coexist with her ex for her daughter's sake.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Cruel and Unusual Punishment
programme.desc: Kourtney and Scott approach the family for parenting advice, but some unwelcome input from Corey leads to a blowout argument between him and Scott. Khloe plans a wine-tasting trip to Napa to see how Kylie is handling significant life changes.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Three's Company
programme.desc: Scott feels pressure to make sure both Kourtney and his girlfriend Sofia are happy on a family trip to Finland. When North gets an opportunity to star in a video with one of her idols, Kim worries that her daughter will have performance anxiety.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Have You Met Kim?
programme.desc: Kim gives the world an intimate look into the busiest week of her life as she prepared for the birth of her fourth baby, stars in a music video with Paris Hilton, and heads to the Met Gala. Kourtney finds out someone is stealing from her.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Psalm West
programme.desc: After the birth of her son Psalm, Kim plans a surprise vow renewal ceremony for her husband to celebrate five years of marriage. When Kourtney's friends can't get along on a girl’s trip to Turks and Caicos, she must assert herself.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Ex-Factor
programme.desc: When Khloe's ex-husband Lamar releases a memoir that includes details about their relationship, she considers reconnecting with him for the first time in years. After an old rumour resurfaces, Kris worries that it will spark a fight between her and Khloe.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Rumor Has It
programme.desc: Kris is furious when some slanderous rumors circulate on the 25th anniversary of her best friend's murder. Kim struggles to disconnect from work while on a trip to Costa Rica for her daughter's birthday.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Hard Candy
programme.desc: Kim and Kourtney plan a joint birthday party for their daughters, but a disagreement over candy puts the special day in jeopardy. Kris is concerned about some of Khloe's obsessive behavior and enlists the help of a professional.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Gifted
programme.desc: When Tristan starts showering Khloe with gifts, she worries his grand gestures are an effort to win her back. After Kim and Kourtney learn that people are being sickened by toxic waste in a nearby community, they vow to help.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: You Look Radishing
programme.desc: It's a battle of the South vs. Southwest as Chef Charlie Loomis of Chattanooga faces off against Chef Israel Rivera from Albuquerque, N.M., for a shot at Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Tournament of Champions: Guy at Home Watch Party: Final Eight Revealed

programme.title: Tournament of Champions: A Champion Is Crowned

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout: Sweet Gamble
programme.desc: It's a high-stakes stakeout at Smith's in Las Vegas, Nevada, as the chefs gamble with unsuspecting shoppers' carts to create the best nacho platter. The final two chefs gamble for a sweet and salty win.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout: Sixty-Dollar Butter
programme.desc: Four chefs roll the dice on something sandwiched at Smith's in Las Vegas, Nev. The parking lot goes overseas to Italy before going all in on an indulgent dessert, and one chef's shopper hits the jackpot when they get more than they bargained for.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Houston, TX
programme.desc: Casey two-steps down to Houston, Texas, for some tex-mex tastiness, including a colossal 22-ounce chicken-fried steak and the ultimate spicy challenge: a burger topped with seven of the world's hottest chile peppers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: St. Louis, MO
programme.desc: Casey Webb visits St. Louis, Missouri, in search of the biggest and best the city has to offer. He encounters a four-pound meatball and tackles a New York-style pizza so massive he'll need the help of a partner to take it down.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Los Angeles, California
programme.desc: Casey travels to sunny Los Angeles for some epic eats including a 2.5-pound fusion burrito loaded with every ingredient in the kitchen and drenched in hot sauce 600 times hotter than a jalapeno.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Diego, CA
programme.desc: Casey travels to San Diego to face off against a five and a half pound stack of pancakes layered with bacon, eggs, sausage, country-fried steak and thick-cut ham.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Daytona Beach, Florida
programme.desc: Casey's delicious mission brings him to Daytona Beach, Florida, where he takes on a mammoth three-tier sandwich stacked with two burgers, six pieces of Mahi Mahi, two pieces of Texas toast and a ten-ounce bun.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Wilmington, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary adventures take him to the port city of Wilmington, North Carolina, for a barbecue bonanza, a totally bonkers burrito and a big, bad behemoth in the undefeated Pierogi Team Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charlotte, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb charges into Charlotte, North Carolina, for three takes on Southern specialties. There's a cheesy chicken classic care of Korea, a time-honored institution's signature sandwich and the biggest walking taco in all the Carolinas.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hoboken, New Jersey
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing adventures take him to Hoboken, New Jersey, New York's neighbor to the west and the home of the great Frank Sinatra. He munches on homemade mozzarella and takes a bite out of a bagel behemoth.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Pee Battle
programme.desc: A mother daughter duo’s lovable cats are having a territorial pissing match that's destroying not only their furniture but also their relationship. The cat daddy connects with cat from heaven, Ziggy, who has CPR skills.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Guilt Stricken Guardian

programme.desc: A contractor is desperate to sell his rental property that's a real wreck. When he's tempted to overspend on the renovation, twins Leslie and Lyndsay help steer Jeff toward a more budget-friendly makeover with an eclectic style.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Empty Nest Turned Family Retreat
programme.desc: A dad and his two adult daughters are ready to move on in life, but they're struggling to sell their family home. Leslie and Lyndsay work to transform their dated, 1990s property into a coastal retreat that will attract a brand-new family.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Split-level Struggle
programme.desc: Before a couple can buy their dream home, they must sell their outdated split level, and they're having trouble getting buyers in the door. Lyndsay and Leslie bring the home up to date with sleek, modern touches and minimalist elements.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: No Appeal to Curb Appeal
programme.desc: A couple that's desperate to sell their bungalow after receiving no offers calls on real estate experts and twins Leslie and Lyndsay. The home needs some love to make it sellable, but the stakes are raised when the twins invest money to make improvements.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Better Than New

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Rough Rambler Reno
programme.desc: A young family has outgrown their home, but major exterior issues and a dark interior are keeping it from being sold. Leslie and Lyndsay brighten and repair the outdated rambler, but pricing it right will be difficult with no comps in the neighborhood.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Oh Father, Where Art Thou?

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: Good Grade Hunting

programme.title: Coop & Cami Ask the World: Would You Wrather Live in an Igloo?
programme.desc: Cami and Ollie try to prove that they are responsible enough to choose their own bedtime by moving out of the house and into a giant igloo in their backyard.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Sweet 16-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Karen throws Maddie a curveball about the day she was born, and she and Liv realize planning their sweet 16 party together may be more complicated than expected.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Sleep-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Liv volunteers to supervise Parker's sleepover in hopes of reconnecting with him once she realizes just how much he's grown while she was away. Meanwhile, Maddie and Willow work on a school project, and Joey and Pete go on a road trip to Pastrami Palace.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Dodge-A-Rooney

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Swept Away
programme.desc: A young man from small town Indiana heads to Japan where he falls for a beautiful woman from a land nearly as far away. Then, one of the biggest natural disasters in history hits.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Against All Odds
programme.desc: It was a crime not even police could believe: A toddler was shot in the head and left for dead. Despite the odds, she stunned everyone with her will to survive while a detective vowed to crack this case, no matter how long it took.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Night of the New Moon
programme.desc: Diana Lovejoy and her husband welcomed a baby boy, but then, their marriage crumbled. A bitter custody battle followed. Fearing for her safety, Diane turned to a man skilled in self-defense but, it turns out, someone else was in grave danger.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Women & Dirty John
programme.desc: Debra Newell thought she found Mr. Right but her daughters sensed something wrong about John Meehan. They started digging into his past and their search for answers exposed a dangerous con man.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Capture
programme.desc: Amanda Lindhout was a journalist braving the world's most dangerous hotspots. Then, she became the story. What she endured from her captors was terrifying. Years later they found her again and secret agents put a daring undercover sting into action.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Sting
programme.desc: Newlywed Dalia Dippolito returned home from the gym to the awful news that her husband had been killed. In a case where almost nothing was as it seemed, investigators wanted to know: Was Dalia diabolical or an unwitting pawn in a hoax gone wrong.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Carrollton Plot
programme.desc: This is a story about faith, temptation and secrets. A churchgoing mom was shot at point-blank range in her garage. Saving her would take a miracle and investigators wanted to know if this crime was random or if someone wanted her dead.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Villainous Plan
programme.desc: A bank executive tries to rob his own bank. Investigators think it is an inside job but eventually learn the crime is connected to a spree carried out by men who managed to keep their identities secret, praying on people who did the opposite.

programme.title: Snapped: Donna Scrivo

programme.title: Snapped: Stacey Shoeck

programme.title: The Disappearance of Natalee Holloway: New Lead
programme.desc: Natalee Holloway disappeared from Aruba in May 2005. Her father Dave Holloway, has never stopped looking for her. Dave receives a new lead that could be the key to solving this 12 year old mystery, but he isn't sure he can trust the source.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Natalee Holloway: The Sting
programme.desc: Pursuing a lead that may shed light on his daughter's disappearance, Dave Holloway and a team of investigators dive into a covert operation. The goal: obtain a taped confession, and evidence that could convict his daughter's killer.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Natalee Holloway: The Sting: Day 2
programme.desc: Tensions are high as the sting operation in New Orleans continues. The investigation team is running out of time to obtain the necessary information from the co-conspirator regarding his involvement in the Natalee Holloway case.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Natalee Holloway: Aruba
programme.desc: TJ and his team head to Aruba to begin phase two of their investigation - attempting to obtain DNA evidence from Natalee's alleged burial site. Dave must convince his informant to go the extra mile to ensure the next step of their investigation.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Natalee Holloway: The Burial Site
programme.desc: TJ races to the location that the co-conspirator claims is where he dug up Natalee's remains in 2010. Working with the Aruban authorities, they search for DNA that could lead to convicting those involved in Natalee's disappearance.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Natalee Holloway: The Bones
programme.desc: After two years following this lead, the investigators finally have evidence in hand that could answer the 12 year old mystery of what happened to Natalee Holloway.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: The Deep South
programme.desc: Bear Grylls tackles the deadly swamps of the Deep South, dodging alligators and snakes.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: South Dakota
programme.desc: Bear's latest adventure takes him to South Dakota, home to not one but three of America's most incredible wilderness areas: the Black Hills, the Great Plains, and the inhospitable Badlands.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Oregon
programme.desc: Deep in the Oregon wilderness, Bear takes on Hell's Canyon -- the deepest river canyon in the world. Huge snowdrifts, frozen lakes, burnt out forests, 150-foot cliffs and the frigid white water rapids of the Snake River stand between him and civilization.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Red Rock Country
programme.desc: Bear Grylls is in the red rock country of southern Utah. Armed with only a lasso he descends a rock pinnacle and gets trapped in a narrow gorge. Crossing an arid wilderness, he's left hanging 100 feet above a ravine.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Monterey Bay
programme.desc: Explore the marine ecosystem of the Monterey Bay, California where a giant kelp forest hosts one of the most diverse ecologies in the world.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Yellowstone
programme.desc: In 1985, wolves were released back into Yellowstone National Park. The re-introduction of the predator has set off a cascade of events through the food chain.

programme.title: Wild West: Desert Heartlands
programme.desc: Travel from the cold deserts of Nevada to the giant cactus-studded lands of Arizona and the scorching Mojave Desert in California. Discover how some of America's most iconic animals like mustangs and coyotes have learned to survive.

programme.title: Wild West: The High Country
programme.desc: America's High Country is the last of grizzly bears and giant trees, of frigid winters and scorching summers, of tough ranchers and gold-rush fever. From the Rockies to the Sierra Nevada, survival in this land of extreme seasons demands endurance.

programme.title: Wild West: Restless Shores
programme.desc: Tectonic forces shape all life here, creating stunning landscapes like the San Andreas Fault, reaching north to the Pacific coast. Elephant seals battle it out for mates and grey whales form a unique friendship with a small community of people.

programme.title: Wild Alaska: Spring
programme.desc: As spring lights up the land, Alaska faces the greatest transformation on earth. Temperatures soar, and as the sun hits the snow and ice, water, light and warmth return.

programme.title: Wild Alaska: Summer
programme.desc: The few short weeks of an Alaskan summer must sustain the abundant wildlife for the whole year. No season brings more surprises. There is a predictable wealth of riches, but there is so little time to master the art of survival.

programme.title: Wild Alaska: Winter
programme.desc: The vast mountains, the surrounding oceans and the northerly latitude combine to deliver one of the most extreme winters on the planet.

programme.desc: It's a bull-wrangling, calf-chasing, pig-squealing good week.

programme.title: Outrageous Acts of Science: Crowd Pleasers
programme.desc: We're counting down the top twenty crowd-pleasers, skilled souls who use their science to thrill. We'll see close encounters in the wild, the world's fastest skateboarder, and a trapeze at 300 feet. Strap yourself in for one extreme ride.

programme.title: Outrageous Acts of Science: Very Innovative People
programme.desc: Our experts have an all-access pass to the most innovative people on the web. Celebrate the people that turn creative ideas into reality, from cardboard boats to Jet Ski powered water bikes. If there is a new way of doing it, these VIPs will be first.

programme.title: Outrageous Acts of Science: Like a Boss
programme.desc: Features a record-breaking butt skipper, a woman restraining four motorcycles, and the fastest downhill bike ride ever. These guys reveal the very best of human ingenuity and perseverance by doing it like a boss.

programme.title: How It's Made: Super Speed Boat
programme.desc: The lightweight skiff motorboat commands the seas with impressive lightning-quick speed, and the process to make them requires the latest technology and expert engineering.

programme.title: Mega Machines: Titan of the Mountains
programme.desc: The TRAXX 185 is a heavy-hauling mega train that can transport 1,300 tons of cargo through the world's most treacherous terrain; special inside access reveals the engineering innovations that help this behemoth conquer forbidding mountains.

programme.title: Richard Hammond's Big: Monster Dam
programme.desc: Richard Hammond meets the engineering team that runs one of the biggest dams on earth, a cutting-edge behemoth that uses the latest technology to withstand the weight of 200 million tons of water and power an entire city.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Boston's Big Dig Disaster
programme.desc: Boston's Big Dig was one of the most ambitious engineering projects in history, but in 2006, a fatal collapse in one of its tunnels put the ambitious project in doubt; experts reveal what caused this engineering disaster and how it was fixed.

programme.title: Made by Destruction: Diamonds, Tile, and Cookie Tins
programme.desc: A new way to be immortalized rises out of the ashes when a departed loved one is transformed into a shimmering diamond. Skateboards jump the landfill and hit the wall as a mash up of cool tiles.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?: Coffee, Bricks, Lava Lamps, and Diamonds
programme.desc: Find out how coffee is roasted, how the bricks that built America are built, how lava lamps are made, and how diamonds are mined from an extinct volcano.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?: Turkish Delight, Silver, Sunscreen
programme.desc: On this episode: Turkish delight, silver and sunscreen.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?: Screws, Marmalade and Printed Dresses
programme.desc: This episode includes screws, marmalade and printed dresses.

programme.title: Bermuda Triangle: The New Secrets
programme.desc: Using cutting-edge technology, experts investigate the truth behind the Bermuda triangle.

programme.title: How It's Made: Carbon Fibre, Antique Frame Restoration, Railcar Movers, Hood Ornaments
programme.desc: Carbon fibre; antique frame restoration; railcar movers; hood ornaments.

programme.title: How It's Made: Yogurt, Candles, Neon Signs, Bookbindings
programme.desc: A look at how yogurt is made, how candles are created, how neon signs light up and how book bindings function.

programme.title: How It's Made: Powder Horns; Handcrafted Molds; Pierogies; Inner Tubes
programme.desc: Mark Tewksbury shows viewers how some familiar objects of everyday life are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Amphibious Vehicles, Putters, Model Ships, Wax Crayons
programme.desc: Find out what goes into the construction of amphibious vehicles, golf putters, model ships and wax crayons.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Nazi Treasure Train
programme.desc: A legendary train filled with stolen Nazi gold is said to be hidden in Poland. Using cutting-edge technology, Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns explore deep underneath the earth's surface and in abandoned Nazi tunnels in search for the infamous legend.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: King Solomon's Treasures
programme.desc: Priceless gold and silver artifacts are believed to be in the fabled lost Temple Treasures of Jerusalem and King Solomon's hidden mines. With unprecedented access, Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use the latest technology to search for the legendary treasure.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Quest for the Gold Rush Fortune
programme.desc: Millions of dollars of stolen Gold Rush treasure is rumored to have been stashed in a cave in Northern California. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to search for the legendary treasure.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Texan Mass Extinction
programme.desc: Rob Nelson descends into a cave 30 feet beneath Texas in search of evidence of a mass extinction event. Then, he heads to Lake Michigan to investigate an unexplained, Bermuda Triangle-like phenomenon that has caused ships to disappear for centuries.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Doomsday Volcano Mystery
programme.desc: A massive supervolcano beneath Naples, Italy may be on the verge of erupting again; Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns investigate this disturbing new evidence.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mystery of the Ice Cave
programme.desc: A strange cave freezes in the summer and melts in the winter, and a massive sand dune swallows a small child in an instant. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to investigate these mysteries of the natural world.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Atlantis in America
programme.desc: New theories claim that the legendary sunken city of Atlantis could have actually been in the Americas. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to investigate evidence that might shed more light on one of the world's greatest mysteries.

programme.title: Marcia Clark Investigates The First 48: The Spreckels Mansion Mystery
programme.desc: World famous prosecutor, Marcia Clark, dissects the suspicious death of Rebecca Zahau, girlfriend of multi-millionaire pharmaceutical tycoon, Jonah Shaknai. When Rebecca's body was found, law enforcement determined her death was a suicide.

programme.title: The First 48: The Detective Speaks: Lester Street
programme.desc: Toney and his team respond to Memphis's worst mass murder in more than 15 years.

programme.title: The First 48: Missing Persons: The Graduate
programme.desc: Detectives search for a talented 30-year-old who vanished on his bicycle, just weeks after earning his second Masters degree.

programme.title: The First 48: The Detective Speaks: Broken Home
programme.desc: In New Orleans, a young mother is ambushed at home and shot at close range. Detective Rob Barrere's case depends solely on the eyewitness account of a four-year-old girl and leads to another brutal death.

programme.title: The First 48: Missing Persons: Critical Care
programme.desc: When a caretaker reports her 63-year-old cancer patient missing, detectives research leads to solve the mystery.

programme.title: Marcia Clark Investigates The First 48: Robert Blake
programme.desc: Marcia Clark attempts to uncover the truth behind the unsolved murder of actor Robert Blake's wife, Bonnie Lee Bakley. Determined to find Bakley’s killer, Marcia scrutinizes this twisted Hollywood tale to separate the facts from the fiction.

programme.title: American Justice: Murder on the Boardwalk
programme.desc: Kosta Fotopoulos, a member of the Greek community in Daytona, invents a club for killers, and convinces his lover to kill a drifter so she can join.

programme.title: American Justice: A Model Murder
programme.desc: Police investigate a photographer when a model goes missing after a photo shoot.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Dreams and Nightmares
programme.desc: The first responders deal with a rash of scary calls, including a man suffering from amnesia after getting hit by a car and a woman who fell off a roof.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Stranger Things
programme.desc: A woman tells officers her boyfriend once brought her back to life after she was murdered. A purse snatching suspect stops running to eat some chicken strips, and a tarot card reader gets dehydrated.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: The Candyman
programme.desc: A series of controlled buys leads detectives to the house of a local dealer.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: A River Runs Through It
programme.desc: A woman drives with 60 pounds of dope in her car trunk while her daughter sleeps in the backseat.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: Sister Load
programme.desc: The seizure of 350 pounds of marijuana leads the unit to a similar sister load coming from Mexico.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: The New C
programme.desc: A new informant is willing to give up vital information about dealers in exchange for help with his legal troubles.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: A Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: With a large shipment of heroin about to arrive in Laredo, the LPD team conducts a citywide crackdown of suspected heroin dealers to learn where and when the drugs will arrive.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: Fifty Tons
programme.desc: A local casino's connection to a prostitution ring may give detectives the chance to hurt the cartels.

programme.title: Crime 360: Ashes to Ashes
programme.desc: Cutting edge forensics are used to solve the case of a missing man who is believed to have been murdered by two brothers.

programme.title: Crime 360: Midnight Shootout
programme.desc: A gun battle breaks out in a quiet Cleveland suburb causing chaos for the neighbourhood. In the morning, a young father of two is found dead in his bedroom, and a single bullet may help to catch the killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Shadow of Hope
programme.desc: On December 26th 2011, Hope Melton vanishes after being run off a country road. CCTV footage from a nearby gas station reveals a suspicious orange car that seems to have followed her out of the parking lot.

programme.title: See No Evil: Life After Midnight
programme.desc: In February 2015, the body of 26-year-old Celina Petersen is found dumped in an alley in South Park, Seattle. When police recover surveillance footage from across the neighborhood, they begin to unravel the shocking truth behind her murder.

programme.title: See No Evil: Dead on Reflection
programme.desc: On April 4th, 2014, Kimberly Robertson's battered body is found on a sidewalk after a date with her boyfriend. A network of surveillance cameras plays out Kimberly's last few hours alive. Can CCTV footage help catch her killer?

programme.title: See No Evil: The Lady Vanishes
programme.desc: On November 7, 2014, 69-year old Ina Clare Richardson is found brutally murdered in a public park in Clarkston, Washington. With no witnesses to the crime, investigators turn to surveillance cameras to piece together the puzzle of her fateful final night.

programme.title: See No Evil: No Place Like Home
programme.desc: Young professional Sasha Samsudean comes home from a night out in downtown Orlando and is brutally murdered in her own apartment. Detectives must now turn to video surveillance footage to unravel the mystery and bring a cold-blooded killer to justice.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Witness to Murder
programme.desc: John works with investigators to bring Frank Contreras into custody after he commits a terrible crime witnessed by a child; Cal takes on a heartbreaking case where authorities desperately need the public's help to identify a vicious criminal.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: The Criminal Caregiver
programme.desc: After a vulnerable elderly man is brutalized in his rural home, John joins a thrilling manhunt for Derek Whisenand. And when newlywed bliss turns into a vicious crime, Cal goes boots on the ground on the trail of fugitive Arnoldo Jimenez.

programme.title: See No Evil: No Place Like Home
programme.desc: Young professional Sasha Samsudean comes home from a night out in downtown Orlando and is brutally murdered in her own apartment. Detectives must now turn to video surveillance footage to unravel the mystery and bring a cold-blooded killer to justice.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Witness to Murder
programme.desc: John works with investigators to bring Frank Contreras into custody after he commits a terrible crime witnessed by a child; Cal takes on a heartbreaking case where authorities desperately need the public's help to identify a vicious criminal.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Tragic Entanglement
programme.desc: Luis Frias makes John Walsh's personal most wanted list when Frias allegedly murders his common-law wife in front of their kids. Then, Callahan Walsh explores a bizarre case: Harold 'Butch' Knight leaves clues after confessing to killing his wife.

programme.title: See No Evil: Eye in the Sky
programme.desc: When 27-year-old Christie Wilson disappears after a night at the local casino, surveillance cameras reveal her gambling with a mysterious man. Can this video footage unlock the secrets of what happened next and help bring her home alive?

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Jump Shot
programme.desc: Hollywood 'golden boy' Gavin Smith, a 20th Century Fox executive and former star UCLA basketball player goes missing. For years, his family and detectives search tirelessly for answers, but a group of heartless characters holds fast to their secrets.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Murder Well Done
programme.desc: When 39-year-old Dawn Viens goes missing in 2009, her husband assumes she ran away to escape her problems. But the investigation will lead detectives to a most unexpected killer. They've heard of disposing of a body, but never like this...

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Mommy, Please Come Home
programme.desc: The tiny town of Glendive, Montana is paralyzed with fear when mother of four Susan Casey vanishes. The ensuing investigation leaves everyone to wonder if one of Susan's former flames is harboring a sinister secret - or if someone else is stalking her.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Last Walk to Bad Creek
programme.desc: The discovery of the bullet-riddled bodies of Skyla Whitaker and Taylor Placker in tiny Weleetka, Oklahoma sends the community into a state of panic. If two of Weleetka's most innocent can fall victim to the sadistic killer, no one in town is safe.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: A Place She'd Call Home
programme.desc: Police are baffled when Melissa White is found murdered in the backyard of her Viola, Illinois home. But when investigators take a closer look at Melissa's neighbors, they unearth a secret. Could this be the key to apprehending Melissa's murderer?

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: My Dearest Diary
programme.desc: When Angela and Ashley Hyke go missing one hot summer night and candles are found burning in their home, those close to them know that something is horribly wrong. The key to solving the mystery may lie in Angela's cryptic diary.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Stipps Hill Massacre
programme.desc: Most of the 500 or so folks who call Laurel, Indiana home are either kin or have known each other their whole lives. So when the Napier family is found massacred in their home, residents are terrified that a mass killer lurks somewhere in Laurel's fields.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: No Average Troublemaker
programme.desc: When teenager Bridgett Frisbie sneaks out of her Katy, TX home one night, her parents assume it's just typical teenage rebellion. But the next day, a group of boys find her body in the woods just outside of town.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: All-American Sweethearts
programme.desc: Eighteen-year-old Kelly Eckart disappears one night after finishing up her shift at a local hardware store. Hours later her car is discovered abandoned by the side of the road, still running, but Kelly is nowhere to be found.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Alaskan Temptress
programme.desc: A Washington community is shocked when PTA mom, Mechele Linehan is arrested for murder from a decade earlier in Alaska. Details of a seedy and sordid past emerge. But is this suburban mother a cold-blooded temptress or has she been wrongly accused?

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Jeffrey MacDonald: The Accused
programme.desc: An army surgeon, Jeffrey MacDonald, is the lone survivor of a brutal 1970 home invasion that claims the lives of his wife and daughters. But authorities doubt his story of murderous hippies and believe MacDonald is the culprit.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Killing Field
programme.desc: The parents of a young South Carolina couple are terrified when they go missing in 2016. Detectives find a clue that leads to strange storage container in the middle of 95 acres. What's inside unlocks secrets of a monster hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Vanished
programme.desc: So-Cal surfer and tech entrepreneur, Chris Smith, dreams of making a tidy sum of money and then surfing off into the sunset. It seems his dreams have come true, but all is not as it appears.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Deathbed Confessions
programme.desc: Deathbed confessions have provided a wealth of new evidence to UFO researchers from top intelligence, government and scientific witnesses who were sworn to secrecy in life, but couldn't leave this earth without revealing the truth.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Alien Files
programme.desc: The final edition of the series examines a range of conspiracy theories relating to extra-terrestrials. There are those who believe that we have already made contact with aliens and that world governments are concealing this.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Ancient Astronauts
programme.desc: The idea of ancient astronauts goes back to Swiss author Erich von Daniken, whose books challenged religion and science. Find out who his enemies were, what his influences were, and why he was jailed.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Alien Invasion
programme.desc: With the recent discovery of thousands of earth-like planets in the universe the search for intelligent alien life continues. Some astronomers warn, when we find it, we should be prepared for advanced hostile extra-terrestrial species capable of anything.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Planet X
programme.desc: A look at the giant hidden planet with a gravitational pull so strong that it would literally cause the earth to turn upside down.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Pandemic Pandemonium
programme.desc: History has taught us that when it comes to new viruses, humankind is still vulnerable, despite modern medicine. Meet people who are determined to survive the next global pandemic and the chaos that will ensue.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Biblical Armageddon
programme.desc: Discover the past and future of apocalyptic beliefs, the lengths people will go to ready for the end and the dark side of End Times prophecy.

programme.desc: The final edition of the series examines a range of conspiracy theories relating to extra-terrestrials. There are those who believe that we have already made contact with aliens and that world governments are concealing this.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Helicopters
programme.desc: A superior aerial force changes the stakes of any battle. Take a look at some of the fastest, deadliest attack helicopters soaring over combat zones today.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Fighters
programme.desc: America's fighter planes are renowned as the world's deadliest and most dominant aerial assassins. Explore the top fighters ever, and look at what the future holds.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Guns
programme.desc: The guns used in modern warfare are a terrifying fusion of unparalleled accuracy, range and stopping power. Take an inside look at the most ubiquitous and fundamental assets on the battlefield.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Franz Stangl and Gustav Wagner
programme.desc: See how Nazi hunter Simon Wiesenthal tracked down fugitive war criminal Franz Stangl in Brazil. Stangl was responsible for the murder of over 800,000 people.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Erich Priebke
programme.desc: A half-century after the war, American journalists track down former Gestapo officer Erich Priebke. Priebke, who was responsible for some of Italy's worst atrocities, fled to Argentina after the war.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Adolf Eichmann
programme.desc: This is the hunt for Adolf Eichmann, considered by many to be one of the main architects of the Holocaust.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Paul Touvier
programme.desc: French investigators hunt down Paul Touvier, a pro-Nazi sympathizer who was responsible for murdering both Jews and resistance fighters. This 'Hangman of Lyon' hid himself with the assistance of a right wing group associated with the Catholic Church.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Kurt Lishka
programme.desc: The story of German housewife Beate Klarsfeld and her husband Serge, who helped track down former Paris Gestapo chief Kurt Lishka. Lishka ordered the arrest and murder of over 33,000 Jews yet lived as a free man in Germany for years.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Klaus Barbie
programme.desc: The husband and wife team of Serge and Beate Klarsfeld worked tirelessly to have Nazi war criminal Klaus Barbie extradited from Bolvia to stand trail in France. Barbie, known as 'The Butch of Lyon', was responsible for the deaths of 10,000 French Jews.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Joseph Mengele
programme.desc: Examine how Mossad agents from Israel spent nearly thirty years tracking the notorious Nazi physician Josef Mengele.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Verge of Destruction
programme.desc: We've all heard about the fallout shelters used for refuge during World War II, the deadly firebombing of Tokyo, and the D-Day invasion on the beaches of Normandy but there are more secrets.

programme.desc: Leslie and Kris love the crystal waters of Emerald Isle, North Carolina, and want to buy a beach property there that's big enough for their family of four. They find their perfect space, but it needs sprucing up before they can call it home.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Renovation in South Florida
programme.desc: A couple looks for a beach home to renovate on a budget in South Florida.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Triples Infinity Edge
programme.desc: After saving for years, a couple of former teachers are splurging on the perfect pool for their new house in Austin, Texas. The nature lovers want a great view with sounds of waterfalls and space for family to visit.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Splash of Hawaii
programme.desc: A couple that moved from Hawaii to take care of a family member in Texas wants to recreate their outdoor lanai lifestyle. Justin McGuire and Steve Terry must use everything they have to turn their rocky Austin hilltop into a tropical paradise.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Ranch Pool Resort
programme.desc: Three generations living together on a family ranch in Austin, Texas, are ready to upgrade their old, outdated pool with a large sun shelf, a spa and a waterfall with jumping rocks.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Natural Fit for a Fun Family
programme.desc: After moving to their forever home, a young family from College Grove, TN, is ready to build their dream pool. The Pool Kings accept the challenge, creating a tropical paradise with a massive waterfall, a swim-up bar and an oversized outdoor kitchen.

programme.title: Pool Kings: From Overgrown to Over the Top
programme.desc: A Franklin, Tennessee, family has been living with an unfinished pool for over two years and is in desperate need of a pool rescue. The Pool Kings step in to transform this backyard from a state of chaos to something beyond their wildest dreams.

programme.title: Pool Kings: I'm on Vacation Already
programme.desc: Now that the interior of their dream house is finished, a family of five asks the Pool Kings to transform their neglected backyard. They want a relaxing multi-level private resort with a waterfall grotto, huge spa, swim-up bar and outdoor living room.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Everything But the Trellis
programme.desc: After moving into a lovely Santa Barbara home, that once belonged to a master gardener, this family with little interest in gardening decides to get help. Mike and Jim turn a garden path into a swimming lane, and the flowerbed into a stylish pool house.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Welcome to Fire Island
programme.desc: A North Carolina family is eager to finally have their first pool. Their expansive backyard allows for an over-the-top, resort-style pool, so the crew take on an extensive build with a 30-foot waterfall, lazy river and a sunken fire pit island.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Lap of Luxury
programme.desc: A Tennessee native is building her dream home in Brentwood, but the steep elevation of her new lot poses a challenge for the build. Kyle and Justin create a lavish pool, accented by six fire features, a beautiful vanishing edge and two tanning ledges.

programme.title: Pool Kings: It's Tiki Time
programme.desc: The Pool Kings whip up a Tiki-themed, resort-style pool featuring a custom putting green for the entire family to enjoy.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Hot and Spicy
programme.desc: Things start heating up when Tyler Florence, Ted Allen, Ina Garten, The Neelys and others share their best ever hot and spicy dishes.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chilled Perfection
programme.desc: Food Network Stars discuss their favorite cold and chilled recipes.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Finger-Licking Good
programme.desc: Alex Guarnaschelli joins Michael Symon at one of his favorite Manhattan spots, where they combine a bottomless beer selection with the most high-octane hot dog known to man.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sweet and Smokey
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in his hometown of Cleveland, where a place he went as a kid combines several classic sweets to make a one-of-a-kind dessert burger.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Barbecue Boss of All Sandwiches
programme.desc: In Palm Springs, Calif., Michael Symon sinks his teeth into a meaty stacked sandwich and a beefy ballpark dog. In Oklahoma City, a gas station-turned-burger joint serves a fried apple and brie cheeseburger to fuel the soul.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked, Stuffed and Smothered
programme.desc: In San Diego, Michael Symon devours a delicious dumpling-inspired pork and shrimp burger and an elevated pub food classic. In Shreveport, La., a wood-fired pizza is topped with spicy roast chicken and sweet corn.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Where There's Smoke
programme.desc: Roger Mooking follows the smoke signals to two Texas restaurants. At Bin Tapas Bar in San Antonio, Texas, Roger and Chef Jason Dady cook a giant pan of paella flavored with Thai ingredients and cooked over a wood burning fire.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Monster Meat
programme.desc: Roger Mooking heads to Hoodoo Brown Barbeque in Ridgefield, CT, where owner Cody Sperry serves up monster-sized meaty masterpieces. Cody serves up "outlaw barbeque," a mashup of styles and traditions with smoke pork butts, pork ribs, pork belly and beef.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meaty Marvels
programme.desc: In Palatine, IL, Greg and Kristina create Brazilian-style barbecue at Rockin Rodizio.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat in Music City
programme.desc: Roger Mooking heads to the country music capital Nashville, where chefs are playing meaty tunes. At Urban Grub, Chef Edgar Pendley fans the flames in a massive 18-foot-tall hearth and hangs a wall of house-made andouille sausages and pork ribs.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Montevideo
programme.desc: Andrew digs into the culinary treasures of Uruguay's capital city, Montevideo. He explores this meaty mecca by highlighting their slow-cooked Asado meats, a thin-sliced steak sandwich called chivito, and breaded and fried beef.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Boston
programme.desc: American history is illustrious in Boston, Massachusetts, and here, Andrew explores its legendary cuisine: from New England clam chowder and scrod to the hotel where Boston cream pie and Parker House rolls were invented.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chicago: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern takes a bite of Chicago's humble, hearty and world-renowned food scene. From juicy rib tips to zesty Polish sausages to experimental and edible works of art, Chicago's eats stay true to its roots.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Athens
programme.desc: Athens is the birthplace of many culinary traditions, and Andrew explores the classics: from stuffed grape leaves and spanakopita to moussaka and real Greek yogurt, still made the way folks have done for generations.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Fish and Fowl
programme.desc: In North Bend, Ore., Chef Roger Mooking meets up with Don Ivy, Chief of the Coquille Tribe. Roger and Don roast a school of salmon for a traditional tribal feast.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: All You Can Feast
programme.desc: Roger Mooking goes to Llano Seco Ranch in Chico, Calif., where he and Charlie Thieriot slow roast a 30-pound porchetta. In Sandy, Ore., Rogers meets caterers Jaret Foster and Mona Johnson and assists in roasting mussels.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: The Salt and the Sea
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is spending the day at Jacobsen Salt Co., in Netarts Bay, Oregon, one of the largest producers of handcrafted sea salt in America. Owner Ben Jacobsen takes Roger on a tour of the facility, showing him how to smoke sea salt.

programme.title: Good Eats: Tuna, the Other Red Meat
programme.desc: Grilling on a chimney charcoal started; how to avoid fake soy sauce; rainbow tuna steaks.

programme.title: Good Eats: Artichokes: The Choke Is on You

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Rock 'n' Roll to Red River
programme.desc: Noah Cappe discovers that cheddar chimneys make him twist and shout at Burlington’s Sound of Music Festival and feels right at home at the Red River Valley Fair with the redneck taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hogs and Dogs
programme.desc: Noah Cappe sets sail for The Great Frederick Fair in Maryland, where he goes all in for The Whole Hog, finds his sea legs with The Crabby Dog, rounds out his plate with Cake-a-Dilla and dances for joy with the Hula Boat.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Feast and Fries
programme.desc: At the Paris Fair in Ontario, Canada, Noah Cappe ponders a meat pie poutine. At the Washington County Fair in New York he taps into sugar shack cotton candy.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Funnel Cakes and Fried Fudge
programme.desc: The York Fair in Pennsylvania has been drawing crowds since 1765, and has had 250 years to perfect its carnival eats! Noah decks the halls with a taste of Christmas, goes off on the burger bomb pretzel, and enjoys a fork free chick 'n' waffle.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Legend of the Gobblewonker
programme.desc: The twins embark on a mission to prove that a legendary sea monster exists at the bottom of the local lake. Soos helps them on a boating mission to prove it exists.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Stuck
programme.desc: When Herman tries to do a prank on his own, he ends up trapped inside the school's trophy case. Now it's up to the rest of the gang to get him out without getting caught.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Baby Please
programme.desc: Bailey catches Herman reading her diary and decides to get payback by pranking him.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: School Clubbing
programme.desc: The gang signs up for after school clubs. Bailey joins the 'friends of animals club,' Dusty the 'TV club,' Herman the 'wrestling club' and Chance the 'journalism club.'

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Dino Safari VR
programme.desc: Chance, Herman and Dusty are mesmerized by a new dinosaur virtual reality game which inspires a new set of pranks. Bailey disguises as a mind-melting robot from the future. An unsuspecting camp counselor believe he's discovered a spaceship in the woods.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Dear Me
programme.desc: The kids have to write letters to themselves 20 years in the future. Meanwhile, the gang pulls off hilarious pranks that include a wild skunk scaring a babysitter, and a target who believes a 3-D printer can print real food.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: A Very Vlad Joke
programme.desc: The team tries to teach Bailey's new friend Vlad the art of pulling off a great practical joke, just in time for them to pull off an epic prank involving a teacher's aide, aliens and the military.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: The Earth Gets Mooned
programme.desc: The gang takes part in an annual science competition at school, but they have trouble with their project partners.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: No Debating Bailey
programme.desc: When Drama Drew transfers schools, Ms. Spencer hunts for a replacement debater to face off against him at upcoming the regional championships.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Fallout Shelter
programme.desc: After Dusty embarrasses everyone, Chance considers joining a rival prank show.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Lord of the Gummmy Worms
programme.desc: When the kids are stranded alone in the woods on a school camping trip, Bailey and Chance split into rival groups over their only supply of food: Gummy Worms.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Land Before Swine
programme.desc: When a prehistoric beast snatches Mabel’s beloved pig Waddles, the Pines family must journey to a land trapped in time to rescue him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Irrational Treasure
programme.desc: When Dipper and Mabel discover evidence that the reported town founder is a hoax, they set out to expose the historical coverup and prove Mabel's silliness is not a bad thing.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Prey Date
programme.desc: Hiro and Fred enlist Karmi to find out what Liv Amara is doing to cure Orso Knox, the man who was mysteriously turned into a monster.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Lie Detector
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: All Aboard the Snakeybus
programme.desc: Jacksepticeye cruises around Miami in the Snakeybus, Pokimane goes for her first victory in Brawl Stars, and Markiplier takes his son for a wild ride in Guts N Glory.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Town Where Everyone Was Nice!
programme.desc: Donald reunites with his band, The Three Caballeros, while the family takes in the sites of a Brazilian town with a dark secret.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Donald Duck?!
programme.desc: Donald and Penumbra must break out of a Moon Prison and send a warning to Earth about a looming invasion. Meanwhile, Dewey and Webby uncover a sinister conspiracy targeting their family.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Blendin's Game
programme.desc: Blendin Blandin returns to face off with Dipper and Mabel in a futuristic battle that could trap them forever in time jail.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Spear!
programme.desc: As Della rebuilds her ship, Penumbra becomes convinced Della’s planning an attack. Meanwhile, Donald’s nap keeps getting interrupted by adventure.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Reckoning Ball/ Clubbed
programme.desc: Chip Whistler returns to take revenge on the Greens, but is forced to apologize. Andromeda and Tilly follow Gloria to a club where they must 'cure' her of her amnesia.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Breaking News / Cyberbullies
programme.desc: When Bill grows a huge watermelon, Cricket invites the local news to see the mega melon. Cricket stands up to the cyberbullying of three online gamers known as the Cyber Knights.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: The Owl House: Lost in Language
programme.desc: Luz's pranks at the library lead to unintended consequences.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Sock Opera
programme.desc: In an attempt to impress a local puppeteer, Mabel decides to put on a huge sock puppet rock opera, but her show goes awry when Dipper’s drive to uncover journal secrets leads to a supernatural disaster.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Muira-Horror!
programme.desc: Hiro and Go Go accompany Krei to the woods to deal with Nedd Ludd, however they run into the monster of legend, the Hibagon, along the way.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Mini-Maximum Trouble
programme.desc: When Fred runs into a string of bad luck, Megan reveals to Hiro that she's trying to uncover the true identities of Big Hero 6 for her school's newspaper.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Curse of the Ghost Tree
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Amphibia: Sprig vs. Hop Pop / Girl Time
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Carpet Diem
programme.desc: Mabel finds a way to swap minds with Dipper and the townsfolk, so she uses her new found ability to make a difference in people's lives.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Not What He Seems
programme.desc: Government agents take Stan into custody, making Dipper and Mabel question how much they really know about their Grunkle Stan.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Depths of Cousin Fethry!
programme.desc: Cousin Fethry takes Huey and Dewey on an expedition to an undersea lab where they encounter the weirdest creature at the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Armory of Cornelius Coot
programme.desc: Webby leads the kids in a race against the Beagles to find a secret treasure while hiding a secret of her own. Della is forced to teach Launchpad how to actually fly a plane.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Family Legacy/ Paint Misbehavin'
programme.desc: Gramma tells Cricket and Tilly that there’s treasure buried on their property.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: When Bill learns that Gramma has been purposely creating a frightening reputation around town, he throws a barbeque to befriend the neighbors. Cricket makes a wishing well to cash in on people making wishes.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Abracadabra! Wizard Fafnir!
Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: Fiery Surprises!

programme.desc: DanTDM and friends try not to rage quit while playing one of the hardest games in the world.
