programme.title: Movie: Bohemian Rhapsody
programme.desc: Singer and songwriter Freddie Mercury helps form the band Queen, but at the same time that his flamboyant stage presence and powerful vocals lead the group to new levels of stardom his tumultuous personal life begins to spiral out of control.

programme.title: Movie: Quantum of Solace
programme.desc: Bond and M discover a secret international power network after an assassination attempt on M. Bond, still sore about his lover's murder, goes rogue in search of a global conspiracy and the search for power over smaller countries.

programme.title: Westworld: The Winter Line
programme.desc: Maeve navigates illusory narratives and virtual reality simulations.

programme.title: Westworld: The Absence of Field
programme.desc: The Charlotte host discovers that the world's wealthiest man is striving to take over Delos with the help of a mole in the company.

programme.title: Movie: Alita: Battle Angel
programme.desc: A cyber-doctor finds parts of an abandoned cyborg with its human brain still intact in a trash heap, builds it a new body and treats it like a daughter, but when other cyborgs come to destroy her she finds that she possesses incredible fighting abilities.

programme.title: My Brilliant Friend: The Story of a New Name: Chapter 11: Erasure
programme.desc: Upset that her picture is featured prominently in the new shoe shop Stefano is opening with the Solaras, Lila comes up with a creative solution to deal with the matter and enlists Elena’s help.

programme.title: Westworld: The Absence of Field
programme.desc: The Charlotte host discovers that the world's wealthiest man is striving to take over Delos with the help of a mole in the company.

programme.title: High Maintenance: Solo
programme.desc: When Rocky hears a sneeze through his apartment wall, he falls down a shame spiral, reliving embarrassing moments.

programme.title: Movie: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: After being picked as her best friend's maid of honour, a broke woman tries to bluff her way through the expensive bridesmaid rituals.

programme.title: Movie: American Pie
programme.desc: A group of high-school seniors enter a pact to lose their virginity before graduation.

programme.title: Movie: Intolerable Cruelty
programme.desc: A divorce lawyer meets his match when he falls for the gold-digger he defeated in court.

programme.title: Movie: Moulin Rouge!
programme.desc: A popular courtesan working at the Moulin Rouge falls in love with a poet in 1899 Paris.

programme.title: Movie: Rise of the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: The prequel to the Hollywood classic, Planet of the Apes, begins in San Francisco when man's attempts to push the boundaries of science results in the rise of genetically modified apes who threaten to take over the world.

programme.title: Movie: Casino Royale
programme.desc: On his first mission with 00 status, MI6 operative James Bond must stop Le Chiffre, a banker to the world's terrorist organizations, from winning a high-stakes poker tournament at Casino Royale.

programme.title: Movie: Aquaman
programme.desc: A man learns that he is the half-human, half-Atlantean heir to an undersea kingdom that is ruled by his half-brother who plans to wage a devastating war on the surface world, forcing him to become a leader and challenge his brother for the throne.

programme.title: Movie: The Scheme
programme.desc: Learn about a criminal enterprise that infiltrated college basketball teams and funneled hundreds of thousands of dollars to steer recruits to prominent athletic programs, and led to the arrest of Adidas executives and assistant coaches at colleges.

programme.title: Movie: Little
programme.desc: A woman with a high-pressure career is transformed into a younger version of herself.

programme.title: Movie: Gamer
programme.desc: An online game gives humans to ability to control the lives and actions of other humans. A top player from the game tries to gain back his freedom from other players by killing the creator of the game.

programme.title: Movie: Kill Chain: The Cyber War on America's Elections
programme.desc: Take a chilling look into the security of election technology that reveals how unprotected our voting systems really are. With the integrity of the 2016 election in question, 2020 is also at risk, and malware may already be in place.

programme.title: Westworld: The Absence of Field
programme.desc: The Charlotte host discovers that the world's wealthiest man is striving to take over Delos with the help of a mole in the company.

programme.title: Movie: Crimson Peak
programme.desc: A beautiful young author is whisked away to a mountaintop mansion by a mysterious, yet handsome stranger and his sister. The house holds many deep, dark secrets that soon threaten her very existence.

programme.title: Movie: The Predator
programme.desc: A curious young boy accidentally triggers the return of the galaxy's deadliest hunters to Earth. The genetically upgraded Predators are stinger, faster and more dangerous than before, and it's up to small group of ex-soldiers to stop the invasion.

programme.title: Movie: Thirteen Days
programme.desc: A detailed account of the thirteen days of tension during the 1962 Cuban Missile Crisis.

programme.title: Movie: Big
programme.desc: A boy awakens as a full-grown man but is not ready to face the adult world.

programme.title: Movie: Breakthrough

programme.title: Movie: Bruce Almighty

programme.title: Movie: Head Full of Honey
programme.desc: A grandfather suffering from Alzheimer's disease puts a strain on his son's marriage with his deteriorating condition, but his granddaughter is determined to help him. Without telling her parents, she runs off with her grandfather to Venice.

programme.title: Movie: Alien

programme.title: Movie: She's Funny That Way

programme.title: Movie: Crazy, Stupid, Love.

programme.title: Movie: Hotel Artemis
programme.desc: A hospital for criminals has a strict set of rules that all patients must agree to and follow, including not trying to kill each other, but when a patient arrives carrying property stolen from the nefarious Wolf King the facility comes under siege.

programme.title: Movie: Donnie Brasco

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: A Bullet Runs Through It (Part Two)

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Impact
programme.desc: In an effort to help Sam and Deeks return to work, Hetty calls upon operational psychologist Nate Getz to help them cope with their traumatic experience. Meanwhile, the rest of the NCIS team investigates the murder of a former admiral and a journalist.

programme.title: NCIS: Patriot Down
programme.desc: When a colleague's murder sends shockwaves through the team, Gibbs uncovers a surprising link to the crime.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: We Don't Work Together Anymore

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Disco Bob

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: What Do You Do?

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: What Puts You on That Ledge

programme.desc: With a World Trade conference in Chicago, all members of intelligence are undercover in various protest groups to determine potential threats.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: The Daily Social Distancing Show: April 2, 2020
programme.desc: As the coronavirus keeps millions confined to their homes, Trevor reports on the pandemic from the comfort of his couch, and the World's Fakest News Team weighs in on the crisis from a safe social distance.

programme.title: The Office: Double Date

programme.desc: When the boys help Britney Spears get to the North Pole, they discover the shocking secret behind her popularity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Telltale Tracks
programme.desc: Police found an abandoned car on the highway and assumed the driver had been the victim of a car-jacking. When they find the victim's body, unusual marks on her body lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ghost in the Machine
programme.desc: In May of 1999, a minister's wife died in the bathtub from being unconscious.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Accident or Murder?
programme.desc: Police believed that a husband murdered his wife after they learn that he had taken out a life insurance policy on her shortly before she died. When an investigator recreates the fall, the results are surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Core Evidence
programme.desc: When a 16-month-old baby dies, tests discover e. coli in her system. Eventually the bacteria are traced back to a fruit juice manufacturer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Haunting Vision
programme.desc: A woman who survived a deadly childhood fire sends police a letter charging that her father killed her mother 30 years ago.

programme.title: Forensic Files: With Every Breath
programme.desc: Investigators race to figure out what killed a couple on an Indian reservation in New Mexico, and discover that it was the dried feces of deer mice, which had become airborne and deadly.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: Mom's Deadly Secret
programme.desc: When Colorado soccer mom Paige Birgfeld suddenly vanishes, a small town is left on edge. As cops start to dig for clues, they make a shocking discovery, this devoted mom was living a secret double life.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Killer Snapshot
programme.desc: An amazing new forensic tool turns a cold case around.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Family Tree
programme.desc: After the brutal slaying of a young couple on a road trip, the victims’ families begin receiving disturbing letters.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Call
programme.desc: A respected surgeon in an upscale waterfront apartment community is murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marathon Man
programme.desc: When a man's body is found near the ranch his family owns, his wife claims he went jogging. But police doubt that story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Once Bitten
programme.desc: Ray Krone was known throughout Arizona as the snaggletooth killer. An unusual bite-mark on a murdered woman resulted in his conviction and death sentence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Wet
programme.desc: When one woman's drowning death in Pennsylvania triggers another investigation into a woman's eerily similar death in North Carolina, medical examiners must determine if the women drowned or were in fact murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Vows
programme.desc: Some of the refugees who sought asylum in the United States after World War II lied about the atrocities in which they’d participated. Years later, a high-ranking religious figure is suspected of war crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Knowledge
programme.desc: A police investigation reveals details about a missing woman's past that no one suspected: She was a student by day and a $100-an-hour call-girl by night. Her many clients were all suspects in her disappearance, as was her boyfriend.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Promises
programme.desc: A tape recorded by a popular gym teacher before his own death tells the true story of his strange marriage and his wife's insatiable greed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Time Will Tell
programme.desc: A Canadian financier assumes the name of a co-worker as part of a money-laundering scheme. The man turns up dead in the ocean, with an anchor tied around his torso.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bitter Pill to Swallow
programme.desc: A pregnant woman experiences severe morning sickness and suspects something is amiss.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sip of Sins
programme.desc: Faryion Wardrip seemed like the model citizen to most, but he was also a brutal serial killer who, for years, eluded police without suspicion. But smart police work and DNA from a discarded paper cup proved to be Wardrip's undoing.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Web of Lies
programme.desc: The shooting of a newspaper carrier in rural Mississippi lands 20-year-old Marlon Howell on death row. Convicted on the word of two co-defendants and the identification of an eyewitness with a checkered past, Marlon maintains his innocence.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Snitch Work
programme.desc: A 4-year-old girl is found murdered, her body placed in a TV box. Years later, a neighbour is arrested for the crime. When an author seeking to write about the death penalty comes across the case, he finds an investigation filled with holes.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Love Kills
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Stacey Stites' body is found half-naked by the side of the road, her fiancé, police officer Jimmy Fennell, is cleared as a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Family Tree
programme.desc: After the brutal slaying of a young couple on a road trip, the victims’ families begin receiving disturbing letters.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Southside Strangler
programme.desc: Learn how investigators caught Timothy Wilson Spencer, better known as the Southside Strangler, a serial killer responsible for the murders of five women in Virginia. This was the first use of DNA profiling in the U.S. justice system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Memories
programme.desc: A pregnant woman is brutally attacked in her own home and her unborn child is killed. After coming out of her coma, and regaining her memory, she identifies her husband as the perpetrator. A new DNA test lead investigators to a different suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Evidence
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Second Shot at Love
programme.desc: A respected heart surgeon is found dead in the basement of his upscale Cincinnati home and have police assuming he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Journey to Justice
programme.desc: Prosecutor used video testimony to link drunk driver to hit-and-run which killed a child.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scout's Honor
programme.desc: Police determine that the human remains found in a discarded box belong to one Edna Posey. But to find out whether the man accused of the crime is guilty, investigators turn to insects and the forensic entomologist who can interpret their behavior.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Touching Recollection
programme.desc: An eighteen-year-old girl is abducted at gunpoint from her home in Jackson, Ohio. Fortunately the victim returns hours later, and police hope the tire impressions and shoe prints at the crime scene will enable them to find the perpetrator.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Buoy Cleaner
programme.desc: Mike Rowe learns how to make shingles in Oregon and clean buoys with a Coast Guard.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Steel Mill Worker
programme.desc: Mike works with a river barge demolition team then melts down the scrap steel into molten metal.

programme.title: Rob Riggle Global Investigator: Quest for Truth: The Atlantis Case
programme.desc: With added facts and bonus content: Rob Riggle picks up where experts and archeologists have left off while trying to pinpoint the location of the lost city of Atlantis.

programme.title: Rob Riggle Global Investigator: Quest for Truth: The Holiest of Grails
programme.desc: With added facts and bonus content: Rob follows in the footsteps of the Knights Templar to unearth new evidence surrounding the one of the greatest global mysteries, the holy grail.

programme.title: Rob Riggle: Global Investigator: Pirate Booty
programme.desc: With a shovel and a Daiquiri, Rob sets out to solve a 300-year-old pirate mystery in the Florida Keys.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Time to 'Shine
programme.desc: Moonshiners Jeff and Mark and partners Josh and Bill hit the ground running. Meanwhile, veteran shiner Tim Smith will make a life-changing move, and Tickle is forced to realize that his time to shine has just begun.

programme.title: Moonshiners: A Shiner in Kentucky
programme.desc: Mark and Jeff clear their remote North Carolina still site, while an argument between Josh and Bill threatens to destroy their partnership. Tim has a tough time adjusting to moonshining in a legal Kentucky distillery, and Tickle takes a road trip.

programme.title: Rob Riggle Global Investigator: Quest for Truth: The Holiest of Grails
programme.desc: With added facts and bonus content: Rob follows in the footsteps of the Knights Templar to unearth new evidence surrounding the one of the greatest global mysteries, the holy grail.

programme.title: Rob Riggle: Global Investigator: Pirate Booty
programme.desc: With a shovel and a Daiquiri, Rob sets out to solve a 300-year-old pirate mystery in the Florida Keys.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Secret Backwoods Recipes
programme.desc: Only a handful of moonshine recipes are considered among the best, but the path to perfection is always paved with spills.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Whiskey Business
programme.desc: Each year, dozens of US craft distilleries fail, and Tim Smith knows why. In this episode, Tim and his team of experts help struggling owners of Missouri Ridge Distillery 'put the woods back in the whiskey,' in hopes of turning it from problem to profit.

programme.title: Engineering the Impossible: Rome
programme.desc: A team of experts probes the mysteries of the Roman Colosseum, the world's most infamous arena, and perhaps the most elaborate death machine ever devised.

programme.title: American Chopper: LUGZ Bike 2
programme.desc: The crew hits their stride as they complete their boot-themed bike for the Lugz Footwear Company.

programme.title: American Chopper: Senior vs. Junior II
programme.desc: It's old school vs. new school as they continue the competition between the boys.

programme.title: American Chopper: EDS/Byron Nelson Championship Bike 2
programme.desc: OCC's triple build continues, as the crew enters the final phase on the three EDS and Byron Nelson Championship Bikes. Last minute delays with chrome threaten to stall progress, and have Sr. looking for some straight answers.

programme.title: American Chopper: Silver State Choppers' Chopper 2
programme.desc: OCC's rotors spin at full speed as work on the custom chopper for Silver State Helicopters continues. As assembly gets underway, Jr, Mikey and Vin go airborne, and take some flight lessons.

programme.title: American Chopper: Army National Guard 2
programme.desc: OCC marches forward with the Army National Guard Patriot Bike. With assembly looming, an eager Jason Pohl has the opportunity to advance his training but his ignorance of shop rules causes tension in the team.

programme.title: American Chopper: Gander Mountain 2
programme.desc: The crew work on a street bike/motor cross hybrid for Gander Mountain. While in Brazil, the Teutuls are invited to the Presidential Palace.

programme.title: American Chopper: Craftsman/ Die Hard 2
programme.desc: OCC continues on their latest double build: custom bikes for Craftsman Tools and Die Hard Batteries. Both teams race into assembly and the rivalry between Senior and Jr. heats up.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Vanishing Gold
programme.desc: Tensions and suspicions mount when the crew is failing to see the gold they know they should be capturing. A deeper look in the gold room leads to an incredible revelation that eases the team's fears and gets them back on track.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Gold Will Surrender
programme.desc: Dave's crew is hunting for better ground and behind on their gold target. To turn their season around, Dave calls on a mining legend for help searching for gold at the historic Birdseye mine in Montana.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Back on Gold
programme.desc: Dave Turin and his crew turn their trommel up to double speed hoping to get the most gold from Montana's historic Birdseye mine. Dirty water and ground that's not producing challenge the crew, forcing Dave to call an audible at the last minute.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Boundary Blowout
programme.desc: On the scent of big gold, Turin and his crew test the limits of the landowner's patience when they cut a fence to access ground on his cattle grazing land. Dave investigates another promising hard rock mine.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Adventures in Pimplepopping
programme.desc: Inoke has a huge, possibly life-threatening bulge on his shoulder. Delano returns with his back lump after Dr. Lee removed a liter of fluid from it. Reed has hundreds of bumps on his chest that burst and leave nasty scars.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Eggs Lipoma
programme.desc: David is back to see Dr. Lee after she spotted a suspicious growth under his eye. Nicole is depressed because of the bumps all over her neck. Steve has a noticeable lump on his forehead. Allen has a growth on his bicep but is terrified of doctors.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Sleepless in Steatocystoma
programme.desc: Jen has substantial growths on her ears that cause her depression, pain, and vertigo. Juliet is under emotional distress because of the bumps all over her neck and chest. Gerald has a mysterious, kiwi-size lump on his middle finger.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The Incredible Shrinking Lipoma
programme.desc: Gerald is back to see Dr. Lee and a hand specialist about a huge, intrusive bump on his middle finger. Vinnie has a large, embarrassing birthmark on his neck. Leta has a lump on the back of her thigh.

programme.title: Save My Skin: A Wrinkle in Palm
programme.desc: David and Callum's lumps give Dr. Emma cause for concern, Sofie worries that her skin condition will derail her swimming ambitions, Katerina prays that her acne will clear up so she can pursue modeling and Jordan's scalp is strewn with Pilar cysts.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Supersized: Seana's Story
programme.desc: Seana is 23 and nearly 700 lbs, living at her mom's house. She is depressed and anxious and her weight-gain threatens to take her last breath. Dr. Now can give her the tools she needs to live, but until she chooses life, no one can save Seana but Seana.

programme.desc: Gerald is back to see Dr. Lee and a hand specialist about a huge, intrusive bump on his middle finger. Vinnie has a large, embarrassing birthmark on his neck. Leta has a lump on the back of her thigh.

programme.desc: David and Callum's lumps give Dr. Emma cause for concern, Sofie worries that her skin condition will derail her swimming ambitions, Katerina prays that her acne will clear up so she can pursue modeling and Jordan's scalp is strewn with Pilar cysts.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Backed into a Corner
programme.desc: Ashley and Jay elope in Vegas. Colt and Larissa argue in front of friends. Steven applies for Richie's American passport. Leida meets with Eric's ex-wife. Jon upsets Fernanda. Kalani and Asuelu get news that changes everything.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: Time to Go Wild
programme.desc: Amy shocks the kids when she heads out on a date with the new man in her life on a motorcycle. Meanwhile, Amy feels Matt's frivolous spending habits for farm toys are getting out of hand, and Zach takes on his biggest home improvement project yet.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: Are You Dating?
programme.desc: Zach and Jeremy confront Amy about her dating life. Tired of his living situation, Matt dreams up something big for the farm while Amy plans a birthday boat ride with friends. And Jeremy surprises Audrey for their second anniversary.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: I Just Tinkled
programme.desc: Jonah's grades are slipping and Anna would rather do hair and makeup than go to college. Amber and Trent arrange a college tour to motivate Jonah and suggest Anna job shadow at a salon to show her the big issues facing a little person in the workplace.

programme.title: Lottery Changed My Life: Island Dreamers
programme.desc: A group from Michigan won 12.7 million dollars that provided the independence they always dreamed of. A doctor finds herself in a series of life-threatening events after winning 56 million dollars.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Panda-monium
programme.desc: The Zoo says goodbye to beloved pandas Bai-Yun and Xiao Liwu as mother and cub prepare to return to China. Tembo the retired 'Hollywood' elephant tries traditional Chinese medicine for her arthritis. The Butterfly Jungle gets colored for the season.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Mek Comes Home
programme.desc: After six years away, Mek the tiger returns to the Zoo. Two shy tree kangaroos, Spike and Polly, meet for the first time. And, with the Children's Zoo under construction, the keepers have to move over 100 animals, including a herd of reluctant goats.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Mkhaya Discovers Her Trunk
programme.desc: Mkhaya, the youngest baby elephant in the Safari Park herd, learns to use her trunk. Will Alba the Andean bear become a first-time mom? Zoo vets examine Mandazzi the gorilla, and Jeff the snake chaser looks for he elusive costal patch nose snake.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Penguin Chick Swim School
programme.desc: Safari Park keepers say goodbye to two elephant brothers. We find out if the San Diego Zoo vets can design a custom shoe for Felix, an excitable three-toed baird's tapir. Then, two African Penguin chicks grow up and get ready to join the colony.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: A Lion's Tale
programme.desc: Safari Park keepers prepare Aria the rambunctious black rhino for her new life on the open African Plains exhibit. Zoo staff cares for 15-year-old legend M'bari the lion and his mate, Etosha. A vulture chick learns to eat from a surrogate puppet.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Yeti and the Cubs
programme.desc: There will be no peace in the world for the hamadryas baboons until Impo finds his mate. Luckily, the San Diego Zoo keepers have a plan. Two young cheetah cubs are training to become animal ambassadors with the help of their experienced canine guide.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: New Day for an Old Tortoise
programme.desc: Hunter the koala is ready for a mate. Jaws the Galápagos tortoise isn't feeling well and the zoo staff works to bring him out of his shell. The Safari Park has not one but two baby giraffe calves that need to be hand-reared simultaneously.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Miracle Calf
programme.desc: Southern white rhino Victoria is pregnant with a calf that could be a key in saving a species from extinction. Connor the Malayan tiger has tooth trouble. A new bird keeper learns to feed the shoebill. Polar bears use their hunting skills on live prey.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Cooking for 7,000
programme.desc: We take a fascinating behind-the-scenes look at what it takes to feed over 6,000 animals, seven days a week, 365 days a year at the San Diego Zoo and Safari Park.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Welcome to Our World
programme.desc: A baby klipspringer is born on one of the coldest nights of the season and is miraculously nursed back to health. The California condor team at the Safari Park goes to unbelievable lengths to save this highly endangered species.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Panda-monium
programme.desc: The Zoo says goodbye to beloved pandas Bai-Yun and Xiao Liwu as mother and cub prepare to return to China. Tembo the retired 'Hollywood' elephant tries traditional Chinese medicine for her arthritis. The Butterfly Jungle gets colored for the season.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Penguin Chick Swim School
programme.desc: Safari Park keepers say goodbye to two elephant brothers. We find out if the San Diego Zoo vets can design a custom shoe for Felix, an excitable three-toed baird's tapir. Then, two African Penguin chicks grow up and get ready to join the colony.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: A Lion's Tale
programme.desc: Safari Park keepers prepare Aria the rambunctious black rhino for her new life on the open African Plains exhibit. Zoo staff cares for 15-year-old legend M'bari the lion and his mate, Etosha. A vulture chick learns to eat from a surrogate puppet.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Lady Boss Lemur
programme.desc: Chester's bachelor pad of lemurs is about to be in for a shock with a female on her way. Lemur females are dominant, so their peaceful existence may come to an end. A novice zebra starts to make a play for power, which isn't to zebra Florence's liking.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: O Come All Ye Mongoose
programme.desc: Keeper hope that dwarf mongoose couple, Cooper and Mini, may deliver some new babies in time for Christmas, but it's not an easy ride.

programme.title: The Zoo: Higher Purpose
programme.desc: Two adorable tiger cubs have outgrown their keepers and need to move to the adult exhibit. A silverback gorilla receives pioneering treatment to curb his worsening eyesight. And a passionate keeper plays matchmaker to a peculiar pair of birds.

programme.title: The Zoo: Moving Day
programme.desc: The Zoo's huge male sea lion is in rut, and staff need to move the younger males before he comes territorial. The veterinary team come up with an ingenious solution to repair Dinky the Flamingo's broken ankle. And feeding a rock python proves challenging.

programme.title: The Zoo: Handle With Care
programme.desc: A tomistoma, a freshwater crocodilian, stops laying eggs and a team of keepers scrambles to treat her. The veterinary team has to rescue a baby antelope that isn't getting the care it needs from its mother. And Mert the Goose takes a field trip.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: The birth of a little blue penguin becomes causes a sensation at the Bronx Zoo. The veterinary team scrambles to figure out what is wrong with Snowball, a snow leopard. And the exhibits team designs an exhibit for the newly arrived blue iguana.

programme.title: The Zoo: Birds and the Bees
programme.desc: Leo, a snow leopard rescued from Pakistan, is having trouble eating because of a broken canine. The bird department works feverishly to restore a beehive for the bee-eater birds. Ambassador Center staff work with an adorable fennec fox named Charlie.

programme.title: The Zoo: Walk on the Wild Side
programme.desc: The future of the American bison depends on a high-stakes race across the country. The reptile staff have their hands full with a diamond rattlesnake that needs to be medicated orally. A pair of cheetahs is trained to walk the grounds of the zoo.

programme.title: The Zoo: Love Shack
programme.desc: To help love bloom between two kiwis, zoo staff build an elaborate hut into which they introduce a pair of potential mates. When a king cobra arrives at the zoo, keepers have their hands full training him to move from the exhibit to a holding pen.

programme.title: The Zoo: Back to Africa
programme.desc: Zoo staff make the journey to east Africa to return to the wild thousands of toads they helped rescue from extinction. Utu, the test-pilot giraffe, tries out a new piece of equipment. And the bird department works to save the lives of millions of birds.

programme.title: The Zoo: Miracle Cub
programme.desc: The ingenuity of zoo staff is put to the test as they devise a treatment for a newborn snow leopard cub struggling to walk and a group of surprisingly adorable Rodrigues fruit bats are trained for a big move.

programme.title: Movie: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: After she escapes from her abusive husband, a woman takes on a new identity and begins a new life. Just as she's starting to trust and love again, though, her husband tracks her down and the nightmare that she'd escape begins all over again.

programme.title: Movie: We Belong Together
programme.desc: An obessed woman goes to terrifying lengths to keep a man from re-uniting with his former wife.

programme.title: Movie: Barbershop
programme.desc: An eccentric assortment of characters share their stories in a barbershop in Chicago.

programme.title: Martin: Forever Sheneneh
programme.desc: Sheneneh wins a date with Christopher Reid on Martin's radio show.

programme.title: Martin: I'm Not Your Superwoman
programme.desc: When Martin is sick with the flu, Gina stays home to take care of him.

programme.title: Martin: Woman With a Past
programme.desc: After he finds out that a recent radio guest once dated Gina, Martin becomes jealous.

programme.title: Martin: The Parents Are Coming
programme.desc: Gina wants Martin to meet her conservative parents, but Martin feels uneasy. Wanting to make a good first impression, he takes advice from Tommy and Cole.

programme.title: Martin: Three Men and a Mouse
programme.desc: When Gina is at Martin's house sleeping, she hears noises in the middle of the night. Thinking it's a robber, she begs Martin to check it out. Martin discovers that it's a mouse.

programme.title: Martin: The Great Payne Robbery
programme.desc: When Martin's neighbor is robbed, Martin holds a neighborhood crime watch meeting.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Papa's Got a Brand New Excuse
programme.desc: Philip and Vivian are unable to forgive Will's father for abandoning Will and his mother.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: For Sale by Owner
programme.desc: The Banks family is offered a large sum of money by a client who wants to buy their house.

programme.title: The Parkers: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: Nikki's dad is caught with Andell's mom, while Allen returns to Kim a changed man.

programme.title: The Parkers: Dead Clown Walking
programme.desc: A plan to lift Nikki's birthday blues by hiring a clown to appear at her party goes awry.

programme.title: The Parkers: The Hold Up

programme.desc: Nikki tries to find an antidote when her daughter and friends try a Jamaican love potion.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Philadelphia Story
programme.desc: While vacationing in Will's hometown, the Banks family learns a secret about Will.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Client

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: What's Will Got to Do With It?

programme.desc: Will gets into a brawl with Dougie the Whale in front of a group of young children.

programme.title: The Parkers: A Sterling Relationship
programme.desc: Kim writes a gossip column for the school paper; Prof. Oglevee's pompous brother visits.

programme.title: The Parkers: Amazing Grace
programme.desc: The pressure of preparing for a gospel music festival has Nikki feeling a little stressed.

programme.title: The Parkers: That's What Friends Are For
programme.desc: Nikki is goaded into club-hopping by her friend Flo, despite the fact that it's exam time.

programme.title: The Parkers: Join the Club
programme.desc: Kim tries to be a friend to Regina so Nikki can stir up catering business at a book club.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Dozens
programme.desc: Dre schools Andre Jr. in the art of 'playing the dozens,' trash talking someone into submission, after he's intimidated by a bully at school, but he succeeds a little too well with his plan; Diane develops a fear of the dark.

programme.title: Black-ish: Parental Guidance
programme.desc: Dre, determined to make up for the no-frills, last-minute wedding he and Bow had, organizes an amazing vow renewal for their 15th anniversary, but when Bow's hippie-dippy parents show up unannounced, bombshells are dropped and old disagreements re-ignite.

programme.title: Black-ish: 30 Something
programme.desc: Dre hurts himself playing basketball right before his 40th birthday. He hands the planning over to his much younger assistant fearing he really is getting too old to be cool. Bow and Ruby face off over who gets Dre the best gift.

programme.title: Black-ish: Sex, Lies and Vasectomies
programme.desc: Bow learns from her colleague that Dre never had the vasectomy a few years back that was supposedly scheduled, so she decides to see if he’ll come clean and tell the truth.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Real World
programme.desc: When Bow reconnects with her college friends on Facebook, she invites them over for an elaborate dinner party and tries to impress them. On the night of the party, Dre ends up learning a lot of new information about Bow's past.

programme.title: Black-ish: Switch Hitting
programme.desc: When super cool and white exec Jay Sloane challenges Dre over his street cred and picks inept Charlie for a big urban market account, Dre finds himself questioning his 'blackness.' Pops gets a letter from the IRS and fears the worst.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Peer-ent Trap
programme.desc: Teenager Zoey goes through a mini-rebellion phase by pushing boundaries and acting out. Dre wants to lay down the law while Bow insists on a softer approach like her mom did with her.

programme.title: Black-ish: Please Don't Ask, Please Don't Tell
programme.desc: Dre's sister, Rhonda, is in town for Mother's Day. Although she hasn't come out to the family, everyone knows she's gay except Ruby and Bow thinks Dre should tell her the truth.

programme.title: Black-ish: Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: Liberals Dre and Bow go ballistic when Junior declares he's joined the Young Republican Club to impress a girl (ironically named Hillary). Meanwhile, everyone teases Zoey when she finds out she needs glasses.

programme.title: Black-ish: Pops' Pops' Pops
programme.desc: Jack and Diane look for clues about their roots for their class assignment, a history of the Johnson family. When they can't find anything out about the family's past, Pops comes to the rescue with the colourful story.

programme.title: Movie: The Goonies
programme.desc: When a group of children stumble upon a treasure map, they embark on a harrowing mission to recover the treasure of a notorious 17th century pirate.

programme.title: Movie: Pitch Black
programme.desc: Marooned space travelers struggle for survival on a seemingly lifeless sun-scorched world.

programme.title: Movie: John Wick
programme.desc: An ex-hit man awakens one night to find his home invaded by members of the Russian mob, who beat him, steal his car and kill his beloved dog. With the most important thing in his life taken away from him, he comes out of retirement to exact vengeance.

programme.title: Movie: Looper
programme.desc: In the year 2044, a man working for a group of killers is sent back in time for a job only to realize his victim is himself.

programme.title: Movie: Saw III
programme.desc: A doctor is kidnapped and forced to keep a cancer-ridden serial killer alive while he plays a deadly game with his next victim.

programme.title: Vagrant Queen: A Royal Ass-Kicking
programme.desc: Former queen Elida is cornered by her nemesis. An old friend comes to her aid, delivering big news.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Black Leather Jackets
programme.desc: When three leather-jacketed motorcyclists take refuge in an abandoned house, the people of a small town don't suspect them to be of any harm. Yet little do they know, the three boys are the vanguard of invaders from another planet.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: From Agnes With Love
programme.desc: When a computer geek falls in love with his secretary his computer, Agnes, begins to give him romantic advice. Unknowingly, the man may be set up by his computer, which operates on a scheme of its own.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Pilot
programme.desc: Gil Grissom is the supervisor of the graveyard shift of Las Vegas' elite crime scene investigators. Holly Gribbs, fresh out of the academy, joins the team. Jim Brass is the head of the unit and is trying to scare Gibbs from CSI.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Cool Change
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the Gribbs shooting, Brass is sent back to homicide. Grissom is made head of the CSI unit. He brings Sara Sidel from San Francisco to investigate the shooting. This irritates Catherine who wants to solve the case.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Crate n' Burial
programme.desc: Grissom, Nick and Sara search for a kidnapped woman and find more than they expected. Catherine and Warrick investigate the hit and run death of a little girl.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Pledging Mr. Johnson
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine investigate when a leg is found severed from a body in a lake. They suspect the husband and boyfriend. Meanwhile, Sara and Nick investigate a fraternity pledging gone terribly wrong.

programme.title: Movie: #FollowFriday
programme.desc: A serial killer targets college students and faculty using social media.

programme.title: Movie: Looper
programme.desc: In the year 2044, a man working for a group of killers is sent back in time for a job only to realize his victim is himself.

programme.title: Movie: Pitch Black
programme.desc: Marooned space travelers struggle for survival on a seemingly lifeless sun-scorched world.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab: House of Horrors
programme.desc: Alison and Donovan take their chances on a split-level home that is full of disasters. Faced with numerous setbacks, they must put their differences aside to turn the nightmare into a dream home for potential buyers.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab: Skyline Penthouse
programme.desc: Alison and Donovan take on a penthouse with the potential for some serious profit. However, what seems like an easy renovation quickly goes off the rails when an inexperienced superintendent tries to hide his shoddy work.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab: Roof-raising Race for Space
programme.desc: Alison and Donovan are back in Chicago's Bucktown neighbourhood, where they find a Civil War-era house on a corner lot with only 1,200 square feet of living space.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Midcentury Markup
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina outbid other investors on a Santa Ana, CA, home with mid-century architectural details that could sell for top dollar.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Switching Rooms
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are contacted by a homeowner wanting to sell a four-bedroom home in Garden Grove, California. Knowing the high returns for the area they decide to go for it, but they find the layout strange and question its four bedrooms.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Shared Driveways and Slim Margins
programme.desc: A couple wants to quit their day jobs in hopes of earning a massive return on a dilapidated Los Angeles Craftsman. A shared driveway and stress from a hard-money loan complicate the flip, and the couple calls on Tarek El Moussa to get it back on track.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Risky Business: Unpermitted Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina flip a home in Rowland Heights, CA, that's jam-packed with issues. There's a large pool in a small backyard, and unexpected additions create problems they've never seen before.

programme.title: House Hunters: Financially Free in Atlanta
programme.desc: A newlywed couple looks to purchase their first home together in Atlanta. She's always wanted to own a single-family home, but he's looking for a multi-family investment property so they can build wealth.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Rest and Relaxation in St. Thomas
programme.desc: A busy couple that has spent much of the year on the road is finally able to work remotely and seizes the opportunity to live on St. Thomas, US Virgin Islands. They're competitive in nature, so compromising will be a challenge.

programme.title: Hawaii Hunters: Moving Mountains
programme.desc: Childhood sweethearts Jennifer and Daniel are taking a big leap of faith by moving their family of six from Wisconsin to Hawaii. No small task, but they are determined to find a practical family home that still feels like a tropical paradise.

programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead from their friend and investor, Pete, on a house he's recently purchased. It's situated in an upscale, gated neighbourhood and it's a house Pete can't tackle on his own.

programme.desc: Tarek and Christina head to La Habra, California to check out an enticing off-market listing. The home is typical for the area and appears to need only cosmetic updating.

programme.desc: Justin and Leah are head over heels in love with each other and the outdoor lifestyle they both enjoy. After relocating from sun-kissed Hawaii, they're ready to put roots down where they first fell in love with the great outdoors: Iowa.

programme.title: Log Cabin Living: North Carolina Mountain Escape
programme.desc: Empty Nesters Derrell and Terri Watts are dreaming of the ultimate log cabin escape near Bryson City, North Carolina. They want a two bedroom rustic cabin with a stacked stone fireplace, mountain views, and luxury finishes.

programme.title: Log Cabin Living: A Young Couple Goes West for New Life and New Cabin in Colorado's Front Range Mountains
programme.desc: Justin and Ashley are leaving behind their congested urban New Jersey lives for a home in Colorado's spacious Front Range Mountains.

programme.title: Log Cabin Living: A Cabin With a Colorado View
programme.desc: Given an opportunity to relocate to Denver, Nelson and Tracee Quinnell jump at the chance to leave Texas behind. After years of moving around the country, they've finally found a place they can set their roots down.

programme.title: Log Cabin Living: Mountain Home Escape to Blue Ridge
programme.desc: Keith and Laura Hildebrandt find refuge from the commotion of their busy lives by escaping with their kids to the mountains of Northern Georgia.

programme.desc: Karl and Kelley are looking for a log cabin retreat in the Rockies where their family can enjoy the great outdoors.

programme.title: Log Cabin Living: Gallatin Canyon Cabin With a River View
programme.desc: A young Montana couple is on the hunt for a log cabin on the river in Gallatin Canyon.

programme.title: Log Cabin Living: Wisconsin Weekend Getaway

programme.title: Log Cabin Living: Indiana Private Paradise

programme.desc: Tired of the city, a couple is looking to move from mid-town Tulsa, Oklahoma, to the countryside so that they can be closer to the outdoor activities they love.

programme.desc: A couple and their two sons that love to experience the outdoors are ready to ditch Atlanta's skyscrapers for the beautiful mountains of north Georgia.

programme.desc: A Houston, Texas couple looks for a spacious, rustic home in Colorado to raise their kids without the hustle and bustle of a big city.

programme.title: Log Cabin Living: Washington Log Home Hunt
programme.desc: An outdoorsy Seattle couple wants to escape their busy city life and move to a log cabin in a quiet, peaceful setting. They'd like a body of water on the property as well as a shop for their glassblowing studio.

programme.title: Log Cabin Living: Taking Time to Relax
programme.desc: A house-flipping couple from middle Tennessee is looking to escape the city and set down roots in the log cabin of their dreams. They want a place they can enjoy the quite while remaining close enough to the music scene in Nashville.

programme.title: Log Cabin Living: Getting Closer to Family
programme.desc: A California couple wants to find a new home closer to her Nebraska hometown. After discovering Evergreen, Colorado, and all its recreational opportunities, the couple and their three kids are ready to find their forever cabin.

programme.title: Log Cabin Living: A New Life In Washington
programme.desc: A recently engaged couple is moving from Missouri to Washington to start their new life together. They want a cabin that has a short commute to Spokane for work and is close to outdoor activities so they can be active with their dogs.

programme.desc: An active couple wants to ditch the city and get back to nature with a rustic log cabin retreat outside of Boston. The first-time homebuyers want plenty of room for a dog and easy access to their favorite outdoor activities.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Back in the NY Groove

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: The Ultimate Ultimatum

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Grilling Me Softly

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Un Petit Hangover

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Broadsiding Lincoln
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars are presented with one of the most sought after items in American history: a John Wilkes Booth wanted poster. A guy buzzes the shop with a fighter pilot's G-suit.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Buyer Beware
programme.desc: Hats off to the Pawn Stars, when a man brings in a signed print of Abraham Lincoln.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Cash Is King
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars get the royal treatment when autographed memoirs from English nobility parade into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Huddle Up
programme.desc: A 1966 Miami Dolphins playbook rushes into the shop, and a vintage cash register is found.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn With the Wind
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars see dollar signs when a one-dollar bill signed by Clark Gable comes into the shop. An early 1900s Shoeless Joe Jackson "Black Betsy" baseball bat is brought in.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Brush With Greatness
programme.desc: The guys check out a painting by Muhammad Ali. Then, Corey and Chumlee eye a Colt Dragoon pistol.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Whodunit?
programme.desc: Corey and Chumlee check out a pair of baby Air Jordans signed by Michael Jordan. Then, a medallion once owned by Liberace comes into the shop. Later, Rick uses surveillance video to check how much the staff plays while the boss is away.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Monumental Pawn
programme.desc: Rick hits the road to take a look at a 1966 Chevy II. Then, he has the task of making a monumental decision when a program from the unveiling of the Statue of Liberty arrives. Later, Corey tries to justify his need for a company car.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Lunch Larceny
programme.desc: Corey and Chumlee check out an 1838 Colt Paterson once owned by a Civil War colonel.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Hello, Goodbye
programme.desc: Alternative artwork for 'Sgt. Pepper's Lonely Hearts Club Band' rocks into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Everybody do the Dinosaur
programme.desc: A Henry rifle from the 1800s storms the shop. Then, Corey encounters a pair of dinosaur eggs. Later, when Chumlee holds a garage sale, Rick is put in the buyer’s seat when he spots some vintage wrestling dolls.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Smurf and Turf
programme.desc: The guys check out a 19th century Fisk iron casket. Then, Corey and Chumlee consider making an offer on a massive Smurf collection.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Smokin' Pawn
programme.desc: A 1944 steel cent rolls into the shop, and an 1850s calendar clock shows up. Later, things heat up with a Smokey the Bear puppet blazes in.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Astro-Pawn
programme.desc: A Civil War general's sword, an 1800s veterinary medicine box, a pair of 1960s space toy robots, a 1936 Olympic pin.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: King of Pawntus
programme.desc: Dig up some history with the Pawn Stars when an ancient coin comes rolling into the shop. Will Rick walk away with this shiny silver in his pocket or will he end up empty handed?

programme.title: Pawn Stars: My Country, Pawn of Thee
programme.desc: Handwritten lyrics to 'My Country, Tis of Thee'; a WWII era Linemar Space Explorer Toy; a United Nations Helmet from Somalia; a giant bell from the classic El Rancho Hotel and Casino.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Pawnshine State
programme.desc: Rick and Chumlee travel to the Sunshine State to look at a fully loaded 1954 Rybovich Yacht. Rick visits another pawn shop while in Florida, owned by his friend Lisa. Meanwhile in Vegas, Corey's quite busy with a huge Incredible Hulk comic collection.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Wish-A-Pawn a Star
programme.desc: The Gold and Silver turns into the happiest place on earth when a seller brings in some vintage Disneyland employee costumes. A Volkswagen space patrol toy car sends Rick over the moon, but the price tag has him seeing stars.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Can't Pawn Me Love
programme.desc: The Venetian Hotel hosts some pricey illustrations from the children's book, 'Where the Wild Things Are,' which greatly intrigue Rick. At the shop, an ultra-rare Beatles vinyl collection impresses Chum. Chum also finds an antique hot dog bun warmer.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Series Rings and Rap Kings
programme.desc: An original Marc Chagall painting finds its way to 'Gold & Silver.' Later, a Boston Red Sox World Series ring may be a home run find. Corey looks into a first edition of Ken Kesey's renowned novel, 'One Flew Over the Cuckoo's Nest.'

programme.desc: A retiring sea captain is forced back out to sea when his finances dwindle.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Elevator Action / Bad Influencer

programme.title: Big City Greens: Reckoning Ball/ Clubbed

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket Versus/ Blue Tater

programme.desc: When the Greens dine at a seafood restaurant, Cricket and Tilly decide to rescue a live octopus.

programme.desc: A loving couple is gunned down outside their home, setting in motion a cross-country investigation to track down an unlikely killer and a motive for revenge.

programme.desc: When a respected soldier is murdered on New Year's Eve, the quest for the truth reveals a deadly plot driven by temptation and obsession.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood: High Stakes Homicide
programme.desc: A retired couple is found brutally beaten to death in their country club estate. But detectives soon discover that what happens in Vegas doesn't always stay there as they hunt down this monstrous killer.

programme.title: Snapped: Rebecca Smith
programme.desc: When the half-dressed, partially frozen body of a Navy veteran is found lying in a ditch, rumors and lies will challenge detectives' efforts to lay bare the truth behind the chilling death.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Kemia Hassel and Jeremy Cuellar
programme.desc: When a respected soldier is murdered on New Year's Eve, the quest for the truth reveals a deadly plot driven by temptation and obsession.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood: High Stakes Homicide
programme.desc: A retired couple is found brutally beaten to death in their country club estate. But detectives soon discover that what happens in Vegas doesn't always stay there as they hunt down this monstrous killer.

programme.title: Snapped: Constance Tomich
programme.desc: The peace of an Indiana town is interrupted on Valentine's Day 2003, when police receive a report of a violent murder.

programme.title: Snapped: Kim Long
programme.desc: A vicious attack leaves a man dead and his girlfriend under suspicion, but is there enough evidence to prove murder.

programme.title: Dateline: The Plot Thickens
programme.desc: Hollywood stuntman, Garrett Warren, was shot four times but luckily survived. With many suspects in mind, see if Warren knew who was trying to kill him.

programme.title: Dateline: Bringing Down Bill Cosby: Andrea Constand Speaks
programme.desc: Andrea Constand, the first woman to pursue charges against Bill Cosby that led to his conviction, gives her one and only interview to Kate Snow. Constand details the sexual assault, Cosby's trial and becoming a symbol for some 60 women who accused him.

programme.title: Dateline: Unspeakable
programme.desc: A couple's anniversary celebration ends in murder in what appears to be a home invasion. Investigators think the suspect is much closer to the victim.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Crystal Rogers: Vanishing Point
programme.desc: Crystal Rogers' car is abandoned in Bardstown, KY, the mother of 5 vanished. A year later her father is shot dead while searching for her. We discover there are multiple cases in a small town shrouded in secrets, and haunted by unsolved killings.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Crystal Rogers: The Search Continues
programme.desc: The brother of Crystal's boyfriend, Nick Houck, a Bardstown Police Officer is grilled by the FBI. Stephanie and Dwayne follow a search of a lake where cadaver dogs pick up a scent. On the Bluegrass Parkway the scene of a deadly ambush is explored.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Crystal Rogers: Cold And Calculating
programme.desc: An FBI profiler offers chilling insights on a potential killer. Family members of Bardstown's other victims speak. A mysterious white car is possibly linked to Crystal's disappearance.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Crystal Rogers: A Murder Most Foul
programme.desc: As the 1st anniversary of Tommy Ballard's killing approaches, Stephanie and Dwayne dive deeper into the unsolved cases after a new witness steps forward. An unexpected new lead takes them in an unforeseen and intriguing direction.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Crystal Rogers: Final Days in Bardstown
programme.desc: Stephanie and Dwayne speak with an informant who shares new information about the crimes in Bardstown. They follow up on the informant's claims and discover potential new details unknown to investigators.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Killing in Cobb County
programme.desc: It is a story of obsession that boiled over into a brutal crime. Right away, one woman said she knew what happened. Yet, it took years to bring the alleged killer to trial and the verdict was far from the end of this case.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Sister's Search
programme.desc: Aasha Davis moved to Hollywood with big dreams. Her sister Lesley followed for support. Then, Lesley went missing and Aasha was desperate to find her. In a town built on deception, police came up with a high-stakes plan to smoke out their suspect.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Under a Halloween Moon
programme.desc: It was just before Halloween. Joel Lovelien and his fiancé headed to a local bar packed with people in costume. Then, Joel stepped outside and walked into a troubling mystery. Police rounded up potential suspects, but could they unmask a killer?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: At Close Range
programme.desc: Keith Reed was a highly-regarded school superintendent. When he didn't show up at an out-of-town conference, it set off alarm bells. Investigators took a hard look at his love life for clues and made a startling discovery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deep in the Woods
programme.desc: Kelli Bordeaux was just starting what she hoped to be a long career in the military, but fate had other plans. When she vanished, friends and family launched a frantic search, but it was stranger hell-bent on justice who uncovered the ugly truth.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Flaming Moe's
programme.desc: Homer invents the hottest drink in Springfield, which Moe steals and uses at his tavern.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Dumbbell Indemnity
programme.desc: Moe and Homer hatch an insurance scam to get money for Moe's new girlfriend, Renee.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Seemingly Never-Ending Story
programme.desc: While cave exploring with his family, Homer causes the cave to crumble and finds himself stuck upside down in the ceiling. Marge and Bart search for help, while Lisa passes the time by telling Homer a story, which turns into a chain of narrated tales.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Eeny Teeny Maya Moe
programme.desc: In an effort to spend more time with Maggie, Homer takes her to Moe's. While at the bar, Moe tells Homer about his new love, Maya, a woman he met on the Internet. But after meeting her in person, Moe has trouble with the fact that she is short.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Princess Guide
programme.desc: Homer is put in charge of keeping Princess Kemi out of trouble while her father, a Nigerian king, works out a uranium deal with Mr. Burns. When Kemi ends up at Moe's, Moe jumps to the conclusion she's related to the prince who scammed him via e-mail.

programme.title: The Simpsons: From Russia Without Love

programme.title: Family Guy: Switch the Flip

programme.title: Family Guy: Big Trouble in Little Quahog

programme.title: Black-ish: Elder. Scam.

programme.title: Black-ish: Advance to Go (Collect $200)
programme.desc: The Johnsons get together to play Monopoly during family game night and the competition is intense. As the night progresses, alliances are formed and some family members are pushed to their limits.

programme.title: Movie: The Snowman
programme.desc: Two detectives, a grizzled veteran and a brilliant recruit, hunt for a suspected serial killer who always kills the women on the first snowfall of the season, and who always leaves a snowman not far from the spot where he committed the crime.

programme.title: Movie: The Purge: Election Year
programme.desc: Leo Barnes has become head of security for Senator Charlene Roan, who has vowed to end the Purge. The government opposes this and the New Founding Fathers force her and Leo out onto the streets. They must survive what could be the final Purge.

programme.title: Movie: Suburbicon
programme.desc: When a house is burgled in the middle of the night, the idyllic 1950s community of Suburbicon is shocked to its core, especially when one of the victims is killed. As her husband deals with the aftermath, an insurance investigator becomes suspicious.

programme.title: Seasonal Wonderlands: New England
programme.desc: New England is the stage for the most incredible colour change on Earth, when the greens of summer give way to the golds and reds of autumn. See how this vibrant fiesta is created by the battles between the trees and the forests' inhabitations.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Salmon Run
programme.desc: A spectacular natural event takes place in North America every year as hundreds of millions of salmon return from the Pacific Ocean to the mountain streams where they were born. The salmon must overcome fierce torrents and leap over waterfalls.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Feast
programme.desc: Every summer in the seas off Alaska, humpback whales, sea lions and killer whales depend on an explosion of plant life: the plankton bloom. It transforms these seas into the richest on Earth.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: North America
programme.desc: In winter, lynx prowl the Yukon for snowshoe hares and manatees seek hot springs to escape the freeze. In summer, Tennessee fish build spectacular underwater pyramids, fireflies light up the forest's nights, and polar bears leap from rocks as they hunt.

programme.title: Yellowstone: Winter
programme.desc: Yellowstone freezes solid for six months each year. The severe winter is the greatest challenge facing the Park's animals, but for the wolf, it is the season of opportunity as they stalk ever-weakening prey.

programme.title: Yellowstone: Summer
programme.desc: As summer returns, a new challenge emerges: Yellowstone begins to dry out. Yellowstone cutthroat trout mass in shallow streams ready to spawn, but they make easy prey for otters and osprey.

programme.title: Yellowstone: Autumn
programme.desc: Autumn is Yellowstone's shortest season and a period of swift change. Conditions change from summer to winter in just two months, forcing animals to leave or prepare for winter.

programme.title: If I Should Die: Unfinished Business

programme.title: My Murder Story: Soaked in Murder
programme.desc: For an all-American family, a series of deaths leave three siblings reeling. Now, the youngest son sets out to investigate for himself, two shocking murders, that changed the course of his life.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Night Shift Nightmare
programme.desc: The naked body of 19-year-old Wanda Musk is found just miles from where she worked at local gas station. In the wake of the vicious killing, suspicions mount over several young men in the community including her ex-boyfriend and a troubled local teen.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Double Dutch Dilemma
programme.desc: Tamara gets the opportunity to renovate a French chateau she's wanted to tackle for years. She finds that a recent renovation left the kitchen looking outdated and tacky, but she's determined to create a home full of authentic details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Trouble With Cobbles
programme.desc: Tamara continues work on a French chateau as she overhauls a large master suite covered in the tackiest wallpaper she's ever ripped out. She plans to move a bathroom to create an additional bedroom and extend a hallway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Move That Kitchen
programme.desc: Tamara renovates a single-story ranch and tackles her biggest challenge to date, transforming the former master bedroom into a stunning, open kitchen. However, she and her dad run into problems during demolition.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Copper Showstopper
programme.desc: Tamara continues renovations on the ranch by creating a new master suite. While polishing the copper fireplace hood, Tamara and her dad use a familiar solution that has unusual results. Her plans to create a sunroom run into problems due to weather.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Corbels and Chaos
programme.desc: Tamara sees great potential in a 1938 cottage with an unusual layout, unfinished renovation and no front door. She constructs a cathedral ceiling and creates two cedar corbels for the entrance. The cost of an egress window may crack her budget.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Skylight Surprise
programme.desc: Tamara struggles to install a full bath and enlarge the master suite as she continues to renovate the 1938 cottage. She successfully creates a hidden playroom in the kids' bedroom, but fails to win her dad's approval on her plan for the backyard shed.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: All Bricked Out
programme.desc: Tamara takes an 1892 brick Craftsman that was converted into three apartments and tries to restore it back into a single-family dwelling while keeping original details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Swing of Things
programme.desc: Tamara continues working on an 1892 Craftsman and struggles to add a master bathroom. Then, she finds a way to repurpose floor boards into a porch swing, but her plan to reuse a clawfoot tub hits a snag because of a narrow doorway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Catwalk Craziness
programme.desc: Tamara Day starts on a 1900 Kansas City Shirtwaist-style home containing a living room with a catwalk instead of a ceiling. She pulls up linoleum flooring and gives the damaged foyer staircase a facelift.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: When One Barn Door Closes
programme.desc: After restoring a fourth bedroom in the Shirtwaist home, Tamara creates a reading nook and closet to complete the room. Then the Kansas City weather creates a problem in the front yard, while two vanities might not fit in the master bath.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Peeling Layers Off a Covered Log Home in Virginia
programme.desc: Mark and the guys travel to Abingdon, Virginia, to take down a farmhouse that Mark bought sight unseen. The house is really a 200 year-old log cabin covered by layers of siding and overgrowth. As they strip away each layer, the news gets better.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Turning a Ramshackle Cabin Into a Guest House In Missouri
programme.desc: The guys take down and rebuild a historic 170-year-old cabin. Sherman leads the guys in converting this cabin into a guest house for kindred spirit client, Mark Perry.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Raising a Massive Timber Frame Barn in Downtown Lewisburg
programme.desc: Mark and the guys work in downtown Lewisburg, West Virginia, to raise a massive timber frame as the new shelter for the Lewisburg farmer's market. The 200-year-old logs prove to be a challenge when the builders begin to raise the bents.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Building a Log Chapel With a Stained Glass Window
programme.desc: Mark and the guys head to Johnny Jett's hometown in Kentucky to build a log chapel. First, they reclaim a stained glass window from a deteriorating 100-year-old church. Then they build the chapel and install the window.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Saving Every Board From a Kincheloe Cattle Barn
programme.desc: Mark and the guys travel to Jane Lew, West Virginia, to salvage the wood from a 120-year-old cattle barn that is slated for demolition. The rare, wide plank boards end up in living rooms, man-caves, and outdoor projects all over Jane Lew.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Clams and Cannoli
programme.desc: Mouthwatering midway munchies are on the menu at the Delaware County Fair in Walton, N.Y., where Noah Cappe goes wild for the spaghizza, packs on the pork with freshman 15 fries, snaps to attention for the veteran's clams n' corn.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Camp Pop
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to northern Indiana, where the Hoosiers in Valparaiso are doing things right at the Porter County Fair. The Super Ramen Dog combines two delicious foods Noah didn't know belonged together, the Elephant Ear Taco.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Key Ingredient
programme.desc: Alton Brown reveals the surprise ingredient that goes into the best cinnamon roll ever, Alex Guarnaschelli loves sourdough bread made with pickle juice, and Monti Carlo heads to New Orleans for the most unique, irresistible oysters ever.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: New Deli Done Right
programme.desc: America's best delicatessens are serving everything from perfected tried-and-true classics to inventive new spins on old favourites. Wolfgang Puck shares the best hot smoked salmon in the country.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Kids' Menu
programme.desc: From macaroni and cheese to milkshakes to pizza, these are the greatest dishes found on- and inspired b- the kids' menu. Alex Guarnaschelli shares her comfort food lunch favourite from Ted's Bulletin in Washington, D.C.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Fried and Gone to Heaven
programme.desc: Some fried food is so crispy, so crunchy and so incredible that you feel like you've died and gone to heaven. Jeff Mauro heads to Proxi in Chicago for a food frenzy with the most-unique version of street corn ever imagined. Simon Majumdar takes his taste.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Jurassic Pork
programme.desc: Noah Cappe bites into some classic Tennessee hot chicken, tastes authentic home cooking with Meme's meatloaf sammy, and samples a pair of sinfully sweet fusion treats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: A Guac to Remember
programme.desc: Noah Cappe takes the west coast by storm, starting with the Pacific National Exhibition in Vancouver. He gorges on the Big Pickle Dog, then stands at attention for the Colonel Katsu Bao, an Asian-inspired chicken taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Meat, Pray, Love
programme.desc: Noah Cappe starts at the Delaware State Fair, where he'll eat the very stately Delaware Dog, a hot dog loaded with scrapple. Then, he'll try to tackle the funnel cake-filled Frankenfunnel Burger and the octopus-loaded Octotaco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Cheesy Rider
programme.desc: At the Prince William County Fair in Manassas, Va., Noah Cappe eats big with a monumental grilled cheese and has his interested peaked by the crab dip-topped Chesapeake Bay poutine.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On the Waterfront
programme.desc: Head outside for the best of both worlds: breathtaking scenery with fresh air, clear skies and the most-incredible waterfront dining in the U.S. Anne Burrell adores the sights with a meaty pasta from Cecconi's Dumbo in Brooklyn, N.Y.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chocolate Bliss
programme.desc: When it comes to chocolate, the possibilities for sweet treats are endless. On the ultimate list of the best chocolate treats in America, Ali Khan devours an unbelievable Dark Truffle Cake from San Antonio, Texas.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: In the Last Place You'd Expect
programme.desc: Sometimes the best dishes are in the last place you'd ever expect to find them. We've scoured the globe, searched far and wide, and the hunt stops here. Alex Guarnaschelli ends the debate over where to find the best bagel -- it's in North Yarmouth, Maine!

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Worth the Wait
programme.desc: Alton Brown talks up his favorite beef Wellington, while Jamika Pessoa melts over buttery biscuits.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Grown-up Goodies
programme.desc: In Portland, Ore., an ice cream shop adds cocktails to the mix-ins. In Healdsberg, Calif., the area's bountiful produce finds its way into hyper-seasonal cupcakes.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Portland Sweets
programme.desc: Portland is one city at the forefront of the food scene using local ingredients with a unique spin.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: San Fran Sweet Treats
programme.desc: We found three San Francisco restaurants that stand out in this foodie paradise. At Craftsman & Wolves, chef William Werner's attention to detail creates edible works of art like the Caramel Cube Cake that is actually spray-painted.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Crazy Delicious Doughnuts
programme.desc: In Portland, Ore., there's a place that specializes in grown up versions that feature bold glazes and boozy fillings.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Seattle Sweets
programme.desc: Seattle these days has a reputation for sublime sweet treats.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Southern Sweets in Atlanta
programme.desc: Southern desserts are in a category all to their own combining big bold flavours with deep tradition.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: The Nightmare Delivery
programme.desc: Molly plunges into a scuba dog diving cake while baker Ben creates an edible beer barrel cake with a working tap. Meanwhile, Karisha faces her worst delivery yet.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: A Dark Fairytale Cake
programme.desc: Rosie wows her former Army Air Corps colleagues with a gravity-defying helicopter cake to mark a big anniversary and Suzanne creates a colorful world with her exotic bird cake.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Cakes Ahoy!
programme.desc: Phil and Christina scale a cake model of a beloved Cornish ship and Michelle focuses her design on realism by pouring tea from her suspended teapot cake.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Magical Cakes
programme.desc: Detail-oriented Karisha channels her inner princess and superhero for a magical birthday cake while Phil and Christine push cake and engineering boundaries with a Steampunk flying machine with real smoke.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Levitating, Robotic Cake
programme.desc: A levitating wedding cake amazes a room full of guests while a shiny robot cake makes waves in New Jersey. Later, working hydraulics take a car-shaped cake up a notch and a five-foot-tall cake makes a wedding display like no other.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Bears And Pinball Cakes
programme.desc: Bakers in Texas create an unbearably cool cake that has an element of surprise and a knight in shining armor becomes a cake fit for Medieval royalty.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Fiery, Fairytale Cakes
programme.desc: A waterfront wedding cake gets its own functioning river and an island-themed cake erupts with Polynesian flair. Later, a fairytale Vegas wedding cake is taller than the bride.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Spinning, Lifelike Cakes
programme.desc: A flaming fire truck cake comes with its own water hose and a baker shocks the crowd when she reveals her produce stand doesn't include any actual vegetables.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Hard Rock
programme.desc: Four gifted cupcake bakers battle for the chance to have their tasty treats on display at the Hard Rock Cafe's Pinktober concert event, featuring music legend and breast cancer survivor Melissa Etheridge.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Final Cup(Cakes)
programme.desc: Four cupcake bakers try to score their way into the celebration of the Major League Soccer Cup Finals.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Yo Gabba Gabba
programme.desc: The men of Cupcake Wars go to battle as four returning bakers compete for a place at the VIP party for the hit show "Yo Gabba Gabba Live."
