programme.desc: After finding a box of mementos, Gramma tells the kids the story of her greatest adventure. While the Greens are away, the animals compete to see who will rule the farm.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Outlaw Scrooge McDuck!
programme.desc: In the Old West, Scrooge and Goldie form a band of outlaws and stage a heist to save a small town from corrupt businessman, John D. Rockerduck.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Lagoon of White Agony Plains!
programme.desc: Scrooge reteams with his conniving ex-partner and old flame, Goldie O' Gilt, to find a long-lost golden lagoon, but Glomgold has other plans.

programme.title: DuckTales: Happy Birthday, Doofus Drake!
programme.desc: Louie and Goldie crash Doofus' birthday party to con their way into some million dollar gift bags as Della trains Huey in her favourite online game.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Crank It Up
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Not the Mama
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Internabout
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Write Turn Here
programme.desc: Hiro is forced to write a story for his class and decides to write a Big Hero 6 story. Meanwhile, strange versions of Noodle Burger Boy attack the team.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Beginner's Luck
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: Friendship Hates Magic!
programme.desc: Stuck as a shadow, Lena tries to protect Webby from her suspicious new friend Violet during a supernatural sleepover.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Armory of Cornelius Coot
programme.desc: Webby leads the kids in a race against the Beagles to find a secret treasure while hiding a secret of her own. Della is forced to teach Launchpad how to actually fly a plane.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Love God
programme.desc: Mabel takes matchmaking too far when she steals a love potion from a real Love God.

programme.title: DuckTales: Nothing Can Stop Della Duck!
programme.desc: Della Duck has faced every danger the moon has to offer to reunite with her family, but her greatest challenge is one she might not be able to fight her way out of.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: When Bill learns that Gramma has been purposely creating a frightening reputation around town, he throws a barbeque to befriend the neighbors. Cricket makes a wishing well to cash in on people making wishes.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Heat Beaters / Bill-iever
programme.desc: Cricket and Remy play a game of 'H-O-R-S-E'; Cricket tries to make his dad believe in aliens to avoid punishment.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast?/ Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: The Owl House: A Lying Witch and a Warden
programme.desc: When 14-year-old outcast Luz discovers a portal to a new world, she meets a witch, Eda, and a demon named King. In order to get home, Luz has to help them with a mission.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Major Blast
programme.desc: Fred is targeted when a new villain, Major Blast appears in the city.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Fear Not
programme.desc: Supersonic Stu busts his grandmother, Supersonic Sue, out of prison.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Push, Pull, Pogo
programme.desc: Jack tries to deliver mail on a pogo stick, Markiplier takes on a boss battle in Cuphead, Dan swallows up scenery in Donut County, and Muselk attempts a new Fortnite challenge.

programme.title: Parker Plays: Jimmy Steals the Show
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Amphibia: Civil Wart/ Hop-Popular
programme.desc: Anne exposes Wartwood to a teen romance film, and the town is split on the movie's love triangle. After losing his stand, Hop Pop decides to run for mayor of Wartwood.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Fight Fighters
programme.desc: After being challenged to a video game battle by Wendy's boyfriend Robbie, Dipper is shocked when his favourite playable fighter, Rumble McSkirmish, comes to life to defend him. Dipper soon loses control over Rumble and has to find a way to stop him.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Richest Duck in the World!
programme.desc: Louie, Scrooge, and Owlson must escape from an unstoppable monster cursed to hunt down and destroy the richest duck in the world.

programme.title: DuckTales: Happy Birthday, Doofus Drake!
programme.desc: Louie and Goldie crash Doofus' birthday party to con their way into some million dollar gift bags as Della trains Huey in her favourite online game.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hiya Henry/ People Watching
programme.desc: Tilly tries ventriloquism for the Big Coffee open mic, but her dummy terrifies Cricket. The family plays the people watching game, making up stories about city folk passing by.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Rated Cricket / Homeshare Hoedown
programme.desc: On the trip to Big City movie multiplex, Cricket thinks he’s too mature for a kids’ movie, so he sneaks into a grown-up movie. Cricket registers his house on a homeshare website.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Dragon vs Fafnir!
programme.desc: In an attempt to humiliate the Victories, Fumiya challenges Dante to a battle that will be broadcast around the country.

programme.title: Modern Family: Coal Digger
programme.desc: The whole family is invited to Jay and Gloria's for a barbecue and football. However, an earlier incident at school between Manny and Luke makes things very awkward for Gloria and Claire, and things escalate when a not-so-flattering label is uttered.

programme.title: Modern Family: Run for Your Wife

programme.title: Modern Family: Strangers on a Treadmill
programme.desc: Claire and Mitchell help each other spare their significant others from embarrassment. Jay goes to a Quinceañera to prove a point to Gloria, and Haley gives sisterly advice to Alex.

programme.title: Modern Family: Disneyland
programme.desc: Phil tries hard to keep up with Luke when the Pritchett-Dunphy-Tucker clan visits Disneyland. Claire is shocked when they run into Dylan, and Jay and Gloria disagree about sensible shoes for the park.

programme.title: Modern Family: Baby on Board
programme.desc: Gloria accompanies Cam and Mitch as a translator for their newest adoption. Jay and Manny bring Lily to her dance recital, while Claire and Phil have a proud parenting moment when they send Alex off to her first prom.

programme.title: Modern Family: Schooled
programme.desc: The day has arrived for Phil and Claire to drop Haley off at college, which is a difficult moment for any parent. It's made worse when they manage to really embarrass Haley. Manny forces Jay and Gloria to take a baby class.

programme.title: Family Guy: Follow the Money

programme.title: Family Guy: Three Directors

programme.title: Everything's Gonna Be Okay: Greenbottle Blue Tarantula
programme.desc: Nicholas wishes he could call an adult! After the death of their father, Nicholas, Matilda, and Genevieve struggle to return to their daily and nightly routines. Navigating the stay-at-home parent life is harder than Nicholas thought.

programme.title: Everything's Gonna Be Okay: Giant Asian Mantises
programme.desc: Matilda wants to get white-girl-wasted! Genevieve's low-key birthday party leaves Nicholas, Alex, and Matilda banished to the guest house. In the main house, Tellulah turns things up a notch. Nicholas is stuck being the responsible adult.

programme.title: Everything's Gonna Be Okay: Silkmoths
programme.desc: Nicholas is terrible at love! Genevieve's ambivalence about Nicholas' boyfriend Alex takes an unfortunate turn when the three go out together. Matilda wants to bake Luke a cake but takes her brother’s advice.

programme.title: Everything's Gonna Be Okay: West African Giant Black Millipedes

programme.title: Everything's Gonna Be Okay: Harvester Ants

programme.title: Everything's Gonna Be Okay: Blue Death-Feigning Beetles

programme.title: Everything's Gonna Be Okay: Maggots
programme.desc: Alex puts Nicholas in the naughty corner. Nicholas and Alex work through their relationship issues at home. Matilda and Genevieve find themselves confronting sexuality at school in very different ways. Genevieve is forced to grow up.

programme.title: Everything's Gonna Be Okay: Monarch Butterflies
programme.desc: C's C's C's across the board! Matilda focuses on her relationship. Nicholas faces a reality check at Matilda and Genevieve’s parent/ teacher conference. He figures out how to get them to wake up and try.

programme.title: Everything's Gonna Be Okay: Discoid Cockroaches
programme.desc: Matilda is inspired for her future! The family navigates New York City teaching Matilda to ride the subway. Genevieve has a thing she wants to do. It's a big reveal. Nicholas starts to dream of a life with less responsibilities.

programme.title: Frasier: A Word to the Wiseguy

programme.title: Frasier: Look Before You Leap

programme.title: Frasier: High Crane Drifter

programme.title: Movie: A Harvest Wedding

programme.title: Movie: Appetite for Love

programme.title: Movie: Valentine Ever After

programme.title: Dance It Out: Richie Gonzalez's Journey from Streets to Entrepreneur!

programme.title: Married at First Sight: Fight or Flight?
programme.desc: After one couple reaches the end of the road in their marriage, the remaining four couples go on a Couples' Retreat where close quarters force them to confront their issues.

programme.title: Movie: You Can't Take My Daughter
programme.desc: After being raped by an acquaintance, a young woman discovers she's pregnant and must fight for custody of her daughter.

programme.title: Movie: Seduced by My Neighbor
programme.desc: A woman finds herself the target of an obsessive neighbourhood watchman who aims to prove he's the best man to protect her, even if he has to create the danger himself.

programme.title: Movie: Killer Dream Home
programme.desc: After moving into their dream house, a happy couple discovers someone is plotting to make the home their own.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Killer Snapshot
programme.desc: An amazing new forensic tool turns a cold case around.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Letter
programme.desc: The sudden and mysterious death of a health conscious woman triggers an investigation into what killed her.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: Mom's Deadly Secret
programme.desc: When Colorado soccer mom Paige Birgfeld suddenly vanishes, a small town is left on edge. As cops start to dig for clues, they make a shocking discovery, this devoted mom was living a secret double life.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Slippery Motives
programme.desc: While staying at a hotel in St. Louis, Missouri, a Louisiana woman drowns in a bathtub. Her husband claims it was an accident, but detectives are skeptical as they discover evidence of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Deceit
programme.desc: Women in a small Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who becomes so experienced he leaves no clues to his identity. But computer technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool: geographical profiling.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pure Evil
programme.desc: In 1993, two Texas teenagers, a 14-year-old boy and his 13-year-old stepsister, were brutally murdered. It took forensic evidence and a behavioral profile to identify their killer as Jason Massey, who had a history of torturing animals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Prosecutors turned to a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist to solve a missing person's case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bagging a Killer
programme.desc: Police use satellites to trace the kidnapper of a nine-year-old girl. After questioning whether the girl's long lost mother was somehow involved, the satellite tracking reveals who the kidnapper is, where they took her, and why.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Trouble
programme.desc: A Maine State Trooper is attacked during a routine stop which triggers a chain of events that jump starts a stalled murder case hundreds of miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Fire
programme.desc: Police say that a car crash, which killed an elderly woman, was murder and arson. The driver, the victim’s daughter, insisted it was an accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Will
programme.desc: A kidnapper torments an abducted girl's family with phone calls.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shot of Vengeance
programme.desc: A 34-year-old nurse, who had been experiencing a variety of flu-like symptoms with no discernible explanation, is diagnosed as HIV-positive, and further investigation reveals that the method in which she contracted the disease was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dinner and a Movie
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her home while her husband is on a sailing trip. When investigating, police uncover a lifestyle of sex parties and wife swapping.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Memories
programme.desc: A pregnant woman is brutally attacked in her own home and her unborn child is killed. After coming out of her coma, and regaining her memory, she identifies her husband as the perpetrator. A new DNA test lead investigators to a different suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Evidence
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Second Shot at Love
programme.desc: A respected heart surgeon is found dead in the basement of his upscale Cincinnati home and have police assuming he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Journey to Justice
programme.desc: Prosecutor used video testimony to link drunk driver to hit-and-run which killed a child.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sleight of Hand
programme.desc: Investigators search for an assailant who has avoided the law for sixteen years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scratching the Surface
programme.desc: Forensic scientists must find a way to "lift" the serial number from a 12-gauge shotgun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dessert Served Cold

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Music Case

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Will
programme.desc: A kidnapper torments an abducted girl's family with phone calls.

programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called to retrieve a dead body, they do a background check on the victim. The trail leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skin of Her Teeth
programme.desc: A human skull retrieved from a watery grave reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate deep knife wounds. The teeth had been removed from the skull, apparently so the killer could keep the victim's identity a secret.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Paintball
programme.desc: In 1962, the people of the small town of Hanford, California lost their sense of peace when one of their own, 15 year-old Marlene Miller, was murdered. It would take 24 years to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign Here
programme.desc: A young woman walked out of a department store, got into a rental car, and was never seen again. The signature on the rental car agreement turned out to be a forgery.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Welcome Stranger
programme.desc: Tempted by the largest nuggets he's ever seen, Parker ventures deep into an underground mine. Tyler tracks down a trommel for the team, and a local miner lets the team test a claim that yields more gold per yard than Parker's ever seen in the Yukon.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Tyler's Trial
programme.desc: In the legendary Palmer goldfields, Parker and his team encounter a lucrative family-run mining operation and discover dirt far richer than anything they've ever seen in the Yukon. But convincing the family to lease him virgin ground will come at a price.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Parker's Trail: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: With insider facts and bonus scenes: Parker tries out virgin ground on the Fitzgerald claim and makes a big discovery. If he wants to strike a deal, he has gain the trust of the family.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Driven to Extremes
programme.desc: Parker battles extreme heat at 'Hell's Crack' as he investigates a remote claim rumored to have $100 million in gold. In Montana, an incredible discovery leads Team Turin to the best gold all season. Parker, Tyler, Dave and Freddy Dodge join The Dirt.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters: Make or Break
programme.desc: Rookie Justin tackles a deal that could make or break him. The Boulder Boys race to save their claim from a monsoon flood. And on their last dig of the season The Cooke Brothers finally hit pay dirt.

programme.desc: Brandon and Jared Cyr chase tarpon, bonefish and permit.

programme.desc: The guys stay near La Grange and learn about some of the world's finest bourbon, meet incredible horse ladies, and tour a baseball factory.

programme.title: The RVers: Learning to Drive (Pt.1) Community
programme.desc: Learn about driving an RV and a sense of community.

programme.title: Chasin' the Sun: The Jetty Until They're Ready
programme.desc: Travis and Justin are fishing on Panama City Beach.

programme.title: Shark Vortex
programme.desc: Greg Skomal and Joe Romeiro study the makos, great white sharks and porbeagles of the Gulf Stream that out-compete all other species of sharks.

programme.title: Great Hammerhead Invasion
programme.desc: To discover why giant hammerheads travel to Bimini each summer, shark scientist Tristan Guttridge tags and follows them.

programme.title: Sharks of the Badlands
programme.desc: With white sharks infesting the waters off Cape Cod, Greg Skomal and Kina Scollay are testing new cutting-edge technology for shark detecting. If all goes well, they will bring it to Cape Cod to make the water safe again.

programme.title: Alien Sharks: Stranger Fins
programme.desc: Dr. Craig O'Connell seeks sawsharks in the Bass Strait, while Victoria Elena Vasquez and Dr. David Ebert look for goblin sharks in Tokyo Bay; they also find ghost sharks, frilled sharks, and lantern sharks.

programme.title: Air Jaws Strikes Back
programme.desc: A 'drone-towed' seal decoy studies the dramatic battles between shark and seal.

programme.title: Laws of Jaws: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: Five heart-stopping real-life experiments will separate shark fact and fiction, including electronics to trigger a shark encounter and sharks investigating paddleboards that may cause you to fall off. Watch and learn to navigate these dangerous waters.

programme.title: Ronda Rousey Uncaged
programme.desc: Olympian and UFC hall of famer Ronda Rousey gets help from Paul De Gelder to train through three rounds of survival training against three heavyweight opponents the bull sharks, to build to a 'main event' swimming uncaged with mako sharks.

programme.title: Phelps vs. Shark: Great Gold vs. Great White
programme.desc: Sharks, the world's fastest and most efficient predators. Michael Phelps, our greatest champion to ever get in the water. A 'Shark Week' first brings an event so monumental no one has ever attempted it before.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Randy's Favorite Celebrity Moments: A Comedian Walks Into a Bridal Salon ...
programme.desc: Not even mannequins are safe when comedian Kathy Griffin conspires with Randy to give her former assistant the surprise of her life. 'The Biggest Loser's' Tumi Oguntala returns for her dress fitting, but total dress disaster strikes on her wedding day.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Randy's Favorite Celebrity Moments: What Does Martha Think?
programme.desc: The wedding guru herself, Martha Stewart, visits Kleinfeld. She's helping bride Bailey decide if she truly chose her perfect dress. Meanwhile, bride Jessica is so indecisive she may not find a gown, and Crystal wants impossible alterations.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Randy's Favorite Celebrity Moments: 10 Years Later and Busier Than Ever!
programme.desc: Brides and viewers have been 'saying yes' for 10 incredible years. When Grammy-nominated rocker Elle King arrives, Randy and consultant Shay have a dress disagreement. Then, bride Lisa needs a gown for a wedding with dolphins.

programme.desc: Eric faces his distraught daughters. Steven surprises Olga. Kalani's big news upsets her sister. Fernanda writes Jonathan a shocking letter. Ashley and Jay run away to Vegas. Larissa reconnects with Colt's mom.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates
programme.desc: An insider's look at the most outrageous penny-pinching people around and their inventive ways to save money.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: The Grass is Always Cheaper
programme.desc: Jamie's entire garden is made up solely of silk flowers. Now, she aims to replace her whole lawn with artificial grass, to eliminate her landscaping bill. Justin tries to land a job in sales, where he promises to save his employer tons of dough.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Matt/ Sarah
programme.desc: To afford his dream of becoming a pro-wrestler, Matt has reduced his spending to just $300 a month. Extreme Cheapskate Sarah saves on groceries by never leaving one of her family's catering events without leftovers.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: All Wrapped Up
programme.desc: Todd Moriarty is obsessed with preserving the value of his assets. In an effort to keep his home looking like new, he wraps all of his possessions - from his car to his bathroom, in plastic wrap.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Shelly
programme.desc: Mother-of-two Shelley has been penny-pinching in Mesa, Ariz. for over 20 years. But Shelley's biggest money-saving challenge is going to be throwing her daughter Ashley's wedding on a $1,000 budget.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Angel/ Mark
programme.desc: Although she's eight months pregnant, Angel frequents local junkyards on a regular basis with her husband Orlando. Mark lives in Las Vegas and yet he manages to not spend a penny of his full time salary.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Father Knows Debt
programme.desc: Patriarch Raul Pinto scours through vacuum canisters at the car wash in hopes of finding spare change. Kia Cambridge limits herself to one piece of gum, every three days.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Pool Rules: No Spending
programme.desc: Homemaker Jeni Cox goes to sporting goods stores, using the exercise equipment on display in lieu of a gym membership. Realtor Lisa DiMercurio spends just three dollars to stage and sell her homes.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Cheap Hair Day
programme.desc: Kelley saves money by insulating her entire house with plastic. Now, she's bringing her Pilates studio into the home to save $800 per month. Pelin cuts hair and costs at her salon and must find cheap bridal party products to trim her budget.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Victoria
programme.desc: Victoria's boyfriend moves in on a trial basis to see if he can handle her jarring and flush free lifestyle.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: In Sickness and in Wealth
programme.desc: Extreme Cheapskates Karen and Barry cannot stand the idea of spending money. Whether it's frying breakfast on the car engine or pulling out their own tooth at home, no task is too big and no savings too small.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Love Is a Battlefield
programme.desc: Four gypsy teens looking for love prepare for the biggest Romanichal ball of the year.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Wed at First Sight
programme.desc: A couple plans to meet for the first time on their wedding day. A rodeo star breaks from traditional gypsy roles and tries to earn a college scholarship with her rodeo skills.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: You've got to Fight For Your Right...to Marry
programme.desc: A Romanichal man plans his wedding to his gorger fiancée, but a jealous ex-lover will stop at nothing to prevent the union. A gypsy teen finally gets her big break in the music industry, but will she turn her back on stardom for love?

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Gypsy Jinxes and Wedding Hijinks
programme.desc: Sisters Brittany and Kalynn plan to wed their gorger fiancés in a Gypsy-style double wedding, but their big day may be put on hold when a jealous sister-in-law threatens to start a war. Later, a superstitious couple is convinced their wedding is cursed.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Mama Said Knock You Out
programme.desc: Gypsy Trouble and her gorger fiancé may not have their dream biker-themed wedding because of their fierce, feuding mothers. Alanna's traditional eighth birthday party spirals into an epic battle between her American and Russian gypsy family members.

programme.title: Fresh Out Live
programme.desc: Fresh Out Live delivers the most important music and pop culture news of the week and beyond with artist interviews, in-studio performances, album drops, and tour announcements.

programme.title: Movie: The Twilight Saga: Eclipse
programme.desc: With her high school graduation coming up, a teenage girl must choose between her vampire boyfriend and her werewolf friend.

programme.title: Movie: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 1
programme.desc: Edward and Bella's unborn child is a risk to the citizens of Forks and to the Wolf Pack.

programme.title: Movie: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 2
programme.desc: The Volturi are in uproar upon learning of the birth of Edward and Bella's child, Renesmee. In order to protect the innocent child from destruction, the Cullens and the wolves come together in battle.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Chicken Cutlets and Ketchup
programme.desc: Vinny's mom, Paola, prepares a grand Italian feast for Mike, and Uncle Nino tags along. Meanwhile, Angelina invites an unexpected guest out to the bar.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: The Shorefather
programme.desc: It's premiere night for the guidos as they screen a movie they made in Mike's honour. Then, they cram eight months into one night when they re-enact all the moments Mike missed while he was away in prison.

programme.title: The Challenge: Mad World
programme.desc: 28 players face an intimidating first challenge, and then move into the most shocking living conditions in Challenge history. A new alliance threatens to topple the game while a stunning twist at elimination changes everyone's expectations.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Penn Jillette

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XXIX

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Kat Graham

programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Sterling discuss a condition called "Temporary Fansanity," people who are "Quick To Cry" and our favorite summer sporting event, the "Bro Games."

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Jamie Lee

programme.desc: Action sports star Travis Pastrana helps Rob illustrate some Poorly Placed Trees and Whiskey Throttles.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Jermaine Dupri
programme.desc: Entertainment mogul Jermaine Dupri joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo to discuss "The Price of Likes," meet some "Sleep Ninjas," and help some musicians who are "Unproducible."

programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo witness motorcycle revenge in Moto-Cide. Watch some unevolved Cave People, and experience twice the pain in Adding Injury to Injury.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XXXIV

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Tyga II
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo and Chanel welcome rap superstar Tyga as they watch some people 'get a taste', witness what could go wrong when you 'make it haute' and find out what kind of talents can make you legendary'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XIX
programme.desc: Rob, Sterling and Chanel take a trip down to 'The Slamptons,' encounter some ancient 'sea cappys' and learn what it means to be prone to 'gingeries.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Jason Aldean
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo welcome country music megastar Jason Aldean as they head on down some 'dirt roads', bring a glass of water to a bunch of 'whiskey drowners', and witness the nightmare of 'bad dream houses'.

programme.title: Blue Collar Millionaires: Trash to Cash

programme.desc: A mechanic from inner-city L.A. found a way to capitalize on underground car culture. Also, a father-son team have turned forest fires into a million-dollar flooring business. Plus, a manufacturing mogul went from segregated classrooms to boardrooms.

programme.title: Blue Collar Millionaires: Through the Roof
programme.desc: Meet a small-town roofer who hustled his way to a high net worth. Also, a landscaper grew her part-time mowing job into a multi-million dollar lawn care legacy. Plus, an Indian immigrant turned fifty bucks and a dream into a service station empire.

programme.title: Blue Collar Millionaires: Just Killin' It

programme.desc: When Old Man Jenkins disrupts business at the Krusty Krab, Mr. Krabs cant find a way to kick him out.

programme.desc: SpongeBob gets in over his head with the Sharks. Plankton creates an evil clone of SpongeBob.

programme.desc: Monica arranges a face-to-face meeting between Chandler and his estranged father.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Monica and Chandler's Wedding
programme.desc: Chandler goes missing when he experiences 'cold feet' on the eve of his and Monica's wedding.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Birth Mother
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler go to Ohio to meet a possible birth mother for their child.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Chandler Gets Caught
programme.desc: Chandler is seen by Phoebe and Rachel sneaking into a car with a blonde woman they don't know.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where the Stripper Cries
programme.desc: Monica and Rachel hire an ungainly stripper to perform for Phoebe's bachelorette party.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Phoebe's Wedding
programme.desc: Monica quickly drives Phoebe to the brink when she becomes Phoebe's wedding planner.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Joey Speaks French
programme.desc: Ross and Rachel head out to Long Island after her father has a heart attack.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Princess Consuela
programme.desc: Phoebe considers changing her name to something more exotic; Joey has abandonment issues.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Estelle Dies
programme.desc: Rachel makes a startling announcement; Phoebe tries to conceal the death of Joey's agent.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Rachel's Going Away Party
programme.desc: As Rachel prepares to leave for Paris, the gang throws her a farewell party.

programme.title: Friends: The Last One
programme.desc: Ross races to the airport so he can tell Rachel his feelings before she leaves for Paris.

programme.title: Friends: The Last One
programme.desc: Ross tries to convince Rachel to stay, and Joey loses Chick Jr. and Duck Jr. in the foosball tables.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Monica Gets a Roommate
programme.desc: Rachel leaves her fiancé at the altar and moves in with Monica.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Sonogram at the End
programme.desc: Ross's ex-wife, Carol, tells him she is pregnant and wants to give the baby both her and her female lover's last names, but not Ross's. Monica goes on a manic cleaning spree to impress her parents, who favour Ross.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Flea in Her Dome/ Donut of Shame
programme.desc: Sandy must get rid of her Tree Dome of fleas; Patrick feels bad about taking a donut.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Bummer Vacation/ Wigstruck
programme.desc: SpongeBob has never taken a vacation, so Krabs makes his #1 employee take the day off.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Karen 2.0/ Inspongeiac
programme.desc: Plankton's wife is replaced by a better version at work; Spongebob can't sleep.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pizza Delivery/ Home Sweet Pineapple
programme.desc: Bob and Squid deliver Krabby Patty pizza; Bob loses his pineapple house to parasites.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: The Blame Game
programme.desc: Steel learns the concept of discipline and takes it too far, putting one of the Rangers in real danger.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Ghoul Fools
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick get caught in the feud between a crew of ghost pirates and the Flying Dutchman.

programme.title: Movie: Kung Fu Panda 2
programme.desc: Po teams up with kung-fu masters to take down an old enemy who has a new, deadly weapon.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob's good intentions and overzealous nature creates chaos in the underwater city Bikini Bottom, where he lives.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Whale Watching/ Krusty Kleaners
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs hires Squidward to babysit Pearl for the night, but she just wants to sneak out to a cool teen party. SpongeBob spills a milkshake during a delivery.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Cabin in the Kelp/ The Hankering
programme.desc: The Gal Pals spend the weekend in a cabin in the woods.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Feral Friends/ Don't Wake Patrick
programme.desc: A strange moon turns everyone in town into wild animals, and Sandy's the only one who can save them. Patrick is sleepwalking and SpongeBob can't wake him up.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Call the Cops/ Surf N' Turf
programme.desc: Plankton goes to jail, but the secret formula is taken as evidence so SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs plot to get it back. Sandy struggles to build a ship-in-a-bottle before a big contest, so SpongeBob calls in a little extra help.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sandy's Nutty Nieces/ Insecurity Guards
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets in over his head when he volunteers to babysit Sandy's three nieces. SpongeBob and Patrick volunteer as guards at the museum, while Squidward attempts to hang his painting unnoticed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Eek, an Urchin!/ Squid's Defense
programme.desc: Squidward wants SpongeBob and Sandy to teach him karate after being robbed of his groceries. SpongeBob goes to great lengths to force out a pesky sea urchin from the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Broken Alarm/ Karen's Baby
programme.desc: SpongeBob breaks his alarm clock and nothing else is loud enough to wake him up. And, Karen learns that kids grow up too fast after her new child arrives in the mail.

programme.title: The Loud House: Home of the Fave/ Hero Today, Gone Tomorrow

programme.title: The Loud House: Gown and Out/ Breaking Dad

programme.title: The Loud House: Tails of Woe/ The Last Loud on Earth

programme.title: The Loud House: House of Lies/ Game Boys
programme.desc: After witnessing an excess of lying in the family, Lisa invents lie-detecting glasses to try and curb the fibs. Lincoln asks to borrow Clyde's new gaming system, but Clyde struggles to trust that it's safe with him.

programme.title: Weather Underground

programme.title: Defying Death: Heroes & Survivors: Tornado Trouble & Construction Chaos

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: It's Now or Never and Pray for the Best

programme.title: Flipping Vegas: Flip Gone Wrong
programme.desc: Scott buys a house from an amateur flipper whose unfinished renovations cause major problems.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping: The Clinical Disaster
programme.desc: This lakefront home has a horrible layout with a long, ugly residential wing designed like a live-in rehab clinic. Ashlee takes the lead on this big flip, but her grandiose designs threaten to blow the budget wide open.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping: The Bargain Bin

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Fire in Sex Town
programme.desc: When a perverted arsonist strikes Tacoma, the TPD and the TFD must put aside their rivalries to solve the case. To everyone's surprise, the two crews discover they are not as different as they think. Unfortunately, the lovefest may not last.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Talkoma: Fire in Sex Town

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Captain Fatbelly
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q lend an unhelpful hand while working at a high-tech store, then play detectives at the mall in search of perps on the loose. Tonight's loser gets the shakes while soaring high above the city.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Virtual Insanity
programme.desc: The guys bark up the wrong tree at a pet store, and tonight’s big loser virtually loses his mind after entering a world he’s never visited before.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tooth and Consequences
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q spread the love as attendants in a bridal dress shop much to the dismay of the brides-to-be, and break a sacred guy-code in the process. Plus, they attempt to sway frightened focus groups with fragrance campaigns that stink.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Cruisin' for a Bruisin'
programme.desc: The guys hit the seas for a special cruise episode. They turn the pool deck into a playground, give misinformation while posing as entertainment directors, and two Jokers get a double dose of torture in a two-part punishment.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Beware the Bucket
programme.desc: Two teams of best friends enter the Pepperdome with confidence, but Chef Willie's demonic sauces bring them down hard and early.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Worst. Hot Sauce. Ever
programme.desc: Two comic book guys go against two twerkin' besties. The 'Constrictor Sauce' knocks the comic book guys to their knees, but the keep fighting for the prize.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: TKOMG
programme.desc: Cocky sisters challenge best bros in the Pepperdome. However, the sauce proves too hot to handle for one team, resulting in the first TKO.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: A Hot Mess
programme.desc: Fiery identical twins take on saucy drag queens in the Pepperdome. It's duke it out or puke it out in this episode where one player becomes very intimate with the Hot Ones' spit bucket.

programme.title: Movie: Ted
programme.desc: It's been 17 years since John Bennett's childhood wish came true, and his teddy bear came to life. Now John's girlfriend Lori wants to marry him, but first she wants the vulgar, hedonistic Ted to move out of their lives. This proves easier said than done.

programme.title: Movie: Ted
programme.desc: It's been 17 years since John Bennett's childhood wish came true, and his teddy bear came to life. Now John's girlfriend Lori wants to marry him, but first she wants the vulgar, hedonistic Ted to move out of their lives. This proves easier said than done.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Three Men and Your Baby
programme.desc: The styles of dance Murr claims to be skilled in. The Joker that recently became a published author.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Up Loser's Creek
programme.desc: Find out which joker ran for Congress as a write-in candidate, which joker was a top-notch salesman before starting the show and who had a job in finance.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Field of Screams
programme.desc: How the creepy voice changer was made for Devil Voices. The penguin tips Murr learned as a zookeeper.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tied and Feathered
programme.desc: The parts of Out of Remote Control that annoyed people more than any challenge to date. Why the crew was emotionally scarred after Debate and Switch.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: A Hot Mess
programme.desc: Fiery identical twins take on saucy drag queens in the Pepperdome. It's duke it out or puke it out in this episode where one player becomes very intimate with the Hot Ones' spit bucket.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Beware the Bucket
programme.desc: Two teams of best friends enter the Pepperdome with confidence, but Chef Willie's demonic sauces bring them down hard and early.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Spa Day
programme.desc: Pricey detox treatments may do more harm than good, MSG's scary reputation is undeserved and the placebo effect is way more powerful than one may think.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Science
programme.desc: Testing mice means wasted resources because what works on them often fails on humans. Scarce funding stops scientists from seeking cures, and there's no money in reproducing results, even though it's essential in proving findings.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Plate of Nachos
programme.desc: Adam dishes out the facts on the avocado trade being ruled by drug cartels, and big pork making bacon a pop culture hit while covering up its huge health risks. Plus, America's food problems stem from corn.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins America
programme.desc: Adam lets his freedom flag fly by examining why America doesn’t have higher rates of social mobility. He then uncovers the flaws within the constitution and examines the country’s progression and regression.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Find out how many mousetraps accidentally went off during Q's turn in 'hold this please,' what made Joe and Murr join 'team skins' in Columbus park, and how Murr's tech punishment made show history.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Putting the P in Pool
programme.desc: Find what Sal finds stressful about posing as a cashier; what's Q's favorite on-set beverage; and when did the crew have to arrive poolside to get a front row seat for Joe's pee punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sneaking Number Twos, Going Number One
programme.desc: Find out why the jokers love filming at the grocery store, how many pencils were purchased for put-pocketing and why Sal's pee punishment was twice as terrible as it looked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Find out what after-school activity Joe's mom forbid him from doing, why filming nearly halted during the jack asses challenge and what last minute idea made it into Sal and Joe's charity funds punishment.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Relax the Back
programme.desc: Michael shocks people with every trick in the book, including a voice controlled page turner and outfit changes that almost get him recognized. And later, Michael amazes a trainee with a weightless mattress.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Simon Soft
programme.desc: Michael turns iced tea into a tea candle and later, at a pet store, he reveals that caterpillars have wicks. Plus, at a warehouse, Michael stumps his assistant when he proves that big tricks come in shrink-wrapped packages.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Whippit
programme.desc: In an ice cream shop, Michael whips up a mind-boggling app; at party store, he spills the tea on a self-brewing decoration; and at a farm, Michael's helper looks like he saw a ghost after a run-in with a spirited scarecrow.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: The Food Flattener
programme.desc: At a cooking class, Michael gets crabby when chopping salad and brings the heat to instantly cook a meatball with his breath. Later, Michael chills his assistant to her bones when a cryotherapy experiment freezes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Find out why Murr had to shave in under three minutes between scenes of That Ain't Me, what the Jokers love most about Writers Blocked, and where Sal ranks his indecent dance instructor punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pay It Forward
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on the very first Impractical Jokers episode and discover what social superpower the Jokers now possess. Plus, find out which audio equipment is not used anymore and the true history around Joe's 'nosing'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus, tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Payday
programme.desc: As Eddie prepares to become a dad, the rest of the crew's wagering is out of control, forcing Terry to ban gambling. The crew finds creative ways to bet behind Chief's back, causing Lucy to fall into a hole of debt she can't climb out from.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Talkoma: Fire in Sex Town

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Movie: The Wedding Planner
programme.desc: A workaholic wedding planner falls for the engaged doctor whose wedding she is organizing.

programme.title: Girlfriends' Guide to Divorce: Rule #23: Never Lie to the Kids
programme.desc: A famous author of best-selling mommy advice books has been living a lie. She's been hiding from everyone that she's separated from her husband and now that he's actively dating she begins to take the advice of her divorced friends.

programme.title: Girlfriends' Guide to Divorce: Rule #174: Never Trust Anyone Who Charges by the Hour
programme.desc: Abby has to try and recover from her public breakdown and save the 'Girlfriends' Guide...' brand. Abby and Jake attempt to have a 'good divorce' for the sake of the kids. Meanwhile, Lyla's ex-husband exacts revenge for his DUI.

programme.title: Girlfriends' Guide to Divorce: Rule #47: Always Take Advantage of 'Me' Time
programme.desc: Abby spends her first night alone without the kids to focus on writing her next book when things take a sudden turn for the worse, sending the ladies on a wild ride through Hollywood.

programme.title: Girlfriends' Guide to Divorce: Rule #426: Fantasyland: A Great Place to Visit
programme.desc: Abby starts to date Nate, a married dad with whom she had an emotional affair during her marriage. Phoebe starts to get close to one of the dads at school. Max and Ford are honored at the Family Equality Gala and given an award.

programme.title: Girlfriends' Guide to Divorce: Rule #21: Leave Childishness to Children
programme.desc: After the disastrous date with Nate, Abby goes on a date with her hot, young pursuer, Will. Meanwhile, Lyla's mother, Annie, comes to Los Angeles to help her make the best impression possible with the visiting caseworker.

programme.title: Girlfriends' Guide to Divorce: Rule #33: When in Doubt, Run Away
programme.desc: A photo shoot for Phoebe’s Infant Fabuleax jewellery line takes the ladies on a trip to Vegas. Abby is cleansing and is determined to work on her next book.

programme.title: Girlfriends' Guide to Divorce: Rule #67: Don't Kill the Princess
programme.desc: Abby throws a birthday party for her daughter Lilly only to have Jake's girlfriend show up uninvited. Abby wonders if she's pregnant and entertains what she'd do if she were. Delia is handling the divorce of the husband of an acclaimed fashion designer.

programme.title: Girlfriends' Guide to Divorce: Rule #17: Ask the Answer Lady
programme.desc: Abby prepares to pitch her new brand to her agency when Jo, an old friend from college arrives with her blunt, brassy New York attitude. Phoebe holds a press preview for her Infant Fabuleaux jewelry line at her ex-husband's new hotel.

programme.title: Girlfriends' Guide to Divorce: Rule #32: F-You, Rob Frumpkis
programme.desc: Abby gets offered to write a Huffington Post article about her dating experiences as a divorced woman and must go on ten dates in two days. Delia, fearful that her affair with Gordon will become public knowledge, takes action against Courtney Beech.

programme.title: Girlfriends' Guide to Divorce: Rule #3: Don't Stand in the Doorway
programme.desc: An earthquake hits LA just as Abby's Huffington Post piece 'Why Aren't You Divorced Yet?' hits the internet. The moms at school are furious with Abby as the article threatens to expose one of their husbands as a cheater.

programme.title: Movie: Monster-in-Law
programme.desc: Viola Field's fall from grace as a successful television journalist has left her looking for control in her life. When her son announces his engagement to a working-class woman, Viola sets out to ruin her son's marriage before it gets started.

programme.title: Movie: Maid in Manhattan
programme.desc: A senatorial candidate falls for a hotel maid who is posing as a wealthy Manhattan socialite.

programme.title: Movie: The Wedding Planner
programme.desc: A workaholic wedding planner falls for the engaged doctor whose wedding she is organizing.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Stuffed and Twisted
programme.desc: Guy is checking out funky foods from coast to coast. In Monterey California, the second generation Italian place is serving mom's recipes like meaty lasagne and minestrone.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cruisin' In Cuba
programme.desc: Guy's on an international journey cruising the food scene in Cuba. First, an homage to Cuba's most famous chef, cookin' up his trademark coffee lobster and a regional pork plate.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Grillin' and Smokin'
programme.desc: Guy experiences the unusual off the grill, such as a Thai twist on classic Texas bbq.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: BBQ Road Show
programme.desc: Guy is tucking in the napkin and getting into some righteous barbecue. In Dallas, the barbecue stand tucked into a farmers' market is dishing out classic beef brisket and Carolina pork.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: South of the Border
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's headed south of the border to Cabo San Lucas, Mexico. On the town's main drag, the taco joint that's turning out totally fresh octopus tacos and Guadalajaran-inspired sauces that'll knock your socks off.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Big Time Bites
programme.desc: Guy's rolling up to some joints pulling out all the stops. In New York's East Village, the neighbourhood spot plating up a standout burger is worthy of a four star review.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Rollin' in the Dough
programme.desc: Guy visits Mesa, Arizona for a legit Hawaiian joint serving island specialities including a meaty bun, and Tucson for a place serving up saucy sandwiches and spinach dip calzones.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Sandwiches To Stroganoff
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is digging into all kinds of hearty meals on this trip. In San Antonio, an East Coast-Texas deli mash-up pilin' up smoked meat sensations. Plus a funky joint making big-time empanadas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Beef to Bao
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's digging into dishes from beef to buns. In Logan, Utah, a joint servin' up worldwide flavor, like lomo saltado and a funky peanut butter burger.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Something Sweet
programme.desc: It's Diners, Drive-Ins, Dives and decadence with plenty of sweet to go along with the savory. First up, Guy Fieri's in Kansas City, Mo., where a brunch spot is serving up a vegan treat rich enough for any meat eater.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Pork To Pasta
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's diggin' into everything from pork to pasta on this trip. In Chicago, a real-deal Italian spot with righteous ravioli and dynamite deep dish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burger and Breakfast
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's going from breakfast to burgers. In Vancouver, British Columbia, a pie shop bakin' up both sweet and savory sensations. In Chico, California, a morning hot spot pumping up French toast and spicing up potatoes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mom's Kitchen
programme.desc: Guy hits the road to grab grub straight from mom's kitchen. In Boulder, a mother and son team serve Chinese specialties, a Jamaican joint dishes out island favourites in Columbus and a Phoenix family spot cooks Latin cuisine.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Grab and Grub
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's diving into joints where you can literally grab all kinds of grub, starting with a Chicago-style spot in Tucson, Ariz., firing up deep-dish pie and twisted-up breadsticks.

programme.desc: Ree Drummond cooks a spring feast while Ladd and the cowboys are busy on the ranch. She makes perfect pork tenderloin with a delicious herby mustard cream, mac and cheese primavera, and the perfect side, roasted spring veggies and dip.

programme.desc: Paul Gigot, editor of the 'Wall Street Journal's' editorial page, moderates and hosts this weekly news and discussion program. He is joined by deputy editorial page editor Daniel Henninger and Pulitzer Prize winner Dorothy Rabinowitz.

programme.title: America's News HQ
programme.desc: Features national and global headline news stories that matter to you.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Polar Bear in the City
programme.desc: The last polar bear in NYC is showing his age, so staff make sure he gets all the attention he needs. Also, a trio of red ruffed lemurs prepare for their debut and a new exhibit is constructed for the hellbender, a giant amphibian with a bad reputation.

programme.title: The Zoo: Kangaroo Dave
programme.desc: Dave, a kangaroo suffering from chronic arthritis, tries cryotherapy. A large group of rambunctious gharials are trained to patiently wait for their food. And, a tiny pygmy marmoset gives birth to an even tinier baby.

programme.title: The Zoo: Slow Loris Romance
programme.desc: The slow loris has a tiny window for breeding, so staff anxiously help a potential pair connect. The veterinary team develop ground-breaking techniques to treat the stoic pigeons and an okapi with a limp gets a helping hand.

programme.title: The Zoo: Training Dragons
programme.desc: The squirrel monkeys play hard-to-get with the Children's Zoo's keepers, a pair of Komodo dragons meet for the first time with explosive results and the Inca terns prepare for their first big flight.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Eagle Has Landed
programme.desc: A pregnant African wild dog has the staff anxiously preparing for the big day, zoo director Jim Breheny steps in to help a keeper learn how to handle a golden eagle and a new tree in Jungle World gives the gibbons a new world to explore.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Tiger's Dance
programme.desc: When keepers introduce two tigers as potential mates, the process proves bumpy. A pair of African porcupines arrive at the zoo, requiring delicate handling. And a pregnancy check on a 3,000 pound rhino necessitates some highly specialized equipment.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Gorilla with Heart
programme.desc: Surgery on a silverback gorilla's broken canine reveals a more serious medical issue. Love may be in the air for two birds of paradise, Glory and Holiday. And, dozens of venomous tarantulas keep the staff on their toes.

programme.title: The Zoo: An Elephant's Trust
programme.desc: Trust and experience are put to the test when an elephant requires delicate veterinary treatment from her keepers. Endangered pink pigeons need all the help they can get to produce offspring. Monty the adorable otter needs to visit the dentist.

programme.title: The Zoo: Babies
programme.desc: A look back at the cutest baby moments from the show. A tiny pygmy marmoset gives birth to an even tinier baby. A Thomson's gazelle needs a helping hand from zoo staff. A newborn snow leopard struggles to walk. And, a little blue penguin becomes a star.

programme.title: The Zoo: Animal Enrichment
programme.desc: A behind the scenes look at the Bronx Zoo.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Gorilla with Heart
programme.desc: Surgery on a silverback gorilla's broken canine reveals a more serious medical issue. Love may be in the air for two birds of paradise, Glory and Holiday. And, dozens of venomous tarantulas keep the staff on their toes.

programme.title: The Zoo: Bears Will Be Bears
programme.desc: The brown bears keep tearing up their exhibit, leaving zoo staff scrambling for a solution. Armani the aardvark gets treated for a tooth infection which has dampened her enthusiasm for digging. And, a group of burrowing owls prepare to move.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Sea Lion Pup Grows Up
programme.desc: Zoo staff face unexpected setbacks weaning a bright sea lion pup off her mother's milk. The bird team steps in to support a rejected curassow chick. And, a squirrel monkey pays a visit to the dentist.

programme.title: The Zoo: Andre the Baby Goat
programme.desc: A markhor goat gives birth to Andre, the biggest baby of the year. A baby bat requires human care before it can be reintroduced to its colony. Later, confiscated lizards destined for the pet trade require urgent medical attention.

programme.title: The Zoo: Otter Under the Weather
programme.desc: Jasmine, a 14 year-old otter, is not her usual, energetic self. The staff of the New York Aquarium undertake a massive operation to move their sharks to a brand new exhibit. And the quirky capercaillies need help producing healthy chicks.

programme.title: The Zoo: Baby Bunnies, Big World
programme.desc: Crate training Nikita the Amur tiger in preparation for her move to Washington, DC proves challenging. An endangered Chinese alligator shows signs of being pregnant. Plus, staff prepare to release rare New England cottontail rabbits into the wild.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Kings of Queens
programme.desc: A trio of new penguin chicks are introduced to the pool for their first swim. Family dynamics change when the mandrill monkey troop welcomes a new baby. Plus, a pair of king vultures are prepped for their big debut at the Queens Zoo.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Warthog Named Peaches
programme.desc: Peaches, a two-month-old warthog, charms his keepers while training to become an animal ambassador. A nervous one-horned rhino adjusts to her new exhibit. Plus, Willow, a red panda, shows signs of being pregnant.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Great Gaur Move
programme.desc: Keepers introduce three gaur, a large, skittish species of cattle, to the rest of the herd. A sickly Sambar fawn is rushed to the health center. Plus, the bird department excitedly prepares for the arrival of great hornbills.

programme.title: The Zoo: Taming of the Shrew
programme.desc: Cardiologists try to determine why the geladas are experiencing a life-threatening heart condition. Keepers shift the Nile crocodiles off exhibit for a maintenance project. Later, after a shaky start, the elephant shrews are breeding.

programme.title: The Zoo: Bouba's Back
programme.desc: Andean bear Bouba returns from the National Zoo in Washington D.C. to reunite with his loyal mate Nicole. Vets exercise the utmost caution in treating a venomous king cobra. Plus, Blanche, a feisty female alpaca, is due to give birth at any moment.

programme.desc: Two aging ranch hands battle a flying maneater in the Arizona desert, a young Theodore Roosevelt trespasses into the lair of a half-human predator and demonic entities prey upon villagers in rural Pennsylvania.

programme.title: True Terror with Robert Englund: Cryptic Messages
programme.desc: Inexplicable phone calls torment the manager of a New Jersey cemetery, a foolhardy citizen taunts an insane serial killer in New Orleans and love and obsession drive a Florida scientist to desperate lengths.

programme.title: The Dead Files: Puppet Master
programme.desc: Steve and Amy travel to Indianapolis, where a couple claims dark forces are wreaking havoc on their lives. They fear the house intends to kill them to prevent them from providing a safe and loving home to their two young granddaughters.

programme.title: The Dead Files: Dark Soul
programme.desc: Steve and Amy are called to Pataskala, Ohio, to investigate claims of paranormal activity terrorizing a grandmother and her family. All hell has broken loose inside the home, and everyone believes they are in serious danger.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Goodwin Home Invasion
programme.desc: Aaron's father, Don, calls Zak and the crew to his Las Vegas home to investigate threatening paranormal activity. The terrifying apparition of a little girl and a dark, powerful presence a neighbor believes is a witch has left Don scared for his life.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Horror in Biggs
programme.desc: Zak and the crew investigate a demonic entity terrorizing a small California town. Many locals believe the malicious spirit is responsible for a series of horrific deaths, and an exorcism may be the only way to save their souls from its dark clutches.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Nightmare in Antelope
programme.desc: Zak and the crew travel to the Antelope Valley in Sacramento, California, to confront a demonic entity that's tearing a family apart. Zak believes an exorcism may be the only way to save them from the dark and powerful forces plaguing their home.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Union Brewery of Death
programme.desc: Zak and the crew are back in Virginia City, Nevada, to investigate the dark spirits haunting a historic brewery. A devastating fire and a short stint as a funeral home has stained the building, creating an energy unlike anything they've encountered.

programme.title: Movie: Demon House
programme.desc: The Ammons House in Gary, Indiana is home to much hysteria surrounding the events that have occurred there. A team of ghost hunters investigate the claims to determine what really happened.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Back in the NY Groove
programme.desc: The New York ladies are back and moving forward. Sonja struggles with an empty nest after her daughter has left for college, while Luann celebrates the end of her probation. Ramona is on the prowl and looking for love.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset: Pool Party Massacre
programme.desc: GG grapples with the consequences of continuing to hide her IVF from the group but begins to worry that unnecessary drama will harm her health. Sara and Destiney clash over Destiney's tryst with Sara's brother while the group was in Vegas.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset: Don't Mess With Destiney
programme.desc: Tommy takes matters into his own hands after Reza’s altercation with MJ at the pool party, furthering the divide between the Shahs. GG’s divorce is finalized as she gets ready to drop a bombshell on the crew.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset: Vida's Court
programme.desc: Reza surprises Destiney in Arizona and is infuriated to find that Nema, Mike, and Shervin may be siding with MJ. In the meantime, MJ plans a surprise retirement party for her mother Vida. MJ and Destiney meet to stop the madness.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset: The Shady Bunch
programme.desc: GG undergoes emergency surgery and the crew rallies around her. Tommy and MJ meet with a lawyer to discuss Reza's charges against them. Reza unleashes his anger on Nema for meddling in his personal affairs.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Dollars and Sense
programme.desc: Savannah has a rose coloured view of what her spending habits will look like when she goes off to college.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Chrisleys on Campus
programme.desc: When the Chrisleys take a road trip to Nashville to tour a college campus, Todd is excited for the additional family bonding time. Savannah tries to gain independence and go out with new friends, but Todd goes to the extreme and crashes her big night out.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Nurse Todd
programme.desc: Todd is hurt when he offers help to all his kids but no one needs it, until Savannah is hit with appendicitis.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: College Bootcamp
programme.desc: When Chase pays a stranger to change his flat tire, Todd and Julie realize that they have sheltered their kids, and only have a few months left to teach them the basics of life.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: When Todd learns that Savannah has a new boyfriend, who she's intentionally keeping away from meeting her nosy family, Todd goes to extreme lengths to try to get a glimpse of this new guy, and doesn't like what he sees.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Mid-life Chrisley
programme.desc: With Todd's birthday fast approaching, he begins to obsess about his age and reject getting older, but with the help of Mama Faye and her friends, he begins to accept the future.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Failure to Launch

programme.title: Top Chef: The Jonathan Gold Standard
programme.desc: This week the chefs honour the late, great Pulitzer-Prize winning food critic Jonathan Gold. The chefs create dishes to serve 200 of Jonathan Gold's friends, family and restaurateurs that he loved at the iconic Union Station.

programme.title: Top Chef: Strokes of Genius

programme.desc: An all new crew boards Parsifal III, a 180-foot long luxury sailing yacht, along with some familiar faces. With the boat in total disarray, tensions between the old and new crew begin to simmer over as they ready their first charter.

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: My Big Fat Bleak Wedding
programme.desc: The first charter of the season is underway, and Chief Stew Jenna feels the pressure as she is tasked with planning an impromptu wedding for two drunken guests. Parker, an inexperienced deckhand, struggles to adjust to the posh life of luxury yachting.

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: Rosé-fueled Regrets
programme.desc: After a wild, wine-fueled, night out, Jenna wades through a sea of regrets and braces for the awkward interactions that follow. A group of high-maintenance, vegan guests board the yacht and Adam struggles to live up to their high expectations.

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: Baby on Board
programme.desc: Stews brace and dishes break as the last breakfast of charter is served on full tilt. To make matter worse, the deck team gets into choppy waters during a rough docking. Parker feels the strain of being on charter and his immaturity begins to show.

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: Shmexual Shmension
programme.desc: Parsifal sails into strong winds with a baby on board as Glenn stumbles into awkward conversation with a flirtatious primary. Adam and Jenna's relationship heats up which stokes the fires between the Jenna and her interior team.

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: Oof! I Did It Again

programme.desc: When Juleka's picture day 'curse' is made worse by being excluded from the class picture, Juleka is akumatized and turns into Reflekta.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dreamscaperers

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year

programme.title: Big City Greens: Welcome Home/ Raccooned
programme.desc: Cricket Green and his family move from the country to Big City to live with Gramma. Cricket and Bill accidentally disturb some raccoons in the garage, and they invade the house!

programme.title: Big City Greens: Photo Op/ Remy Rescue
programme.desc: Bill promises his family a trip to the mall food court but tricks them into going to a family portrait studio. Remy skips his violin lesson to hang out with Cricket.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Fill Bill/ Critterball Crisis
programme.desc: When the Greens dine at a seafood restaurant, Cricket and Tilly decide to rescue a live octopus.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Parade Day/ DIY Guys

programme.title: Raven's Home: School House Trap

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Threat
programme.desc: She was a divorced mother excited about her next chapter in life. Then, five gunshots shattered her plans. Proving who murdered Joan Lockwood was a daunting task for police. An ominous killer was still out there and her family was living in fear.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: What They Saw
programme.desc: Detectives believed two young children witnessed the unthinkable, the brutal murder of their mother. The prosecution's case would be built around what they thought those kids observed, but was another version of events possible?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Reckless
programme.desc: This is a story of teens, text messages and a complicated search for the truth. Conrad Roy had vanished. Turns out, he shared a secret with someone close to him. What that confidant did and did not do with the information shattered two families.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Disappearance of Sandi Johnson
programme.desc: Sandi Johnson always put her kids first. When she vanished without a word, her loved ones were frantic. Police discovered dark secrets in Sandi's marriage and several men in her life. Which one of them had something to hide?

programme.title: Cold Justice: Mystery on the Mountain
programme.desc: Kelly and Abbey investigate the 2012 disappearance of a young father who traveled to Idaho to attend a family reunion, but never showed up. As the list of suspects grows, can the team uncover the truth behind his vanishing?

programme.title: Cold Justice: Small Town Predator
programme.desc: Kelly and Johnny team up to tackle the 1988 murder of a woman whose headless body was found at a cemetery after a night at a local bar. The patrons of the bar could hold the key to identifying her killer and getting her family justice.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Valentine's Day Violence
programme.desc: Kelly and Tonya investigate the 2016 murder of a young Florida mother shot to death in her own home. It'll take cutting-edge forensic technology and old-school interrogation techniques to catch her killer and bring justice to her grieving mother.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Disappearance of Sandi Johnson
programme.desc: Sandi Johnson always put her kids first. When she vanished without a word, her loved ones were frantic. Police discovered dark secrets in Sandi's marriage and several men in her life. Which one of them had something to hide?

programme.title: The DNA of Murder With Paul Holes: Voice of a Killer
programme.desc: In 2003 in Atlanta, a voicemail captures a young and successful businesswoman Jennifer Clemmings' last moments, along with the voice of her unidentified killer. Paul Holes and Loni Coombs are on the hunt to find the brutal murderer.

programme.title: The DNA of Murder With Paul Holes: Killer Connection
programme.desc: In 2002, 27 year old, Tamekia Taylor, was murdered in her home as she dressed for a holiday party. Her crime scene resembles another Atlanta murder victim, Jennifer Clemmings, killed less than 2 months later. Paul Holes and Loni Coombs investigate.

programme.title: Snapped: Teresa Kotomski
programme.desc: A woman faces tough decisions when her husband is on life support due to a mysterious illness.

programme.title: Snapped: Traci Wolfe
programme.desc: One man’s brutal murder leads to questions about a doomed love triangle and the intentions of the woman at the center of it all.

programme.title: Snapped: Judy Parker
programme.desc: A business man's mysterious death sends police on a years-long investigation that leads to suspicions of those nearest and dearest to him.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Maura Murray: Everyone Has a Theory
programme.desc: In 2004, nursing student Maura Murray disappears the same week Facebook launches. Questions about her vanishing still remain, was it abduction, the act of a serial killer or suicide.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Maura Murray: A Reason to Run
programme.desc: Maggie dives deep into the reasons why Maura Murray secretly drove to New Hampshire and never came home. Was she pregnant and running away from her boyfriend, her father, or could an emotional phone call with her sister be the reason.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Maura Murray: After the Crash
programme.desc: Explore what happened to Maura after she crashed on a rural road in New Hampshire. Did she run into the woods, hop into a car with someone she knew and escape to a new life in Canada, or worse, hitch a ride from a stranger who did her harm.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Maura Murray: Code of Silence
programme.desc: Why has New Hampshire's law enforcement community kept their findings of Maura's case so close to the chest. Maggie explores the theories related to a police conspiracy, hoping to break down a decade-long code of silence.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Maura Murray: Something Bad Happened
programme.desc: Killers and kidnappers are Maggie's focus as she works to find out if Maura Murray was the victim of foul play.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Maura Murray: Summit
programme.desc: The DNA results are revealed, Maggie seeks the advice of a psychic, and a wild lead is pursued at the top of a mountain. Later Maggie sits down with Maura's family and reveals evidence released by law enforcement for the first time in 13-years.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Mystery on the Mountain
programme.desc: Kelly and Abbey investigate the 2012 disappearance of a young father who traveled to Idaho to attend a family reunion, but never showed up. As the list of suspects grows, can the team uncover the truth behind his vanishing?
