programme.title: Snapped: Diana Lovejoy
programme.desc: A contentious divorce and custody battle lands one father in the crosshairs of a sniper.

programme.title: Snapped: Crystal Mangum
programme.desc: One of the most notorious citizens of Durham, North Carolina finds herself under scrutiny after her boyfriend is stabbed.

programme.title: Snapped: Cynthia Coates
programme.desc: When a man returns home from a party and finds his caregiver shot to death, detectives must sift through a complicated network of animosity and resentment to find their killer.

programme.title: Movie: Suburbicon
programme.desc: When a house is burgled in the middle of the night, the idyllic 1950s community of Suburbicon is shocked to its core, especially when one of the victims is killed. As her husband deals with the aftermath, an insurance investigator becomes suspicious.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Debarted
programme.desc: A new tough-talking kid teams up with Bart to pull off pranks. When Bart's pranks seem to backfire, Groundskeeper Willie warns him that he may have a rat in his group of friends. Bart must figure out who the backstabber is before it's too late.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Dial 'N' for Nerder
programme.desc: Marge hires a nutritionist who puts Homer on a strict diet, but Homer decides to sneak in snacks and meals on the side. Bart and Lisa believe they are responsible for the accidental death of Martin Prince when their prank goes terribly wrong.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Smoke on the Daughter
programme.desc: Lisa becomes addicted to second-hand smoke when she believes it is responsible for her improved ballet performance. Meanwhile, when a family of raccoons makes off with Homer's beef jerky, he decides to confront the animals.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Papa Don't Leech
programme.desc: Former country star Lurleen Lumpkin has an outstanding tax debt to the city of Springfield. As citizens scour the city to find her, Marge reluctantly permits the fugitive to stay with the family.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Any Given Sundance
programme.desc: When Lisa's documentary on her family premieres at the Sundance Film Festival, Homer, Marge and Bart are embarrassed by the candid behind-the-scenes look at their lives.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Mona Leaves-A
programme.desc: When Homer's mother unexpectedly passes away, he is filled with guilt for not telling her how much he loved her. To make up for it, Homer decides to fulfill her final wishes by throwing her ashes over Lake Wastershare at Springfield Monument Park.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lost Verizon
programme.desc: Bart finds Dennis Leary's cell phone and uses it to make prank phone calls all over the world. When Marge finds out, she and Leary devise a plan to activate a GPS system and track Bart's every move.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Double Double Boy in Trouble
programme.desc: Bart meets his exact look-alike, Simon Woosterfield, who happens to be a member of the richest family in Springfield. When the boys decide to switch places, Bart learns that his wealthy 'siblings' are plotting his demise so they can get his inheritance.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XIX

programme.title: The Simpsons: Dangerous Curves

programme.title: Forbidden History: Top Secret Nazi UFOs
programme.desc: Investigating claims that the Nazis had developed a brand new flying craft at a secret research facility in Northern Germany and that the Americans and Russians stole this technology after the war.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Secrets of the Alchemists
programme.desc: Nostradamus, Nicolas Flamel and John Dee were alchemists that had a profound effect on the world. Find out if they were clever deceivers or if they really could perform miracles.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret Societies: Mystery and Conspiracy
programme.desc: Experts investigate if there's any truth to conspiracy theories that allege secret societies control the course of world history from behind-the scenes, and if true, new discoveries might finally reveal the extent of their global domination.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secrets of the Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican Archives hold the personal documents of past Popes, including pieces such as Galileo's trial transcript and King Henry VIII's annulment request. What else is hidden in the Vatican Library a place that is out of bounds even to Cardinals?

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Mystery of the Giants
programme.desc: Discover why so many of our cultures refer to giants and if they were myths or could have actually walked the earth. See the tombs and skeletons discovered in Sardinia, where evidence of giants may have been found.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Treasure of Solomon
programme.desc: The High Priests of the Temple in Jerusalem could have hidden their most sacred items before the city was sacked by the Romans and the Dead Sea Scrolls could actually be a treasure map to these hidden wonders. See what else lies under this ancient city.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Oracles of the Dead
programme.desc: The Oracles were thought to be young women of the underworld who were consulted by ancient Greek society, and their visions helped shape the course of history. Find the truth behind their extraordinary trances and apparent psychic powers.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Lost Treasures of Petra
programme.desc: It is one of the great wonders of the ancient world, but there is little information on who built the magnificent city of Petra in Jordan and why. See what treasure remains buried there and the dark secrets that remain in this mysterious place.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Dead Sea Scrolls Conspiracy
programme.desc: Experts investigated the Dead Sea Scrolls, which have been kept top-secret for decades by the Vatican. These could reveal the location of tunnel holding billions of dollars of treasure.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret History of Jesus
programme.desc: Experts use new discoveries to reveal the true story of Jesus Christ, and using cutting-edge tech, this critical evidence is challenging everything we know about the man who changed history.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Lost Treasure of the Templars
programme.desc: The Knights Templar may have discovered a great treasure in Jerusalem and brought it back to Europe to become more powerful than the Pope itself. We try to solve the mystery of why this treasure disappeared.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Dark Truths of the Templars
programme.desc: Templar fact and fiction have become blurred by their depictions in book and on film. However, we present a very different picture that challenges head on the orthodox beliefs about an order that angered much of Europe, particularly France.

programme.title: Forbidden History: In Search of King Arthur
programme.desc: The legend of King Arthur is one of a courageous fighter and leader in battle, but for centuries, the fabled king has been a mystery to historians. Find out if his story of Camelot, Excalibur and Guinevere just an elaborate fairytale.

programme.title: Why I Ran: Kevin/ Jason
programme.desc: People who have lead the police on high-speed car chases share their experiences and stories. They also explain what was going through their heads while they were being pursued.

programme.title: Why I Ran: Justin/ Frank
programme.desc: A struggling father resorts to illegal means to make a living, leading him into a situation involving stolen property; a doting grandfather ends up on the wrong side of the law and flees after being pulled over

programme.desc: As a student at New York Military Academy, John Gotti Jr. learned of his father's meteoric rise to power in the world of organized crime.

programme.title: Gotti: Godfather and Son: Fathers and Sons
programme.desc: The FBI is focused on taking down Gotti and the Gambino Crime family, as well as the bosses of all five New York mafia clans.

programme.desc: Examine the history and inmate roster of what was once America's most humane prison.

programme.desc: Built on farmland, 'The Rock' was infamous as the site of stabbings and a decapitation.

programme.title: The Big House: Folsom

programme.title: The Big House: Colorado State
programme.desc: Filmmakers explore one of America's harshest security facilities and its rich past.

programme.title: Rookies: Tampa: The Birth of a Rookie
programme.desc: Rookie Denny Cooper's father-in-law questions his decision to join the police when his wife is about to give birth and Dennis is off restraining a husband after a hit-and-run. Rookie Hugh Herndon begins on the wild streets of Tampa.

programme.title: Rookies: Jefferson: Step Up or Step Off
programme.desc: FTO Michael is concerned about a rookie's shyness who fails a simple, important test.

programme.title: Rookies: Tampa: Class Begins
programme.desc: Rookie A.J. Cafaro sees his first dead body; Hugh Herndon decides to become a cop and leave his teaching career behind.

programme.title: Rookies: Jefferson: Riding Solo
programme.desc: Henry Conravey has successfully completed 12 weeks of field training but after a series of mistakes is not sure he'll be allowed to patrol the streets on his own. Chris Cade is looking forward to getting is own patrol car.

programme.title: Monstresses: Katie Belflower & Brandita Taliano
programme.desc: 2003, Livermore, California: 17-year old Katie Bellflower seduces a high school classmate's husband, 20-year old Mike Simons. The young Monstress is willing to kill not just once--but twice--to keep Simons to herself.

programme.title: Monstresses: Diana Haun & Morgan Hughes
programme.desc: In 1996, Ventura, California, 32 year old supermarket clerk Diana Haun thinks she has met her soul mate in co-worker Michael Dally when the two start a steamy affair. Diane decides to do whatever it takes to get rid of Michael's wife, Sherri.

programme.title: Monstresses: Elizabeth Reynolds & Linda Henning
programme.desc: In 2003 Kingsville, Texas, Elizabeth Reynolds claims she's divorced when she gets involved with 39-year-old Al Benitez. But when he finds out she's still married, he tries to break it off. She goes berserk and hires a man to get her revenge on Al.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Texas Showdown
programme.desc: Two SUVs and a motorcycle race down a Texas highway. In this high speed chase between both the wife AND mistress of Bill Hall his life would hinge on a U-turn and detectives would have to decide if this was reckless driving...or murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Don't Scream
programme.desc: A young mom calls 911 claiming she cut her own throat in front of her ex-husband and child. Doctors say there’s no way she did it to herself.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Lorenzen Wright: No Defense
programme.desc: A hometown hero is gunned down in the woods, and seven years later police get a tip that changes everything. 48 Hours explores the question of who killed basketball star Lorenzen Wright.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: To Kiss or to Kill
programme.desc: April and Brad are happily married until her dreams of having a baby fall apart. Heartbroken, April turns to other men for consolation. One even moves in with the couple. But when Brad is ultimately replaced as the man of the house, everyone pays a price.

programme.title: Body Cam: Shots Fired
programme.desc: A domestic dispute turns into a hostage situation with children's lives at stake; an apparent vehicle accident turns into a shocking multiple murder with armed killers on the run; a disturbance at a liquor store leaves an officer fighting for his life.

programme.title: Body Cam: Officer Down
programme.desc: Officers find themselves pitted against a lone gunman holed up in a suburban home; the nerve of a rookie cop is tested when a routine stop on the highway goes horribly wrong.

programme.title: Body Cam: Code 30
programme.desc: In New York state, a domestic disturbance takes a violent turn which changes a police chief's life. In Florida an officer chasing 2 suspects is separated from his K9. And in Indiana, an Officer stares down the barrel of a suspect's gun.

programme.title: Body Cam: The Chase
programme.desc: A dangerous felon has stolen a truck and will ram anything in his path; On a freezing winter night a lone officer is attacked by a crazed half naked man; At a County Jail, a gunman fires at unarmed officers, leaving one fighting for his life.

programme.title: Body Cam: Cover Me
programme.desc: Two police officers respond to a domestic disturbance that ends in tragedy. A terrifying house fire turns into a murder investigation. The search for a known sex offender builds to a shocking conclusion.

programme.title: Body Cam: Under Siege
programme.desc: On New Year's Eve, a domestic dispute ends in tragedy when two deputies are trapped with a gun-wielding suspect; in Iowa, a high-speed pursuit escalates to a gruesome conclusion.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: To Kiss or to Kill
programme.desc: April and Brad are happily married until her dreams of having a baby fall apart. Heartbroken, April turns to other men for consolation. One even moves in with the couple. But when Brad is ultimately replaced as the man of the house, everyone pays a price.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: The Millionaire's Mistress
programme.desc: Dionne Baugh begins a steamy affair with millionaire Lance Herndon behind her husband's back. Unknown to Dionne, Lance sees other women, underestimating the intensity of her feelings. Their lust triggers a deadly spiral towards jealousy and murder.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: Hot and Sweet
programme.desc: When one of three people in a love triangle is found brutally murdered, the affair is exposed and a manhunt begins.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Freeway Phantom
programme.desc: In 1971 and '72, Washington DC is terrorized by a cunning killer who abducts and murders six young African American girls. Police and the community are outraged by the serial killings that target young children in their own neighborhoods.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: A Killing in Chinatown
programme.desc: Art imitates life when Cambodian genocide survivor Dr. Haing Ngor wins an Oscar for his role in the film The Killing Fields. But when he's gunned down the LAPD investigate a web of political intrigue, revenge and street gangs to uncover the truth.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Nine Years in the Shadows
programme.desc: When a young woman is found murdered in her Modesto, CA home in 1988, police investigate the strife and infidelity on both sides of her marriage. But it's a surprising witness who eventually leads police to her killer.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: She Was Gone
programme.desc: Three months after high school sweethearts, Lisa and Jimmy Moore, end their marriage, Lisa disappears. Fearing the worst, her family file a missing person report, but the police have no leads, no witnesses, but they do know that someone is lying.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Warning Signs
programme.desc: A Deputy reports a 1990 Dodge Intrepid pushed over an embankment just south of Gig Harbor, Washington. He investigates and discovers the dead body of missing Puyallup father, Randall Ferguson, in the trunk. He had been shot twice in the head.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Wheeling and Dealing
programme.desc: Feb. 24, 1996, Frank Black Jr., the owner of a school bus company, goes missing. The FBI needs to determine if he is dead, and where's his body? It's a mystery built on lies that can only be solved when someone is brave enough, to tell the truth.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Cult of Personality
programme.desc: In 2014 a 911 call reports gunshots at the home of TV host Scott Rogers. As detectives work to piece together the events that led up to what looks like a murder-suicide, they soon discover a trail of lies from England all the way to Louisiana.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Ex's and Alibis
programme.desc: On December 3, 200, Louisiana Melton and her boyfriend Phillip Brown are found shot dead. Detective Harris of the Houston Police Department has little evidence from the crime scene, a large list of potential suspects, and one huge lie.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Once an Animal
programme.desc: A cold case from Northern California heats up when Detective Molly Daul ties a brutal assault case she's working on to this twelve year old murder. And when this killer strikes in Portland, multiple homicide detectives team up to take him down.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: A Mystery in the Pines
programme.desc: Caught in a love triangle, young chef and mom Heather Mallory vanishes. Now Portland detectives and Heather's parents search for the truth in an investigation involving wiretaps, confidential informants and a dramatic resolution deep in the forest.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Pacific Terror
programme.desc: When Detective Molly Daul works two homicides back to back, she realizes she's dealing with a sexual predator who targets trusting young women. Arrested before he can kill again in Seattle, his chilling confession remains with Molly to this day.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican is a secretive, watchful institution that protects its reputation and the members of its ranks with fierce, often reckless abandon. The secrets and scandals throughout its history are some of the darkest.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Kennedy Killings
programme.desc: Conspiracy theories surrounding the assassination of Robert Kennedy, the murder of TV presenter Jill Dando and the death of government weapons inspector Dr. David Kelly are examined.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Country Legend's Tour Bus
programme.desc: Christopher Gay is in jail for petty theft and known for his ability to escape. But on top of this, Gay is known for his choice in getaway vehicles. This cross-country chase is hardly a joy ride, as the cops are resolute on capturing him for good.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Family Coming After Me
programme.desc: After a fight in a mall, Eric Quesada murders his ex-best friend in a drive-by shooting. He goes on the run to Mexico, where he is caught by Mexican officials. Quesada spends two years fighting extradition before being sent back to the US.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Boyfriend to Support
programme.desc: In jail for fraud, Steven Russell falls in love with inmate Philip Morris. When Morris is released, Russell is desperate to be reunited. He escapes from jail with elaborate cons. Once out, the two live a lavish life, supported by scams that alert the FBI.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Raps
programme.desc: Raymond Ross skips town after beating a teen into a coma. With his cousin, who is also wanted, Ross enters the drug scene selling dope and his own music. After a close call, Ross decides to let loose and party hard while police close in on this trail.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Make It in the Big Easy
programme.desc: Jeremy Woods convinced his girlfriend to forge bad checks and then murdered her and her son.

programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.desc: Brett restores a 1941 modern ranch in Redlands, CA, for a couple who recently inherited the home from her grandfather.

programme.title: Restored: Dutch Colonial Done Right

programme.title: Restored: 1927 Arts and Crafts Bungalow

programme.title: Restored: 1930 Simple Spanish Bungalow
programme.desc: Brett helps a recently-divorced mom who is in over her head with her cute Spanish bungalow in Riverside, California. He opts for a simplistic approach in his restoration of the exterior areas and kitchen.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Vermont Stone House
programme.desc: Novice builder Danny Clark attempts to construct a 600-square-foot stone cabin in Vermont's White River Valley. The home is sure to be a true work of art but his inexperience, the harsh winter and the unusual architecture push him to his limits.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Desert Mountain House
programme.desc: A creative family builds a custom home where the mountains and desert collide in Colorado's last frontier. The dream project quickly turns into a job when the harsh terrain combines with the demanding pace they've set for themselves.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Woodland Expedition
programme.desc: A young man is designing his first home on family land in rural Illinois to be off the grid and on the go. He and his buddy combine their experience as long-distance travelers to improvise their build through a Midwest winter.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Streamside Cottage
programme.desc: Professional treehouse builder Michael 'Murph' Murphy wants to build a cottage retreat for his family in Washington. He enlists his friends to create a natural siding and a massive fishing net for lounging above the living space.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Bottle Island
programme.desc: John Beal is ready to leave the city behind and embrace a life off the grid in Isla Mujeres, Mexico. He hires Richart Sowa and his son Eden to build an eco-friendly private floating island made from recycled plastic bottles.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Derby Dolls
programme.desc: Four bakers try to elbow past the competition for a chance to bring their cupcakes to a party celebrating the Los Angeles Derby Dolls.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Renaissance Faire
programme.desc: It's a blast from the past as four cupcake bakers fight for a place at the VIP party for the 50th anniversary of the Renaissance Faire in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Cake Wars: Champs: Shrek
programme.desc: Four returning champions do battle for the chance to have their cake as the centerpiece of a party celebrating the 10th anniversary of everyone's favorite ogre, Shrek!

programme.title: Cake Wars: Champs: Lego
programme.desc: Four champions return to the 'Cake Wars' kitchen to build the most amazing cakes of all time in honour of some of the most iconic toys of all time, Lego! Only one champion will reign supreme and have their cake as the centrepiece of the party.

programme.title: Cake Wars: Champs: Disney Princesses
programme.desc: It's an adventure for the ages with Cinderella, Ariel, Princess Jasmine and many more, as four champion bakers battle to have their amazing cake creation as the centrepiece of a party celebrating Disney's princesses.

programme.title: Cookie Wars: Cookie Carnival
programme.desc: Three teams of cookie decorators and sugar artists create gravity-defying, 3-D worlds using cookies and sugar. The final two have just five hours to create a massive, realistic cookie carnival.

programme.title: Cake Wars: Champs: The Avengers
programme.desc: Four champion cake artists will have to suit up and harness their baking superpowers when Marvel's The Avengers fly into the Cake Wars Champs kitchen.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Farm Fresh
programme.desc: Alfonso showcases foods with farm-fresh ingredients. Go hog wild over Benton's Bacon, see the Georgian pecans going into Carolina Foods' Duchess Pecan Pies.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Freaky Flavors
programme.desc: Alfonso highlights snacks with some freaky flavors! From Upton's Naturals Bacon Seitan to the Smoked Nib Brittle from Olive and Sinclair, to Trolli Sour Brite Crawlers, these curious treats are good eats.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Little Bits
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro explores little treats with big flavor like the colorful Carousel gumballs at Ford Gum, Ghirardelli Chocolate's decadent semi-sweet Baking Chips and the tasty Duchess Gem Donuts from Carolina Foods.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Pop Stars
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro explores some treats with serious pop. He'll pop the top of a Snapple Kiwi Strawberry beverage, pop a bubble with the classic Big League Chew shredded bubblegum, and get the inside scoop at Pez.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Quick Fix
programme.desc: Alfonso comes to the rescue with quick fixes. P.F. Chang's Home Menu Beef and Broccoli frozen entree makes weeknight meals easy and Chocolate Chip Quaker Chewy Bars are a great snack for kids and adults both.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Simple Goodness
programme.desc: Alfonso covers all things easy from snacks that evoke childhood memories like iconic Hostess Twinkies and the colorful Jel Sert Otter Pops to easy dinner solutions like Bertolli's Chicken Parmigiana and Penne.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Tex-Mex
programme.desc: Roger Mooking travels across America searching for the 12 best Tex-Mex dishes from beans, meats and peppers to salsas and gooey cheeses.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Fried
programme.desc: From seafood and beef to pork and cheese, all the best foods taste better fried and Roger Mooking is scouring the country in search of the 12 best fried-food dishes. He's hanging out with fried-food-loving chefs learning all their secrets.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Cajun Cookouts
programme.desc: Roger heads to the Texas and Louisiana to feast on classic Cajun cooking.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Crazy for Chicken
programme.desc: Roger travels across Massachusetts to meet two chefs who are putting a brand new spin on fire-roasted, rotisserie chicken.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Food Traditions
programme.desc: Roger visits New England for two unique food traditions that celebrate family, friends and the community.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Love for Lobsters in Maine
programme.desc: In Maine, the love for lobsters runs deep and Roger visits two places where lobsters are cooked in the coolest, wood-fired cookers.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: BBQ Sandwiches
programme.desc: Roger heads to the Barbecue Exchange for two delicious sandwiches - one is called heaven and the other is called hell. They're both packed with pulled pork and bacon. Then it's off to KayJoe's BBQ in Centreville, Tennessee.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Hamming it Up
programme.desc: Today is about Roger's favorite animal - the pig. He's hamming it up with some of the country's best suppliers or cured, smoked, and aged pork.

programme.title: Good Eats: My Pod
programme.desc: The rare vanilla pod grows on an orchid that can only be pollinated one day a year and contains many flavours and aromas.

programme.title: Good Eats: Coconut Cake Revival
programme.desc: Host Alton Brown wants to know if it's possible to make a great cake with coconut from a can and he's willing to crack open as many nuts as it takes to make a slice of paradise on a plate.

programme.title: Good Eats: Use Your Noodle II: Fresh Pastai

programme.title: Good Eats: Dr. Strangeloaf

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: Harl Hubbs Day/ Ann They're Off

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: Cubs and Robbers/ Billy the Bug
programme.desc: A movie promotion stunt goes wrong, unleashing a humongous ‘Cubby the Cop’ balloon on the city. Then, Fire Chief McCloud accidently buys a malfunctioning Twirly Hat for her nephew.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: Legend of Isla Nublar: To the Extreme!
programme.desc: Danny releases an energy drink into the dinosaurs' water supply, making them extra-energetic and extra dangerous.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Operation Dinkelberg/ Spellementary School
programme.desc: Foop is back and trying to be the most popular kid at school.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Let Sleeper Dogs Lie/ Cat-astrophe
programme.desc: Crocker tries to trigger Sparky with a secret word. Catman confuses Sparky for his old arch-nemesis Dogman.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Longest Fight/ Hypno! Part Deux
programme.desc: The Turtles have a hard time watching their idol skateboard while stopping a burglary. Hypno-Potamus returns and causes havoc at April's homecoming dance.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Late Fee/ Bullhop
programme.desc: The endless craziness of New York complicates the returning of a DVD; the Turtles try to help a distressed mutant.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Stuck on You/ Al Be Back
programme.desc: After an unfortunate “glue” accident, the Turtles have to fight a whole host of villains. The Turtles’ first public musical gig is interrupted by Albearto and his animatronic army.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Dadlantis/ Chloe Rules!
programme.desc: Timmy and Chloe become eco-warriors when they save the underwater city of Atlantis from a dangerous 'sea monster.' Timmy regrets wishing Chloe was the school hall monitor when he sees how seriously she takes the job.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Whittle Me This/ Mayor May Not
programme.desc: Catman thinks Timmy has been kidnapped. He mistakes Chloe for Catgirl and enlists her help to save Timmy.Timmy wishes Dad was Mayor, but Timmy gets tortured by the paparazzi and risks having his fairies discovered.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Shark Objects / Dream Weaver
programme.desc: When Greens try to spend an eventful day at the beach, Cricket tries to prank the beach-goers; Cricket discovers he can influence the family's dreams to disastrous real-life results.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Garage Tales/ Animal Farm
programme.desc: After finding a box of mementos, Gramma tells the kids the story of her greatest adventure. While the Greens are away, the animals compete to see who will rule the farm.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Roadside Attraction
programme.desc: Grunkle Stan takes the kids with him on a road-trip to sabotage all the other tourist traps in Oregon.

programme.title: The Owl House: Covention
programme.desc: Luz learns about witch covens, but her lesson goes awry when she finds herself thrust into a witch's duel!

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Spear!

programme.title: DuckTales: Nothing Can Stop Della Duck!

programme.title: DuckTales: Timephoon!

programme.title: DuckTales: GlomTales!

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: City of Great Racks

programme.title: Judge Jerry

programme.desc: Jaz and her step-mom want to prove her soon-to-be ex-husband is her daughter's father. Jamaul and his sister don't believe Jamaul is the father of Ammiel's baby. Andrea said Jason might not be the father of her baby, and now he needs a paternity test.

programme.desc: Mel meets a couple in a crumbling marriage. The two have been separated for six months but still live together. He wants to work it out, she wants to kick him out.

programme.title: Movie: Bruce Almighty
programme.desc: Bruce, a dissatisfied reporter, finds himself endowed with God's powers. At first he is delighted with all of the things he can do, but he quickly learns how difficult it can be to run the world.

programme.title: Movie: Due Date
programme.desc: After being kicked off an airplane, a man must rent a car and drive cross-country with the person who got him on the no-fly list, in order to make it to his child's birth on time.

programme.title: Movie: Rush Hour 2
programme.desc: Two police officers uncover a counterfeiting ring in Hong Kong and try to bring it down.

programme.title: Movie: Crazy, Stupid, Love.

programme.title: Movie: Team America: World Police
programme.desc: This spoof of patriotic action movies revolves around a team of oblivious paramilitary soldiers, whose high-tech headquarters resides within Mount Rushmore, fighting to keep the world safe from terrorists and activists.

programme.title: Movie: College
programme.desc: During an orientation visit at Fieldmont University, best friends Kevin, Carter and Morris fall in with one of the rowdiest fraternities on campus. As new recruits, they are subjected to endless humiliations and to the no-holds-barred college party scene.

programme.title: Movie: True Lies
programme.desc: A secret agent on the trail of a group of terrorists puts his family at risk when they discover his true identity.

programme.title: Movie: Jingle All the Way

programme.title: Movie: Muriel's Wedding
programme.desc: A socially inept young woman with a dysfunctional family yearns for a better life.

programme.title: Movie: American Animals
programme.desc: Four university students bored with their quiet suburban lives begin imagining pulling off a heist like they've seen in countless movies, but as their plans to steal rare books from the college's library take shape decide to actually go through with it.

programme.title: Movie: Keeping Up With the Steins
programme.desc: As a young boy's bar mitzvah approaches, he invites his estranged grandfather to stay with the family. As a result, the boy learns what it means to be a man.

programme.title: Movie: Along Came Polly

programme.title: Movie: Corky Romano
programme.desc: The black sheep of a mob family pretends to be a thug to help his dad infiltrate the FBI.

programme.desc: Beverly helps Erica plan a 'Dirty Dancing' themed dance at school, only to turn on Erica when she realizes it may be inappropriate. Meanwhile, Murray tries to learn dancing with Adam with little luck.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Just Say No
programme.desc: As the presidential election approaches, Erica finds herself strongly supporting candidate Walter Mondale. After learning Beverly always votes for whomever Murray tells her to vote for, Erica sets out to educate her mother.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Pretty Problem
programme.desc: Caroline enrols herself and Max in a cake-decorating class to increase their skills and take their cupcake business to the next level.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: The Game: Matchmaker, Matchmaker... Mind Your Business!
programme.desc: Tasha falls for a new man who turns out to be a male escort. Meanwhile, Melanie, in the spirit of fostering a friendship with Janay, throws a dinner party for her and her new man, hoping to play matchmaker, but instead opening a can of worms with Derwin.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Wedding Planning
programme.desc: When Mike offers the cash-strapped Kristin and Ryan a very generous Christmas present to put toward their wedding, the couple must decide if they will accept his gift as well as the conditions that go along with it.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack Hanna and his crew travel the globe to film animals in their natural habitat.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack Hanna and his crew travel the globe to film animals in their natural habitat.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack Hanna and his crew travel the globe to film animals in their natural habitat.

programme.title: This Old House: Trade School
programme.desc: Insight into the tricks of the trade from experts and professionals as they renovate and restore America's homes from top to bottom.

programme.title: Chicken Soup for the Soul's Animal Tales
programme.desc: Amazing and inspiring people from around the world go above and beyond to care for animals. Animal rescue teams and dedicated advocates help lost pets find forever homes and incredible pets assist people in need including military K9s and therapy animals.

programme.title: Did I Mention Invention?
programme.desc: Fascinating stories of invention are shared and everyday innovators are highlighted.

programme.title: House Smarts
programme.desc: Nationally known home improvement expert Lou Manfredini provides tips for home improvement projects, repairs and maintenance. Also, advice about financing and budgeting these projects is offered.

programme.title: Raw Travel: Timeless Northern Ethiopia
programme.desc: Viewers are encouraged to break out the passport and explore cultures around the world.

programme.title: Wipeout: You're All Acting Like Babies!
programme.desc: Only the three strongest players will make it through to the Wipeout Zone.

programme.title: Just for Laughs: Gags: America's Go No Talent
programme.desc: Hilarious pranks are played on unsuspecting people and the results are caught on tape.

programme.title: Just for Laughs: Gags: Puzzled Pranks
programme.desc: Hilarious pranks are played on unsuspecting people and the results are caught on tape.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Precious Snowflake
programme.desc: Mandy chooses local-celebrity Mike as the speaker for her business school's graduation. After learning that the school requires his speech to be politically correct and micro-aggression free, Mike must decide whether or not to play by the rules.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Help Wanted
programme.desc: Since losing her teaching job, Vanessa has been spending her time hovering over the family, and it's driving everyone nuts. Unable to land a new gig, Vanessa becomes discouraged, but Mike does everything he can to get her back doing what she loves.

programme.title: Movie: Spanglish
programme.desc: A Hispanic single mother, who recently immigrated to California, must deal with both language and cultural barriers and her daughter's Americanization when she is employed as a housekeeper in a dysfunctional household.

programme.title: Movie: Emma
programme.desc: A young woman who plays matchmaker for others is unable to recognize her own feelings.

programme.title: Movie: Metro
programme.desc: A hostage negotiator and rookie police officer look for a psychopathic cop killer.

programme.title: Movie: Arizona
programme.desc: A single and struggling realtor mom's life goes off the rails when she witnesses a murder.

programme.title: Movie: Isn't It Romantic
programme.desc: After woman who has spent her whole life feeling cynical about love and romance suffers a nasty hit to the head, she wakes up to find herself living in a romantic comedy, complete with new friends and a new love interest vying for her attention.

programme.title: Movie: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: After being picked as her best friend's maid of honour, a broke woman tries to bluff her way through the expensive bridesmaid rituals.

programme.title: Movie: Jersey Girl
programme.desc: A young father loses his career and his wife and must raise his daughter alone the best way that he can.

programme.title: Movie: The Great White Hype
programme.desc: Boxing promoters stage a fight between a black world champion and a white unknown.

programme.title: Movie: Pulling Strings
programme.desc: A U.S. diplomat working in Mexico City is saved after a night of drinking by a local Mariachi singer whose visa she rejected the day before.

programme.title: Movie: The Hudsucker Proxy
programme.desc: A naïve Indiana boy goes to New York in 1958 to sell his idea for the hula hoop.

programme.title: Movie: Big Top Pee-Wee
programme.desc: Pee-Wee Herman joins a circus troupe as they put on a really big show.

programme.title: Movie: Along Came Polly
programme.desc: Repressed risk analyst Reuben Feffer keeps his life planned out perfectly until his new bride leaves him on their honeymoon. When a free-spirited former classmate comes back into his life, he re-evaluates his overly ordered universe.

programme.title: Flight of the Conchords: Mugged
programme.desc: Bret leaves his friend Jemaine hanging and risk's their friendship after being mugged.

programme.title: Movie: The Ladykillers
programme.desc: A group of thieves are plotting to rob a casino and hide out in an elderly woman's basement.

programme.title: Movie: Rock the Kasbah
programme.desc: A has-been rock manager gets stranded in Afghanistan, where he discovers a young girl with a beautiful singing voice. Sure that she could win a national singing competition, he takes her on an adventure-of-a-lifetime in the hopes of reviving his career.

programme.title: Texas 4000
programme.desc: 70 University of Texas students embark on a 4,500-mile bicycle ride from Austin, Texas to Anchorage, Alaska. Their mission is to raise funds and spread hope for the cancer fighting community.
